| Career politicians like Joe Biden (who has been a politician longer than I've been alive) and Nancy Pelosi are prime examples of what happens when we let leaders stay in the swamp for far too long. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: How We Win
body:
How We Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znno1qa633vj347a15cu1fmkn8ucnsgkdediutqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1j6eor6cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uuq30o9gs1gjbc30e1gjct1h63gm6dlgc5pn9dhmesq7eojge9hjadpl6dirao37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhe2qr0o3imtj32cljcjjr1db5e8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6pvdgam9a2e19lrmgi4qah0nuqtls1jgk2efi80_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1j6eor6cjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsoh9h21t87h5ccls7mvfnpioq57kno9qlspq42g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1j6eor6cjh2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it 's gone!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlihmlri712pslr2m6d8r75er912bddbtpu48ns0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1j6eor6cjh2bs)
---
[Get my book](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6hedcp3v7ifc01uulp4vgf6u6or8i7acd1lilmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1j6eor6cjh2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you 'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zq0k7r0op71bn1f56ok1rho77q7hkd27i88d09m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1j6eor6cjh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven 't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd4nc2oq7o11u8ucllt8nvibq54cpo1tftmvb210_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1j6eor6cjh2bs)
---
[Get my book](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z05pmeinuohl9au314c6uqfnrpboosmbbsi7bi6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1j6eor6cjh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we 're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. Dr Gregory Smith of Harvard University has some good news for men. “If you’re having trouble completely emptying your bladder, or getting up frequently to pee at night, I suggest you add this powerful nutrient to your diet. It targets swelling of the prostate specifically and brings it down gently, [without the harsh side effects of many prescription drugs. ](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11565/6374453/58ec6bfcad305c5d085071b02da3672203ab5981/32a4be6617a68f6d10ac810e93b7d95cc950bf69)

| | I started using it myself a few months ago, and noticed within a few days my urination is less frequent. And I have a more powerful stream. Plus I rarely get up to pee at night now, and before it was at least 3-4 times. This sleep interruption caused many additional side effects, like brain fog and forgetfulness. I am so thrilled with the results I have been recommending it to all my patients, and they are seeing very similar results. Many are even enjoying sex again. [I urge all men over 50 to read this important bulletin on this vital nutrient](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11565/6374453/58ec6bfcad305c5d085071b02da3672203ab5981/32a4be6617a68f6d10ac810e93b7d95cc950bf69)."

clean_body: | | | | == | ALERT: Hunter Biden Has ADMITTED The Laptop From Hell is REAL!!! | Peter, | In case you haven't seen, Hunter Biden's Laptop From Hell - the smoking gun which lays out the Biden Crime Family's foreign influence peddling and which I made part of the official Congressional record - has been confirmed to be REAL by Hunter himself. This SHOULD be a vindication for us, Peter. After all, the "Russian disinformation" claims have now proven to be FALSE! It's clear that Republicans have been right all along to call this out! But get this... Instead, Hunter is now calling for his Deep State cronies to PUNISH all of his enemies who exposed this corruption. His lawyers are seriously calling for a CRIMINAL INQUIRY to be opened against anyone who helped get this crucial information out to the American Public! That means unless we take action IMMEDIATELY, it won't be the BIDENS who end up facing jail time for their crimes... ...it will be the patriots who helped shed light on this massive corruption scandal in the first place! Don't let them get away with this - forward this email to help get the word out, and then, == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Peter, Hunter claims he didn't "consent" to private information being made public... Well, guess what - the American People didn't "consent" to a crack-ridden brat selling influence to foreign governments in order to get access to the Big Guy. Don't let them gaslight you - THAT is the real crime here, Peter. And whether it's the Russia Hoax, the origin of the China Virus, or now the Laptop From Hell, this is ALWAYS the playbook they follow... FIRST, they claim it's a "claim it's a conspiracy theory." NEXT, they claim it's "disinformation." THEN, they either say it's no big deal or that we deserved it. And FINALLY, they try to take us out for exposing the truth in the first place! We only overcome this by standing together, Peter, and getting the truth out so that we can SHATTER their B.S. narrative. == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Thanks for your support, | == | Matt Gaetz | | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. subject: I am furious, team.

body:
Sign our petition to demand...
|
---

I am furious, team. We are on the verge of witnessing one of the most significant victories for redistricting in North Carolina be erased. Radical politicians are asking the North Carolina Supreme Court to disregard its own legal precedent it set just months ago.
**[Sign our petition if you condemn this action and believe the courts should remain independent and not rewrite decisions because of political changes.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58532125/391402799/-1983457736?source=20230208_AOTL_F_NCPetion_RedLite&refcode=20230208_AOTL_F_NCPetion_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4OTU5MTQ2LTU0YTktZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ntTrNPL21aSluSF_RMaK8vjdbX7bEvKm8GblhuZEubs=&emci=f055b7d0-aca8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=68959146-54a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)**
Our team has been in the weeds on the _Harper v. Hall_ case for a while now -- our affiliate organization, the National Redistricting Foundation, is supporting the plaintiffs in the case, who are at the forefront of justice against gerrymandering.
We need your help to raise the alarm because these radical politicians won’t stop until they’ve damaged the legitimacy and reputation of North Carolina’s highest court.
Voters in North Carolina expect judges to put politics aside once elected and apply the law fairly and equally. Rehearing recently-decided litigation based on nothing but a change in court personnel undermines the court’s independence and erodes public trust in the rule of law. **Voters do not want their constitutional rights or the opportunity to make their voices heard politicized by any means.**
**[Add your name to our petition if you agree -- the court should remain independent and not rewrite decisions because of political changes.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58532126/391402800/-1983457736?source=20230208_AOTL_F_NCPetion_RedLite&refcode=20230208_AOTL_F_NCPetion_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4OTU5MTQ2LTU0YTktZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ntTrNPL21aSluSF_RMaK8vjdbX7bEvKm8GblhuZEubs=&emci=f055b7d0-aca8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=68959146-54a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)**
Our team will keep you posted as things unfold!
Thanks for your support,
Bri Brough
Regional Organizing Manager

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

subject: Dr. Nina Ahmad Endorsed by Philadelphia Democratic Party

body:
Persistent Hard Work Pays Off!!(Just ask the E-A-G-L-E-S)
Nina Ahmad is **Officially an Endorsed Candidate of the Philadelphia Democratic Party for City Council At-Large!**
Nina is a fighter, a true blue Democrat who believes the best solutions come from collaboration. Whether it's as an elected member of the Pennsylvania State Committee, always standing with the Philadelphia Delegation 100% of the time or fighting for women's rights as President of PA NOW, Nina finds a way to fight for Democratic values - Always!
Having a citywide perspective is important to understanding the problems facing many of our residents. And representing the entire city is no small endeavor. We are ecstatic knowing that the Philadelphia Democratic City Committee believes Nina has the values worthy of their endorsement.
Help Dr. Nina get on the ballot by [contributing to our campaign.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Pxk3mubXGQnG3ZFgsKk44mmdHnixTLe56Wlrhg2yXe0=/xOFkQKS-b86TRvOH_6GEnnFntMSPN_ABfUewLxA-p48=)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Is There "A SECRET PLAN" Of 5-D Chess Playing Out Before Our Eyes?
body:
Is There A Secret Plan Happening? Within the Conservative movement there is a TON of talk about a secret 5-D chess plan that has been playing out for
| | |
---
## Is There A Secret Plan Happening?
---
Within the Conservative movement there is a **TON** of talk about a **secret 5-D chess plan** that has been playing out for the last two years and although it seems like the "_bad guys_ " are in charge, the truth is that the _"good guys_ " aka "white hats" are actually running the show. I get asked if this is true due to the fact that I lead [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10450.1.39ffa191e0e6164892660c1588fdd31a) and I have a close relationship with **General Flynn** , **Mike Lindell** , **Roger Stone** and others... Here is the hard truth: **THERE IS NO PLAN**. The "_good guys_ " are not running the show. Things are what they appear to be, which is = **it is really bad right now in America**. However, we are NOT without hope. Our hope is not in a Political Leader or Political Party. **Our hope is exclusively in the Lord Jesus Christ and He is not finished with America just yet.** This last Sunday, at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10451.1.954f9268821e6d681f4708eef9bdf216), I preached a message entitled: ["It's bad but... I'm glad](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10452.1.75ff22796b53174ff7d20f02120d7e81)." In life the bad things we go through actually position us for the miraculous work of the Lord.
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10453.1.5c5fc9136b5744a742a0b878b09dafc0)
---
In this message, I show how Joseph would have never made it to the **Palace** unless he went through the **Pit** and the **Prison**.
Maybe right now you feel like you are in a **Pit** or a **Prison**.
You should actually give thanks in the midst of it and **be glad for the Pit and the Prison** because the very thing the enemy uses to try and destroy you with is often the very thing God uses to propel you into your destiny.
Things might be bad, but we can still be glad because although **there is no secret plan of 5-D chess** , **there still is a plan that the Creator of Heaven and Earth will see through**.
[Watch Genesis Pt. 45 - It's Bad But... I'm Glad](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10454.1.28c3cdda7018ef53e99cad4be173d9d5) here: [www.youtube.com/live/9f3o-oXBt3k?feature=share&t=2](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10455.1.61060f73d57db1cbd9a662aadd2f800e)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10456.1.179ce50cdf78865861769766244f638c), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10457.1.d5090dd6d0e6acea5c0cf47b4fc75bff), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10458.1.aa215a7bd31e59e952b3c23741113a19), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10459.1.f74a89f3374b60ba63c501b190e63558), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10460.1.95b9c5e1aafaf28a94f6e3d69b9f4b96), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10461.1.4159fd7d78ce3f6053738448fbdfb0d0)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10462.1.a0811b50acf2179fb784e5d955d4ce20)
| | [ Watch: It's Bad But... I'm Glad ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10463.1.16abd20889575fd8d1be017386b2c56f)
---
---
## Who Is The Antichrist?
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10464.1.56155e8b4d55ca6ad7afaf99fc84a716)
---
There is a TON of speculation about who the **Antichrist** is...
**Joe Biden**? **Hillary Clinton**? **Donald Trump**? **Pope Francis**? and on and on.
Right now, at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10465.1.9f9f250c0be8623dfbb289a4bf30f112) for our midweek service, I am doing a series over the [Book of Revelation](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10466.1.02c8938f0c474a12425a9cb1a5f24060) (_line by line and verse by verse_).
Last night, our study took us to **Revelation 13** which is all about the **Antichrist** , the **False Prophet** and the **Mark of the Beast**.
Here is a link to my perspective of what Scripture says regarding the Antichrist, False Prophet & Mark of the Beast: [www.youtube.com/live/LBy2Ix5PFc8?feature=share](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10467.1.61633dc3d4a77d5fc523af9559daf884)
You can also watch the FULL SERIES over Revelation at: [https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZ0-pMl6zciQZxE5DSzcAKwH3M3DNQecu](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10468.1.89edd13a2815a9be7681d32be2576729)
| | [ Support Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10469.1.2bd4d2306cacae3da117efbc06cd57fd)
---
---
## Message From President Trump
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10470.1.b339f937ba3747d7f11bcba407b28e28)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10471.1.2cc88c7bf7a5644f39bcf8153144d769) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**.
You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10472.1.d4d9255921a8d8fd102353b504902072)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10473.1.d703f1bd9abcd9deed6dc91b045119cb)
We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing.
Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others.
This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
[Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10474.1.495ecf33b6082f0f9aa4256ab1943a69) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America.
There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point.
I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10475.1.b5d5d149064f5952e86c552cab222945) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country.
**Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_
Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10476.1.de9b31e579823ff8a1e6eb8f1f511146) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country.
Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director.
Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10477.1.8017a1a0ea354bc4ef54bcdc3bd4f54d) coalition.
Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10478.1.44c1703b7adf03e56e2a88da0622b9cd) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
| | [ Pastors For Trump ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10479.1.8e64056ccc9865b3f996ecb1c5c7a29b)

---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10481.1.96728ae070d4ad77f8845dd7e040e802), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17979808.10482.1.d6dd2b88db985729a576962b8fd527fa).

Within the Conservative movement there is a TON of talk about a secret 5-D chess plan that has been playing out for | | | Is There A Secret Plan Happening? Within the Conservative movement there is a TON of talk about a secret 5-D chess plan that has been playing out for the last two years and although it seems like the "bad guys " are in charge, the truth is that the "good guys " aka "white hats" are actually running the show. I get asked if this is true due to the fact that I lead and I have a close relationship with General Flynn , Mike Lindell , Roger Stone and others... Here is the hard truth: THERE IS NO PLAN. The "good guys " are not running the show. Things are what they appear to be, which is = it is really bad right now in America. However, we are NOT without hope. Our hope is not in a Political Leader or Political Party. Our hope is exclusively in the Lord Jesus Christ and He is not finished with America just yet. This last Sunday, at , I preached a message entitled: ." In life the bad things we go through actually position us for the miraculous work of the Lord. | In this message, I show how Joseph would have never made it to the Palace unless he went through the Pit and the Prison. Maybe right now you feel like you are in a Pit or a Prison. You should actually give thanks in the midst of it and be glad for the Pit and the Prison because the very thing the enemy uses to try and destroy you with is often the very thing God uses to propel you into your destiny. Things might be bad, but we can still be glad because although there is no secret plan of 5-D chess , there still is a plan that the Creator of Heaven and Earth will see through. here: Thank you, Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on , GAB, , , , , GETTR & ). | | Who Is The Antichrist? | There is a TON of speculation about who the Antichrist is... Joe Biden? Hillary Clinton? Donald Trump? Pope Francis? and on and on. Right now, at for our midweek service, I am doing a series over the (line by line and verse by verse). Last night, our study took us to Revelation 13 which is all about the Antichrist , the False Prophet and the Mark of the Beast. Here is a link to my perspective of what Scripture says regarding the Antichrist, False Prophet & Mark of the Beast: You can also watch the FULL SERIES over Revelation at: | | Message From President Trump | Recently, President Donald Trump sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed organization that he also recently shared about on TruthSocial. You can read the Pastors For Trump full here: We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with President Trump's share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as Newsweek , Rolling Stone , One America News Network , Real America's Voice , Gateway Pundit , Right Wing Watch , Baptist News Global and others. This coalition is made up of Pastors & Ministry Leaders from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again. is NOT just limited to Pastors/Ministry Leaders but is for every believer in America. There will be monthly Prayer Calls starting in January that will host prominent leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. Dr. Billy Graham once said, "For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray." Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to President Trump by the coalition. name: Zilvinas Silenas
subject: Hope in Detroit Public Schools
body:
This is an important step in spreading our message of liberty and free markets to the next generation [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1546%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Z03Gcq3ZxtT3r1cOSwmotQ&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659552%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=giTXZX009M2Ua%2b0PWUIpng&sysid=1)

Hello Friend,

I’m very excited to share that the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) is partnering with Detroit Public Schools to**teach liberty and bring hope to 3,500+ 10th and 11th-grade students this year. **

FEE Teacher Training and Revolution of One, in collaboration with the Michigan Council on Economic Education, established a partnership with the Detroit Public Schools Community District to assist with their social studies curriculum.

This is an important step in spreading our message of liberty and free markets to the next generation.

Since 2019, FEE’s **Revolution of One** initiative has aimed to engage geographic areas and audiences that the freedom philosophy typically doesn’t reach.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Zilvinas Silenas, President of FEE. Our mission is to make the ideas of liberty familiar, credible, and compelling to the rising generation.

That’s why I’ve set a goal to raise $12,000 this week to support our work in schools -- in Detroit and throughout our country.

[_**Will you help FEE deliver liberty and hope in more public schools by sending a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today?**__**Click here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659553%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y6xDfqZkLJcJe8wjWlrVLA&sysid=1)

Here’s how we’re reaching students in the Detroit Public Schools:

FEE secured a partnership with the Detroit Public Schools Community District to design and deliver an engaging curriculum that will inspire students to overcome their struggles and harness their strengths to create the life they most desire.

Economics teachers at 24 Detroit high schools will deliver the curriculum this Spring. It will include eight days of content that explores:
* The effects of big government and central planning programs such as “redlining”
* Other types of historical government-imposed economic discrimination
* The impacts of these programs, which still affect people today

As a component of the curriculum, a Revolution of One speaker will deliver a direct-to-student educational workshop entitled “The Comeback Kid.”

This workshop will highlight the government's failures that caused the discriminatory “redlining” practices while empowering students to employ the ideas of liberty to escape the “victim mindset.”

Ultimately, Revolution of One will help students process what they’ve learned, channel their frustrations about cruel historical economic realities, and inspire them to pursue freedom in their individual lives.

[_**Your generous support goes towards educating and empowering the next generation. Think about how many young lives you can change with a simple gift. Click here to give >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659554%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XJ8dl5CFyk4guENegJzr1w&sysid=1)

Soon, 24 high schools in Detroit will teach FEE’s curriculum to high school sophomores and juniors.

**An estimated 3,500-5,000students will hear from FEE about how to overcome the obstacles built by government intervention in the market and achieve their dreams.**

And most importantly, we’re able to share hope -- hope that our country isn’t evil, hope that lines of division will disappear, and hope for a better tomorrow.

But FEE can’t do it alone. That’s why we partner with school systems like Detroit and individuals who believe in liberty and free markets.

That’s why I want to partner with you, friend.

Friend, can you help support hope and liberty in the classroom?

I hope you’ll consider sending your support and help us meet our goal of raising $12,000 this week. **Click below to donate.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659565%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dvjIIBx3c%2b%2fpYUzazKmlLQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659566%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MNrT4bUZOF6vx%2fhDlJpCFQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659567%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JOUfXNZZXFlyIHT7HjVatg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659568%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rwd%2bbKxPL%2fQzme01raz63A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659569%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NGLZ6ZPRcdS9iaANP2WjSA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659560%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WDO%2fqjANS7fu1W9udQBL3g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659561%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QvTomjfMzten2IJnSN%2fnjw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659562%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SijbBLg5iHE%2bKjlYsGF%2f%2fQ&sysid=1)

Thank you,

****
Zilvinas Silenas
President of FEE

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1546%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Z03Gcq3ZxtT3r1cOSwmotQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1546%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Z03Gcq3ZxtT3r1cOSwmotQ&sysid=1)

name: Cianti Stewart-Reid, Fair Fight Action
subject: A note for you about this Black History Month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Lifting up Black voices will always be at the forefront of our mission. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58540367/391432640/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230210_f_bhm_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDc2ZDg5ZS02NGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nq75cU9rL0v_pJfxq2aGi8VjMNokqa5RC-GocmDXBis=&emci=6c76d89e-64a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6d76d89e-64a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Last week marked the start of Black History Month — an opportunity to recognize and celebrate the important work of audacious activists, freedom fighters, and courageous changemakers. Black policy makers, advocates and activists have worked tirelessly to make so many of today’s freedoms possible. And they inspire us to continue fighting to tear down barriers, including “Jim Crow 2.0”: unnecessary hurdles that anti-voter extremists have placed in front of the ballot box in a blatant attempt to silence our voices out of fear of our power. These attacks on voting rights aren’t anything new, so we know how to defeat them: by learning from our history and ensuring it is not repeated. **This Black History Month — and every month — we'll continue to lift up Black voices. We’ll continue to build community to inspire civic engagement with our neighbors. And we’ll continue our work to dismantle racial injustices in our electoral system.** Over the next few weeks, keep an eye on your inbox for more stories of Black voting rights champions and how Fair Fight Action is carrying on their legacies by protecting the freedom to vote. I’m so grateful to be fighting alongside you. Thank you. Onward, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58540368/391432641/1809509947?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230210_f_bhm_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDc2ZDg5ZS02NGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nq75cU9rL0v_pJfxq2aGi8VjMNokqa5RC-GocmDXBis=) Cianti Stewart-Reid

name: Brent Bozell
subject: 10 biggest lies from Biden's State of the Union
body:
I’m sure you’re as disgusted by all the lies Biden told during the speech. And if you didn’t, you can find The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union below.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi44pcqi98eorhk3hoj0hk48h35t77b3m87p4md8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)
Friend,

Did you see the State of the Union the other night?

If you did, I'm sure you're as disgusted by all the lies Biden told during the speech. And if you didn't, you can find **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union below.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

[_**I 've set a goal to raise $10,000 this week to support our fight to END media corruption. Can you join the fight with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent support >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zum0h1n59q2tpn9vfg1lie1au6vr77rd197vc23g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)

As promised, here are **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union:**

1. **LIE:** The most jobs ever created under a president.

**Fact:** Under Biden's poor economy, more people are working two jobs. It was people going back to work after the lockdowns that caused the rise in jobs.

2. **LIE:** Unemployment is at its lowest rate in 50 years.

**Fact:** They manipulated unemployment statistics by no longer tracking young, healthy men who gave up looking for work and removed themselves from the workforce.

3. **LIE:** Inflation is falling.

**Fact:** Inflation statistics don't often include everyday items like groceries and energy bills.

4. **LIE:** The COVID vaccine saved millions of lives.

**Fact:** Countries that didn't force the vaccine on their citizens are doing just as well, if not better, than those that did.

5. **LIE:** The pandemic caused a spike in crime.

**Fact:** Antifa and BLM radicals destroyed cities and police departments while Democratic mayors encouraged the madness.

[_**Click here to END Government and Media corruption >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z42edrqfl8q83ahvhauikmgs5c4q94gqo7ncri4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)

6. **LIE:** Biden is cracking down on the border and border security.

**Fact:** We are seeing more illegal immigrants crossing the border now than ever under President Trump.

7. **LIE:** Biden thinks bipartisanship is important.

**Fact:** The country is more divisive than ever since Biden enacted his policies for the vaccine mandates, energy and ESG, and radical trans ideology.

8. **LIE:** The attack on Paul Pelosi was Trump's fault.

**Fact:** His attacker was a crazy, drugged-out nudist living in San Francisco.

9. **LIE:** Hate and extremism are coming from the right and Republicans,

**Fact:** Biden and the Democrats fueled radical Antifa to burn down cities -- and I'd call that a show of hate and extremism.

10. **LIE:** Debt decreased by $1.7 trillion in two years.

**Fact:** According to the U.S. Treasury, during Biden's first two years in office -- Jan. 20, 2021, through Jan. 20, 2023 -- the federal debt increased by approximately $3.7 trillion.

[_**Help hold the media accountable for their corruption with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount.**__**Click HERE**_ _**to send a gift >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znfcisrkm5fchit8jc0lntalovuegbv1b0i5eeeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)

And there were more lies than I could keep track of in the rest of Biden's speech, friend.

**It 's outrageous to see how the radical Left media perpetuates government corruption!**

Unfortunately, many people believe Biden and these lies while he continues to further hate, corruption, and division.

That's why MRC's mission to expose corruption and hold those accountable is so important. **Can you help us reach our goal by clicking any link below to help reach our goal of $10,000 this weekend?**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbumc8o0khlsv3uk7e7jb6d6q2bp4siu2dav45b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z30u0p720dkuj6cmiir7pob0fu6jue18ghbln450_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2f82sq4pbueprsdspl3ane3vpmle4vc5j8gnoso_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqb2jt7hhenr7e9flbcm7g9hq9jct0b7gpsi5jrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsjcgfq3f20feopjott2qeotn4rrto2jgdfjkm58_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z54m9a3ib8gebcrgesb514tknf78nb28a252hcr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zckg7f6vfdusrh4h2ejs75ultqgc4p5ftkdfcdtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)

[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkjceh9tn34u126l5j3acmm4r2jvv70vo9lqrvog_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9p30clh2bs)

Founder and President of MRC

name: Jenn McClellan
subject: What this historic campaign means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
And so many across the Commonwealth

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58542096/391439599/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmFlOGM4Ny02OGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uIeUVCV2CLDBA7BZQytU8cMK49jxFpb4U1wp0FhvSOY=&emci=c44e96ee-35a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f6ae8c87-68a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | My name is Jenn McClellan. **I am a Black woman, working mom, an 18-year state legislator, and the Democratic nominee for Virginia’s 4th Congressional District.** Our special election campaign is a chance to make history — _no Black woman has ever represented Virginia in the United States Congress._ As a Black woman, I bring a whole new perspective that has not had a voice in the Virginia delegation. And I’ll be honest with you, that perspective has been long underrepresented in Congress. When it comes to the issues, from voting to health care access to equality under the law, I will put my experience as a legislator and unique personal perspective to work and get results for you and your family. **[_With our election weeks away and early voting already underway, it’s critical that Fourth District voters hear our message. name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4t0pqf71via6trk8r7n6d4rs7r0r7ava4d6fb9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9pr4c3h2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb5cjjb3aivv3tg9j2g4fmhc0r7qcanjoorclldo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9pr4c3h2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za7cioubeac5olp0idel2eri7c7ka0gc10778poo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9pr4c3h2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z41iab6lqpi40b6brncfuc64qkd8ecdlo3im9d9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9pr4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt0f42jpqei28133ilo5kd23mfg2c6cg8q9t8q2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9pr4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zckko5i1nj9gik7s4kipee925effdnl3bh340tto_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9pr4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6do013d5ifrv8o484d6rpdetp15l16ulsjjgo4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9pr4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3rdupahdii5glv4nphaebpcatj953j7boppprig_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9pr4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9bk9d5g8via3rni0kqrkfm7v8223gb98q9cspfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9pr4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zssrrb8ju2qm3b4l39brdvpdb0hicmk4goiiftpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1gm9pr4c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President

The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better. It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America. I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did: " You're going to relegate my history to a month? Black history is American history. " My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities. To teach true American history -- and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month. BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . . . . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books. . . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University. That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history: BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. Advocating for School Choice. 2. Promoting criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities. 3. Championing entrepreneurship and free enterprise. 4. Developing history programs that will inspire minority children. Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities. Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. | | | Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Pro-life hero David Daleiden needs your help
body:
David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the pric
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the price of aborted baby body parts,exposing their evil to the world. _Now he’s being charged with 9 felonies for his heroism._[**Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjt2jc72lsph1rakfd5eo85684j9cmtaipmu7hu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1im8o34slh2bs) You might remember David Daleiden as the citizen journalist who recorded and released shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives back in 2015.But far from the abortion executives being held accountable for their crimes, _David_ is the one now facing nine bogus felonies and federal prison time. And it gets even worse, because after David released his appalling footage, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David...I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces years in a state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. All while Kamala Harris is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency.That's the bad news.But here's the good news... we’re still fighting for David.The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit law firm spearheading and underwriting David’s criminal defense. **_Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back._** After significant delays, including multiple appeals to the California Supreme Court, David’s criminal trial will begin in just a few months. That trial, which itself could last up to two months, will be very costly. We’ve brought on board several legal all-stars to assist our Thomas More Society team in defending David. You see, we’ve retained the three-term former District Attorney of Los Angeles and several of his most skilled lieutenants. Bringing these experienced California criminal practitioners with our best attorneys means David will have the best criminal defense team possible to defend him in San Francisco, possibly the most hostile environment in the country for pro-lifers. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $35 or more to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsa9sk0mh1k34jeapiha611dsrikpsv9cr8q1vmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1im8o34slh2bs) The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini."You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment.And you couldn't be there with David when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal.But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do.[**You can make a donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbllchdd22ad3di91f54dmce7v62fsf935fnf6u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1im8o34slh2bs) I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach.But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in pro-life courage.Now I'll get right down to it... In addition to this criminal case, and a federal civil rights countersuit, we're currently representing David in two other monster cases. Planned Parenthood sued David civilly in federal court in San Francisco. In that case, after a series of hostile rulings from an Obama-appointed district judge with ties to the local Planned Parenthood, we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with that judge's order banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The National Abortion Federation also sued David in the same court, in front of the same judge, for a "gag order" injunction that prohibits David from releasing blockbuster video from its two annual abortion industry conferences. David and his team collected hundreds of hours of videos of abortionists at their worst, but all of it remains under injunction. After a tough decision in front of a Ninth Circuit panel, **we’re now taking this all the way to the Supreme Court.** It's not all bad news though.Recently we scored a victory in a University of Washington (UW) case, where abortionists and their allies had sued David Daleiden and the UW over David’s public records requests for documents relating to the UW’s taxpayer-funded “clearinghouse” for aborted babies’ tissue and organs. **The Thomas More Society secured a settlement of this lawsuit** , clearing the way to end a six-year legal battle that included an astonishing three appeals to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. That settlement won nearly everything that David Daleiden was seeking from the UW: **_thousands of pages of new documents on the buying and selling of aborted babies’ tissue and organs_** , including the key job titles and corporate information needed to track which companies and entities are buying and selling those baby parts, and for how much. Victories like this are why we continue to fight for David and the unborn, but the burden of these cases against David are heavy.That's why David needs your financial support today. [**And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z03arm68qe34oeteegc1n1gjlpagvh5rrehotd68_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1im8o34slh2bs) I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence.So, I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can.This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." **It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished**. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over **12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured.** Since that time, over half the states in the country have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding, and _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David.They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. [**So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrrmlpg0tnfs4nthohqelss3gi6j9ajnuijmr0lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1im8o34slh2bs) I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? [**David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeh9qoqbs14b67crbsdmhm868fgtiggpe14df9oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1im8o34slh2bs)
---
[**DONATE
**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za4i3v0t99qlqufaavck8l0ppnubg7r734186hl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1im8o34slh2bs)

---
[_Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation._](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1udmrvkagbsfb6gjrq31mlcjvjj9eaplolaou0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1im8o34slh2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztjv53igsuf0aslc9g0389pt9kmn7di39bgru34g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1im8o34slh2bs)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Joe Biden brought the fire 🔥🔥 in Florida yesterday, showing that the energy he brought to the State of the Union speech on Tuesday wasn’t just for the big stage. He brings that spirit to all of his work for us, and we can get another four years of it if we keep standing with him.
body:
Biden on 🔥🔥 in Florida
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2bfa2b5c-b0a5-4240-b79e-48f31baf2691/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **UPDATE:**_Joe Biden was at the University of Tampa yesterday--right in the faces of Ron DeSantis and Rick Scott in their home state--where he showed that none of the fire that he had during the State of the Union had been extinguished one bit: _ **_" I know a lot of Republicans, their dream is to cut Social Security and Medicare. Let me say this, if that's your dream, I'm your nightmare" \- President Joe Biden._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a1d0b35-fef4-441f-adee-9220aa40cf75/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _On the priorities & policies we care about, President Biden has been unbelievable. To the commentariat in mainstream media--who care only for performance, often to our great detriment--he was unparalleled in his State of the Union, and everything he’s said since. To the whining, slithering snakes of the GOP, he was unbowed._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3204ca0f-6293-4b0d-ba79-7c8ea511ffe1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**President Biden rightfully bragged this Tuesday about the 500,000+ jobs he created in January, lowest unemployment since before we walked on the Moon. He called for a national abortion rights guarantee for a ban on all assault weapons. But it's how he did it that was even better.**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb700f35c-4c8a-4a43-8018-4ceec1a6a2db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_He brought both strength and humility, humor and purpose, and Republicans had no idea whether to stand and clap, sit on their hands or scream "liar" as Marjorie Taylor Greene did. The President handled that brilliantly, chuckling and telling her and her cohort of kooks he had the proof if they wanted to see it._** Former GOP Rep. Kinzinger, one of 10 Republicans who stood up to Trump to vote for impeachment, knew what he was seeing: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea68bd37-bdc6-401b-8582-bdb7fbceb79e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **The President even suckered Republicans into publicly booing the idea of cutting Social Security, and then with a smile said he was glad there was "unity" on that topic, which will be news to Mitch McConnell, Lindsay Graham and Rick Scott. ** _**President Biden was everything we elected and fought for. Now we need to get him reelected in what will be an election matching the importance of 2020, Lincoln's win in 1860 or FDR in 1932. All three had to fight right-wing, democracy assaulting tyrants of their time, but we don't yet know how Joe Biden's story--and, hence, ours--will end. We have control over this one though--It's Up To Us.**_ [**_So can you join us in giving the President of the United States--OUR PRESIDENT--$5, $10, $25 or anything you can manage_** ,**_ so we make sure we do not go gently into that good night? That we support President BIden 1000% in this fight._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e901fe7-2904-4554-88e6-54355fb41405/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for defending the right person at a crucial time in our history. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1daa935d-6eb7-4766-a40d-0b1df6187ab0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: Biden on 🔥🔥 in Florida | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, UPDATE:Joe Biden was at the University of Tampa yesterday--right in the faces of Ron DeSantis and Rick Scott in their home state--where he showed that none of the fire that he had during the State of the Union had been extinguished one bit: " I know a lot of Republicans, their dream is to cut Social Security and Medicare. Let me say this, if that's your dream, I'm your nightmare" \- President Joe Biden. On the priorities & policies we care about, President Biden has been unbelievable. To the commentariat in mainstream media--who care only for performance, often to our great detriment--he was unparalleled in his State of the Union, and everything he’s said since. To the whining, slithering snakes of the GOP, he was unbowed. President Biden rightfully bragged this Tuesday about the 500,000+ jobs he created in January, lowest unemployment since before we walked on the Moon. He called for a national abortion rights guarantee for a ban on all assault weapons. But it's how he did it that was even better. | | | | | | | | He brought both strength and humility, humor and purpose, and Republicans had no idea whether to stand and clap, sit on their hands or scream "liar" as Marjorie Taylor Greene did. The President handled that brilliantly, chuckling and telling her and her cohort of kooks he had the proof if they wanted to see it. Former GOP Rep. Kinzinger, one of 10 Republicans who stood up to Trump to vote for impeachment, knew what he was seeing: The President even suckered Republicans into publicly booing the idea of cutting Social Security, and then with a smile said he was glad there was "unity" on that topic, which will be news to Mitch McConnell, Lindsay Graham and Rick Scott. President Biden was everything we elected and fought for. Now we need to get him reelected in what will be an election matching the importance of 2020, Lincoln's win in 1860 or FDR in 1932. All three had to fight right-wing, democracy assaulting tyrants of their time, but we don't yet know how Joe Biden's story--and, hence, ours--will end. We have control over this one though--It's Up To Us. Thank you for defending the right person at a crucial time in our history. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! body:

| | | Fellow conservative,

name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach February's mid-month deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us
reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18883?t=1001&akid=2967%2E346206%2EhRJJ9y ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18883?t=1002&akid=2967%2E346206%2EhRJJ9y ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230210-2967-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2967_346206_hRJJ9y&akid=2967%2E346206%2EhRJJ9y

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
clean_body: Peter, As we approach February's mid-month deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our campaign debt. I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight together. First, I need your help. [ ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a contribution before midnight. Thank you! Charles --- Forwarded message --- Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the democratic process. The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky. Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will win. But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of donations we received, national support never came. [ ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to make a contribution. I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to go. Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m excited to move on to what’s next. Charles Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: Delegate Jazz Lewis
subject: Friends - MD House Majority Whip Jazz Lewis Sent You His Newsletter!
body:
Find out what is coming next & what Delegate Lewis (LD- 24) has been up to!
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
|

Delegate Jazz Lewis Newsletter
Reviewing January & What Is Coming Next in February
News & updates From Delegate Jazz Lewis
---
| 2/10
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
January Highlights What was Majority Whip Jazz Lewis up to in January?
---
| |
---
Flowers HS Mental Health Program
---
| |
---|---
|
Last month, Delegate Lewis met with students from Charles Herbert Flowers High School to talk about the importance of taking care of their mental health as students, finding their way through adulthood, and preparing for graduation.
| |
---
MLK Housing Symposium
---
| |
---|---
|
Delegate Lewis spoke on a panel during the MLK Day Fight for Fair Housing Symposium, which was hosted by the PG Change Makers. During the event, Delegate Lewis lead a discussion about the importance of affordable housing, rent control, the human right to adequate housing, and combatting gentrification.
| |
---
Glenn Dale Xtreme Teens
---
| |
---|---
|
Delegate Lewis also visited the Glenn Dale Community center to play pick-up basketball with local teens from the Prince George's County Department of Parks & Recreation Xtreme Teams program. Delegate Lewis also spoke to them about the various services that his office provides, including a scholarship program.
| |
---
Tele-Townhall
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGq4FFTNqw-R-IzLf0D7AO4pGzinqWe157cH1fnDr1v8grj-qBXv6J3I986rZUr9Nfk62NFEJ5uXnwSZX8U5DsGyOBoFyB2nBl4SnP9gScOfhFFs6enGM03sYTH8dirfB8o18jR5eUtorlav4IrzB2HWTrPZ101Nj2CJC8mZosbX2513tjsbog==&c=sYt8fc10WI7zNiArnLpjCxl7RBcfrb-yz2XNBjw3Rkw3M0dOuFPmFQ==&ch=DROwTlLJTindgubWvBLj6wAhYWb5TJ_Pq643blvKJBg3XYGPfpVnoA==) |
---|---
|
At the end of January, Delegate Lewis hosted a Tele-Townhall meeting where shared information about the 2023 legislative session and answered constituents' questions. The Tele-Townhall meeting was streamed on Facebook live and on the phone.
| |
---
---
| |
---
2023 Legislative Session:
---
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGq4FFTNqw-R-IzLf0D7AO4pGzinqWe157cH1fnDr1v8grj-qBXv6GlR-c5djQVTGTmHpIqaePHO07NHGg7nT5SqceYVpEzCDftxv_n6eG4O8jhnMsgBVCR6eW6bT3mgGMr929-K7enPMKcePJ8dVIf0SC-ipsomGCBx48tRL1gz_kr1KSo94hxdTGMS0TpvwNWio4jhNEPcMdMJwp2cw-sUv3hS5QdcKsRdvs-dPUkf1xWFvxRRrA==&c=sYt8fc10WI7zNiArnLpjCxl7RBcfrb-yz2XNBjw3Rkw3M0dOuFPmFQ==&ch=DROwTlLJTindgubWvBLj6wAhYWb5TJ_Pq643blvKJBg3XYGPfpVnoA==) for a document summarizing the legislative Agenda for Delegate Lewis in Maryland's upcoming legislative session.
---
| |
---
Legislative update:
---
This month Delegate Lewis testified in favor of a bill that allows individuals to deduct amounts paid as union dues (during the taxable year) under the Maryland income tax.
Delegate Lewis also testified in favor of the Hear Our Voices bill, which aims to ensure that members of the public-school community (students, staff/faculty, and parents) are informed of Title IX procedures and support measures put in place to address sexual misconduct in schools.
---
| |
---
Tools for you:
---
If you have casework for the office of Delegate Jazz Lewis. Please fill out the form below.
---
| | [Click here for our form](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGq4FFTNqw-R-IzLf0D7AO4pGzinqWe157cH1fnDr1v8grj-qBXv6GlR-c5djQVTXbLMfuJddg-q8uudyQb9Doe0juT9HSz2IqZpQT1ui0ctnVBjfNQN-RAd-c8z3SY8JODVXYi7qtJciDT9Bh4XAu-bst_QXVOkW483VYA_ynSH3x3WwkZFgjXkcc0cY-XGiYguQKDF24iFpkOnufJ2xPF6jflkivWBteSKXf3SzYl4v9v_45nWhh0H8uw6S_bKnFp76KCNuB-2w_st1JE2Rg==&c=sYt8fc10WI7zNiArnLpjCxl7RBcfrb-yz2XNBjw3Rkw3M0dOuFPmFQ==&ch=DROwTlLJTindgubWvBLj6wAhYWb5TJ_Pq643blvKJBg3XYGPfpVnoA==)
---
One of Delegate Lewis's top priorities is to make our government work for Marylanders. Our casework team is ready to assist constituents with problems relating to the state or county government. We will make every effort to answer in a timely manner.
---
| |
---
Join our Newsletter:
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGq4FFTNqw-R-IzLf0D7AO4pGzinqWe157cH1fnDr1v8grj-qBXv6J3I986rZUr9AozkFA2prXkI9JlHAJTjGsAMAVhyjkmjamPSn7goQvn6EbD7FD3DYDblSNqOCfRtgqyvuaT0NXvJHCBBeNEzHK3ezHLSANpGhVCzHZ_qZDEI5spCS7q8LYUwVQD-fAbCY_5GmNCbiRcpyTMOQqSIJuHbMsB6XMbJ0T5mBPMouEpPfZR7tpeCHj48_rsPdxkM4ISu2JKso7JI3y-IILgDL9XBmgjHAqeoE8HCUUbQgG0HBpZ4DaTrFMhOZF4eTpftW_Jabdjssk0=&c=sYt8fc10WI7zNiArnLpjCxl7RBcfrb-yz2XNBjw3Rkw3M0dOuFPmFQ==&ch=DROwTlLJTindgubWvBLj6wAhYWb5TJ_Pq643blvKJBg3XYGPfpVnoA==) for our email sign up form to share with friends or community members who want to hear the latest news from Delegate Jazz Lewis.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Looking forward to Black History Month What's coming next for Delegate Lewis and District 24?
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Storytime at the Gelarden Local Library in Honor of Black History Month
---
On Saturday February 11th, Delegate Lewis will be reading a book to children and families during story time in honor of Black history month at the Glenarden public library. Story-time will start at 11 am. [Click here for the informational graphic.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGq4FFTNqw-R-IzLf0D7AO4pGzinqWe157cH1fnDr1v8grj-qBXv6J3I986rZUr9EC_gvYzLDtdhuEc7DGo4J-hdL3fqVA7D2VGyTdS1pccvlNTe_bVTJTGyswo_-B2LTco8W0YqAB5b2bBKHijdDmImeifRNxqT_TOTjSvpM8uy36gRZd2Cpr-8b_ghutoA1tFzcoMUp46Y6vSQdM-qXBcriEnmzfJmXhrQb2JGwGH-i4wqfiGhMg==&c=sYt8fc10WI7zNiArnLpjCxl7RBcfrb-yz2XNBjw3Rkw3M0dOuFPmFQ==&ch=DROwTlLJTindgubWvBLj6wAhYWb5TJ_Pq643blvKJBg3XYGPfpVnoA==)
---
| |
---
| Liquor Store License Transfer Hearing & Glenarden meeting
---
On February 21st at 7 pm, Delegate Lewis will speak at the City of Glenarden's public hearing being hosted to discuss the liquor board license transfer. On February 28th at 10 am, Delegate Lewis will testify in opposition to the liquor board hearing. [Click here for the hearing information](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGq4FFTNqw-R-IzLf0D7AO4pGzinqWe157cH1fnDr1v8grj-qBXv6J3I986rZUr9evWNitlNfTBvOy_Yihzr9M2RJWS0hMci2r26WoAYsZRxq-Ax-09LIHkIW4zFE7kOaCgvM5Fec0_XyzWan5JRA9zVIZZu7_kxY10-W8s_fIn4R51EWPfOpRywDthmzEsMUCwhm8WzR9lZ47jhTjveOQ==&c=sYt8fc10WI7zNiArnLpjCxl7RBcfrb-yz2XNBjw3Rkw3M0dOuFPmFQ==&ch=DROwTlLJTindgubWvBLj6wAhYWb5TJ_Pq643blvKJBg3XYGPfpVnoA==).
---
| |
---
| Bowie State University "Discussing Politics and Ethics of DNA Use" Panel
---
On February 22nd, Delegate Lewis will be joining a panel at Bowie State University to discuss the intersections of civil liberties, ethics, and business policy in the use of DNA with BSU Students, as part of BSU's Black History Month programming. [Click here for the full event information](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGq4FFTNqw-R-IzLf0D7AO4pGzinqWe157cH1fnDr1v8grj-qBXv6J3I986rZUr9ky2z76dQkdYOO181b9Xdyv7LQzdzl-xkgHWhscoKhAlkDAhe8hcbrB7T_UvCqY23GlsV8yqocO1ZhnDgeccdX4gYeeFKEn0yiAr-LygJ1b2zn2mb-XyV5A7XBAsmb12x&c=sYt8fc10WI7zNiArnLpjCxl7RBcfrb-yz2XNBjw3Rkw3M0dOuFPmFQ==&ch=DROwTlLJTindgubWvBLj6wAhYWb5TJ_Pq643blvKJBg3XYGPfpVnoA==).
---
| | |
---
| PG Changemakers Black Wealth Matters Discussion
---
On February 28th, 5 pm - 6 pm. Delegate Lewis will join PG Changemakers to discuss methods of to address poverty and to address the racial wealth gap. Email: pgchangemakers@gmail.com for information to join virtual the virtual discussion.
---
| | |
---
| PTA Visits with Delegate Lewis
---
Next month, Delegate Lewis will be joining the Bowie High School PTA meeting on March 21st at 7 pm via Zoom. He will then visit the Perrywood Elementary School PTA Meeting at 6 pm on March 22nd. Delegate Lewis will be discussing the 2023 legislative session and the many ways our schools, students, teachers, and parents, will be impacted.
---
| | |
---
Black History Month Art Exhibition: Black Resistance! Stories from Prince George's County
---
In honor of Black History Month, the Montpelier Arts Center will be featuring an exhibition highlighting stories of black resistance in Prince George's County from the era of enslavement to the Black Lives Matter movement of the present. The exhibition will be available until March 26th. [Click here to register for a free group tour](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGq4FFTNqw-R-IzLf0D7AO4pGzinqWe157cH1fnDr1v8grj-qBXv6J3I986rZUr9eYoOo7fDv06O0qeBtB6qVRtzInwZx9zLA6NVZ4QmDS2X621tx-qeW6qR_3LlvDevmehgUn9pTrEYiOVfbNZfgBBk05TMKa9c52u1MOuekuk=&c=sYt8fc10WI7zNiArnLpjCxl7RBcfrb-yz2XNBjw3Rkw3M0dOuFPmFQ==&ch=DROwTlLJTindgubWvBLj6wAhYWb5TJ_Pq643blvKJBg3XYGPfpVnoA==).
---
| |
---
| |
---

| |
