name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Let’s set the record straight. I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across soci

| |
---
| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

---
| | [PROMISES MADE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8leivtag7eaiar1202f1hc7hjkn0pimoid90240_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imco74cdh2bs)
---
| | [PROMISES KEPT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs5ajtkr0gh12984fkf3aqds02e2gr0h6pg9l7pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imco74cdh2bs)
---
| | [STAND WITH US](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ts0919p5gh86vvhh6i7gr06mf4c9d55qoucrjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imco74cdh2bs)
---

I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing.

Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

**[Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsrdp1u2oej9f5efapf0f9s51jnveto8i7b9f9c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imco74cdh2bs "Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH US](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z19lj8bdi0fcr6eji7rhhkr67bp91e0hu90rnh1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imco74cdh2bs)
---

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House. | | | | | | I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing. Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power. We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed. "Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?" | | Thank you, Speaker Kevin McCarthy | | * | | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Week 5 Recap: More Affordable, Reliable Energy for Every Virginian
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | **More Affordable, Reliable Energy for Every Virginian**
---
| | In the busiest week of session thus far, the House of Delegates successfully completed work on House legislation before Tuesday's Crossover deadline. After many hours of debate on the House floor, we advanced legislation that reflects the priorities of Virginians who sent us to Richmond to make life easier, safer, and more affordable – especially in the realm of energy policy. As a whole, the House passed 598 bills that now head to the Senate for further consideration. Our progress did not stop there. House Republicans approved a comprehensive budget that delivers on our commitment to lowering costs, investing in our students, and enhancing the safety of families across Virginia. While there is more work to be done, we have advanced a budget that every Virginian can be proud of. _Affordable & Reliable Energy_ _ _ A diversified energy portfolio is the best way to keep the lights on while ensuring Virginians are able to pay their bills. Fortunately, House Republicans have passed a variety of bills that aim to lower rates for electric utility customers across Virginia while adding oversight on electric utilities to ensure the reliability of the electric grid and maximize future savings for customers. We also passed legislation that protects Virginians from unfair price hikes if there is a shortfall in offshore wind energy production (HB 1797 - Freitas). The legislation heads to the Senate for further consideration. If Virginia is going to have a low-carbon energy future that is both reliable and affordable, nuclear power must be part of the equation as well. This week, we passed multiple bills that will position Virginia to be a leader in the nuclear energy sector and ensure that we keep the light on for decades to come. Several of these bills embrace the technological benefits of small modular nuclear reactors, which can utilize the unused coalfields in Southwest that were once the powerhouse of Virginia (HB 1780 - O’Quinn, HB 2333 - Marshall). With the passage of these bills, House Republicans are making sure Virginia avoids the bad policies of other states that have struggled with rolling blackouts and skyrocketing energy costs. _ __A Budget for All Virginians_ On Thursday, House Republicans approved a budget (HB 1400, Knight) that is fiscally responsible, invests in key education initiatives, and builds safer communities. The budget incorporates the Governor’s most significant tax cuts to ensure more of your hard-earned money stays in your pockets. It also invests in business-ready sites to make sure Virginia is a hub for jobs and economic development for decades to come. Moreover, it funds a significant overhaul of our workforce development efforts to ensure we have the workforce ready to meet the demands of Virginia’s exciting economic future. In addition, the budget invests in our schools with over a half billion dollars in new funding while ensuring teachers will see net raises of 12 percent over the next two years. The budget also allocates tens of millions of dollars toward making college more affordable. These initiatives are in addition to legislation (HB 2269 - Greenhalgh) that earmarks specific unspent federal dollars for schools to use to combat learning loss.
The budget also delivers on our promise to build safer communities by funding more police, school resource officers, and other resources to prevent crimes. Moreover, it expands on proven initiatives like Operation Ceasefire to curb gun and gang violence in our communities. The budget also includes major investments in meeting our Chesapeake Bay cleanup goals. This includes fully funding our agricultural best management practices goal by supporting an additional $137.1 million for the Water Quality Improvement Fund, as well as additional funding for local storm water improvement projects. The approved House budget now heads to the Senate for further consideration.** ** As legislation moves on to the Senate, I encourage you to track the status of my bills using [this link.](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ee92a87d748b09a1/cbb8fa69097c7febc3d6b838967d376c/37923) If you are interested in following any other legislation in the General Assembly, visit [www.lis.virginia.gov](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ee92a87d748b09a1/ab038da6ff63fe65c3d6b838967d376c/37923). If I can be of assistance to you or you would like to share your position on any of my legislation, please do not hesitate to reach out to me at DelKGreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov or 804-698-1085.
---
| | **My Legislative Updates**
---
| |
---
**HB 2440 Asian American and Pacific Islander Heritage Commission Passed the House** I proudly stand alongside members of the Asian American and Pacific Islander community. My bill seeks to establish an AAPI Heritage Commission that would inform educational standards regarding Asian or Asian American and Pacific Islander contributions, culture, history, heritage, and language.
---
| |
---
| | **HB 2270 Informed Consent Passed the House** My informed consent bill seeks to ensure that a woman is provided with all of the medical information necessary to make an informed decision about abortion prior to undergoing the procedure.
---
| |
---
| | **HB 1387 Fairness in Women's Sports Passed the House** With this bill I am fighting to protect women's rights in sports and their athletic futures by ensuring biological men compete only on men's and coed teams. Check out [this letter to the editor](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ee92a87d748b09a1/20b0d5b571356f89c3d6b838967d376c/37923) published in the Suffolk News-Herald advocating for my bill!
---
| | [| | |
---|---|---](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ee92a87d748b09a1/ade8ffc1956f7455c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "Patient Rights 2023 Delegate Karen Greenhalgh")
| | **HB 1689 Guaranteeing Clergy Visitation During Public Health Emergencies Passed the House** I am proud to carry HB 1689 which will guarantee clergy members are able to visit patients in a hospital or nursing facility during a public health emergency.
---
| | **Meet the Greenhalgh Gang!**
---
| |
---
| | I am grateful to have a wonderful team of people supporting me this legislative session. Thank you Nanette Miller, Communications Manager;Lauren Parker, Legislative Intern; Zachary Sykes, Session Aide; Christopher Flowers, Legislative Intern. Not pictured due to remote status: Emily Nelson, Legislative Aide and Brent Thorton, Legislative Intern.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Your Delegate, Karen **Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh** **House of Delegates** 1-804-698-1085 [karengreenhalgh.com](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ee92a87d748b09a1/5bf2a98620d0b141c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/9206fe5164b4fa85041ad8cde91a9694/37923/c1e1fdff1fcd89fe/178744a2ec7ca92cc3d6b838967d376c/37923")
---
| | | [](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ee92a87d748b09a1/8788679b98aa279dc3d6b838967d376c/37923)| [](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ee92a87d748b09a1/8bc90eba11e15951c3d6b838967d376c/37923)| [](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ee92a87d748b09a1/6a519e0a0d5638a9c3d6b838967d376c/37923)

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Did you feel disrespected by Biden’s speech?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Biden just spent an hour LYING to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can't do this alone. If Biden's speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

---

Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy

Peter, it’s confirmed. **Kathy Hochul is coming for your gas stove**. In her State of the State address, she proposed...
* _Banning all gas appliances and heating for newly constructed small buildings by 2025 and newly built large buildings by 2028. _

* _Prohibiting the sale of gas appliances and heating equipment for single-family homes starting in 2030. _

_What does this mean for you?_** **
No more **gas stoves** , **appliances** , **furnaces** , or **generators** to be sold after 2030. If your furnace or gas stove breaks down, you will have to replace it with a costly electrical one.

subject: Who will be the GOP presidential nominee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
Friend, Donald Trump has officially launched his campaign to take back the White House in 2024, and Ron DeSantis and Mike Pence are expected to run as well.
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58526105/391379736/43106551?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk2238-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjODhkYjM0LTRiYTktZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cQj4-Qcc0Jq90sMqvCUseNXWjhKie9gXrBSpUDvxHek=&emci=4c0626b5-0ea7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6c88db34-4ba9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236)
Friend, Donald Trump has officially launched his campaign to take back the White House in 2024, and Ron DeSantis and Mike Pence are expected to run as well.

**And now, reports are indicating that former South Carolina Governor Nikki Haley will announce her run this month.**

Haley is a former Trump ally and served as U.S. ambassador to the United Nations under him. During her tenure, the U.S. withdrew from the U.N. Human Rights Council and the Iran nuclear deal, which aimed to reduce the prospect of international conflict.
**American Bridge is dedicated to holding Republicans accountable and defeating them, so we must be ready for a fight regardless of who the nominee is. **Democrats need to be ready to defend and protect all the progress we've made under President Biden.
**We're running an exclusive poll among 5,000 of our top Democratic supporters to see what you think, but we haven't heard from you yet, friend. Please, before our official poll closes at midnight, let us know what you think:**

name: Candace Owens
subject: The dark side of Black History Month
body:
Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6p36qjituvgv15jn06elom6vvgnl88s0onhmst0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7sbblu97og63fcb27ch8mi71vfdh516p0i0haj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6qckvrgj4nsa7388emkp4eokk215a0u2srfkhp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z24ssotv4fqhu459hqrotj9r04t9c6j88cmcohho_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq6e4h265nmq7suq6seq6fcb8sn9era007qaa378_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvig438djre8gv47i0rjatdtsn0hic2pteinrfr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqvnpg6ul4a2ntpbsb0sdiahau60rk34adtmfdog_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqsqhbb90j5mdn72p72itti3ltlhphptp2mjgd3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z625dcetgho9pde9d0is4mq175g60tnlas79jp78_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zquu332ibg0nlios0ooovv4fens0bce14k49pai8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztqqhav2co9d0up0o21msmnm3jup5iqmsvft2h0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh6ev3r95ng5n56e6uqom5bunl8bub58u4lbo0d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7672%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=lU8luU9Km%2fD7J14Bpxtg6Q&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78804%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wXH1yjBTSeNegVvTArP%2b6Q&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78815%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9t4SY9I8AkCOlxyhik3uTg&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78804%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wXH1yjBTSeNegVvTArP%2b6Q&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78816%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fEIB%2b8%2f%2f1ZkdtnP%2bzCcmNA&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78804%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wXH1yjBTSeNegVvTArP%2b6Q&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78817%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aWqYt4%2fWCyoSmcMoZHm9eA&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78818%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q28m%2fGYJnqGVBrFhRFPFiQ&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78819%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YH285PCqEHBZddNuZoIStQ&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

body:
Donald Trump’s goose is cooked:
| **BREAKING: Trump’s Troubles Mount as Special Counsel Gets New 2020 Evidence** | [**35,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: URGE THE DOJ TO PROSECUTE TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/prosecute-trump/?source=VPP_20230210_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=6342%2E878179%2EMtUsv5)
---
**FIRST:** Donald Trump REFUSED to accept Pres. Biden’s 2020 victory, and incited the deadly, treasonous January 6th attack on our Capitol.

**THEN:** The heroic January 6th Committee sprang into action to expose Trump and the MAGA mob’s vicious crimes and refer Trump for criminal prosecution.

**_NOW:_** Special Counsel Jack Smith has new damning evidence that could finally bring Trump to justice — _but he’s not going down without a fight!_ **The MAGA GOP has seized control of the House and wants to DESTROY all of the January 6th Committee’s hard work!** [**So we need 35,000 Democrats to sign our petition RIGHT NOW to urge the DOJ to prosecute Trump before it’s too late! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/prosecute-trump/?source=VPP_20230210_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=6342%2E878179%2EMtUsv5) | [**35,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: URGE THE DOJ TO PROSECUTE TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/prosecute-trump/?source=VPP_20230210_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=6342%2E878179%2EMtUsv5)
---
**DEADLINE:_MIDNIGHT_ || GOAL: _35,000 SIGNATURES_**
Thank you,

_Team VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6342%2E878179%2EMtUsv5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6342%2E878179%2EMtUsv5).**

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? _I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2cpanfh347v9puu4gufd5rv2ihg4nej1knkfrbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imaor2c9h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

| | My friend, Joe Biden's State of the Union speech was full of deception and gaslighting. What do you expect from a career politician who has made a living flip-flopping on his ideology and equivocating to the American people? Make no mistake – his speech did not deviate from the duplicitous pattern of his career. **_⇩ Here are just a few of the lies. ⇩_**

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the pric
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the price of aborted baby body parts,exposing their evil to the world. _Now he’s being charged with 9 felonies for his heroism._[**Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn07ctstti38usj3f11lpdgu8vuh5nmdroap1voo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imeoj4c3h2bs) You might remember David Daleiden as the citizen journalist who recorded and released shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives back in 2015.But far from the abortion executives being held accountable for their crimes, _David_ is the one now facing nine bogus felonies and federal prison time. And it gets even worse, because after David released his appalling footage, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David...I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces years in a state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. All while Kamala Harris is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency.That's the bad news.But here's the good news... we’re still fighting for David.The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit law firm spearheading and underwriting David’s criminal defense. **_Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back._** After significant delays, including multiple appeals to the California Supreme Court, David’s criminal trial will begin in just a few months. That trial, which itself could last up to two months, will be very costly. We’ve brought on board several legal all-stars to assist our Thomas More Society team in defending David. You see, we’ve retained the three-term former District Attorney of Los Angeles and several of his most skilled lieutenants. Bringing these experienced California criminal practitioners with our best attorneys means David will have the best criminal defense team possible to defend him in San Francisco, possibly the most hostile environment in the country for pro-lifers. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $35 or more to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm01n7rn7jfos76ss5e8jqctjkm9ik277ibk02k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imeoj4c3h2bs) The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini."You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment.And you couldn't be there with David when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal.But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do.[**You can make a donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2k09cp484qe8kb99p90do0p8l275s3bukc4icno_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imeoj4c3h2bs) I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach.But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in pro-life courage.Now I'll get right down to it... In addition to this criminal case, and a federal civil rights countersuit, we're currently representing David in two other monster cases. Planned Parenthood sued David civilly in federal court in San Francisco. In that case, after a series of hostile rulings from an Obama-appointed district judge with ties to the local Planned Parenthood, we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with that judge's order banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The National Abortion Federation also sued David in the same court, in front of the same judge, for a "gag order" injunction that prohibits David from releasing blockbuster video from its two annual abortion industry conferences. David and his team collected hundreds of hours of videos of abortionists at their worst, but all of it remains under injunction. After a tough decision in front of a Ninth Circuit panel, **we’re now taking this all the way to the Supreme Court.** It's not all bad news though.Recently we scored a victory in a University of Washington (UW) case, where abortionists and their allies had sued David Daleiden and the UW over David’s public records requests for documents relating to the UW’s taxpayer-funded “clearinghouse” for aborted babies’ tissue and organs. **The Thomas More Society secured a settlement of this lawsuit** , clearing the way to end a six-year legal battle that included an astonishing three appeals to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. That settlement won nearly everything that David Daleiden was seeking from the UW: **_thousands of pages of new documents on the buying and selling of aborted babies’ tissue and organs_** , including the key job titles and corporate information needed to track which companies and entities are buying and selling those baby parts, and for how much. Victories like this are why we continue to fight for David and the unborn, but the burden of these cases against David are heavy.That's why David needs your financial support today. [**And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zslpr27f7braad2lfrjtjakpf0b9hieep52neqm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imeoj4c3h2bs) I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence.So, I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can.This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." **It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished**. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over **12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured.** Since that time, over half the states in the country have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding, and _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David.They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. [**So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0v59imb3qr3va76gll8phfo97pisnam49dp60c8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imeoj4c3h2bs) I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? [**David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3oc0n8k6h9hh5fq8k93cdg8ueom7bphhlcanp5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c1imeoj4c3h2bs)
---

---

The Thomas More Society secured a settlement of this lawsuit , clearing the way to end a six-year legal battle that included an astonishing three appeals to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. That settlement won nearly everything that David Daleiden was seeking from the UW: thousands of pages of new documents on the buying and selling of aborted babies’ tissue and organs , including the key job titles and corporate information needed to track which companies and entities are buying and selling those baby parts, and for how much. Victories like this are why we continue to fight for David and the unborn, but the burden of these cases against David are heavy.That's why David needs your financial support today. I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence.So, I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can.This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, over half the states in the country have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding, and Roe v. Wade has been overturned. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David.They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. | | May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? | | | © Thomas More Society | 309 W. Andy's administration has been investing heavily in Kentucky's infrastructure — rebuilding our Commonwealth and creating jobs along the way. Peter — Andy's approval rating is amongst the top in the nation. In fact, he is America's most popular Democratic governor! And with the things he's been able to accomplish in his first three years, **it's no wonder why.**

**Investing in Kentucky's infrastructure has been a priority for Andy. Here are _just a few_ of the big projects he's helped lead:** 💧 Over $412 MILLION for clean drinking water and water systems for thousands of Kentuckians as a part of Andy's Cleaner Water Program.

🖥 High-speed reliable internet for over 34,000 families and businesses, with millions more in internet investments to come, following Andy's Better Internet Listening Tour.

🔋 The **largest economic development project in Kentucky history** , kicking off the $5.8 billion BlueOval SK Battery Park in Hardin County. Andy's administration has been investing heavily in Kentucky's infrastructure — rebuilding our Commonwealth and creating a record number of jobs along the way.

As Andy would say, _**"You ain’t seen nothing yet!"**_ We can keep this progress for Kentucky going, but Andy needs your help.

body:

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Exposing the reality of collusion
body:
During a Congressional hearing conducted by the House Oversight Committee yesterday, it was disclosed that Twitter and Facebook executives and employees have been **colluding with officials** from the National Association of Secretaries of State (NASS), Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) and the National Association of State Election Directors (NASED) to specifically target, ban, and **censor accounts** on various social media sites in a collaborative manner. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FHMlI4W892B5CImIN9wovNKfQ%2Fvc7ahws7JRQzW4TSk2Z42Q/1/010001863bea396e-71fd5600-3f3d-4baf-9a39-ec1dd457281f-000000/9eJBH2PJoL8hM3BXsLJKAYqgUhs=308) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FHMlI4W892B5CImIN9wovNKfQ%2Fvc7ahws7JRQzW4TSk2Z42Q/2/010001863bea396e-71fd5600-3f3d-4baf-9a39-ec1dd457281f-000000/Cr3WUjgfNTwaPaw6q10hrZm-Skc=308) Dear Friend,

Democrats were quick to jump on accusations of **" collusion and Russian election interference"** when it suited their purpose against President Trump.

Now, they are putting their head in the sand because they have been **CAUGHT RED-HANDED** colluding with Big Tech to interfere with our elections!

During a Congressional hearing conducted by the House Oversight Committee yesterday, it was disclosed that Twitter and Facebook executives and employees have been **colluding with officials** from the National Association of Secretaries of State (NASS), Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) and the National Association of State Election Directors (NASED) to specifically target, ban, and **censor accounts** on various social media sites in a collaborative manner.

And if it's not already obvious, the players from NASS and CISA were government officials who oversee our elections. CISA falls under the Department of Homeland Security, and in November of 2022, they went on the record saying they're taking a "hands off" approach to what they call "election-related disinformation." Well... obviously not.

Congresswoman Anna Paulina Luna questioned Twitter employee Yoel Roth, the former head of **Twitter Trust and Safety**. "Trust and Safety" is the Orwellian term for **censorship.**

Roth has been caught using the **private cloud server, Jira** , to collude with Facebook executives and government officials.

When Roth was directly asked if he communicated with a private entity and government agencies on a private cloud server, he responded, "I don't believe I can give you a yes or no."

Ironically, Roth's communication was printed and displayed right behind Luna's shoulder on an exhibit she then entered as a form of evidence into the Congressional hearing.

In my RICO case against Twitter, Jack Dorsey, Facebook, Mark Zuckerberg, P&G, and entities within the FBI and United States government, this was my ENTIRE argument. As I have been arguing since 2018: THESE BIG TECH TYRANTS ARE STATE ACTORS. And now, I'm thrilled to see members of the United State Congress finally agree with my argument, and show evidence of this state actor collusion in official government hearings.

**Put simply, these joint state actors engaged in blatantly ILLEGAL conduct to directly interfere with state and federal elections in the United States of America!**

If we want to talk about collusion to interfere with elections, it has always been between our own government, Big Tech, the FBI, and the media!

My case has taken on so much more importance now that ABSOLUTELY EVERYTHING I have been saying for the last 6 years is being admitted in Congressional hearings. Despite the fact that Big Tech's deplatforming of me and their illegal election interference and deliberate censorship of both of my Congressional campaigns has destroyed my livelihood, destroyed my business, and has severely damaged my reputation through years of defamation, I have never given up in my fight to **expose the TRUTH** and expose Big Tech censorship and Big Tech election interference.

[**But, I need your continued support so I can keep going.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FHMlI4W892B5CImIN9wovNKfQ%2Fvc7ahws7JRQzW4TSk2Z42Q/3/010001863bea396e-71fd5600-3f3d-4baf-9a39-ec1dd457281f-000000/CveiDLHKgNyvb1J4cfHQMv0Dkak=308)

My legal team and I were just notified this week that Twitter has switched legal teams to bring on board Meryl Conant Governski of Willkie Farr & Gallagher who has direct ties to CNN. This woman who Twitter and Jack Dorsey have retained to fight me in my RICO case was a member of CNN's public relations team.

Obviously, Twitter and Jack Dorsey have retained an expensive CNN affiliated lawyer with experience in public relations given the things that I have been exposing are not only illegal, but they are a public relations NIGHTMARE for Big Tech and their executives. And, that is why they will do all they can to **BURY me in litigation** and bleed me dry of resources. If they lose, the legal consequences for them are massive, and they know it.

So please, [**donate as much as you can today to help me fight back!**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FHMlI4W892B5CImIN9wovNKfQ%2Fvc7ahws7JRQzW4TSk2Z42Q/4/010001863bea396e-71fd5600-3f3d-4baf-9a39-ec1dd457281f-000000/9QDEHkd_wy-A43H3tKbWavQltTA=308)

Thanks so much for all that you do!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
| (C) 2023 Illoominate Media, 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

**To opt-out of marketing emails like these, please unsubscribe below.

Peter, it’s no secret -- DeJoy is a Republican mega-donor.
I’ve watched him completely harm the USPS during his tenure.
I’ve grilled him in front of my committee, _[**twice.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58534901/391412684/1634307625?source=20230210_em_pet_b1_raja_30_op_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWRmYTljNC01N2E5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DOLv_68gqqJGvoU2H5CO8Z5COiZO2da7lyp_a07wQTE=&emci=b15f0030-90a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a5dfa9c4-57a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)_

[**And I won’t stop until we oust him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58534902/391412685/1634307625?source=20230210_em_pet_b1_raja_30_op_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWRmYTljNC01N2E5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DOLv_68gqqJGvoU2H5CO8Z5COiZO2da7lyp_a07wQTE=&emci=b15f0030-90a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a5dfa9c4-57a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)
[_**I need 1,000 signatures before midnight: Will you sign your name and say you support firing DeJoy? I want to show that we have a massive wave of grassroots support. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58534903/391412686/1634307625?source=20230210_em_pet_b1_raja_30_op_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWRmYTljNC01N2E5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DOLv_68gqqJGvoU2H5CO8Z5COiZO2da7lyp_a07wQTE=&emci=b15f0030-90a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a5dfa9c4-57a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)
Thank you,
Raja

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel?=
subject: The Moran Minuteman
disclaimer_text: paid for by Nathaniel Moran for Congress
body:
When I think of East Texans, I think of the Minutemen of the Revolutionary War. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nathanielmoran/minuteman-feb10?e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Welcome to the first edition of **The Moran Minuteman**.
This monthly newsletter will be our way of recognizing extraordinary efforts in Texas Congressional District 1 and providing an inside look into what happens behind the scenes in the life of a Congressman. I want to say again how much I appreciate your prayers and support.**I am honored to have the opportunity to serve my fellow East Texans in Washington, DC.**
---
|
## Who are the Minutemen? You are.
When I think of East Texans, I think of the [Minutemen of the Revolutionary War](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=52418949bc&e=bbce4dd6ad). Loyal to country and community, dependable, selfless, and ready at a moment’s notice, the Minutemen were American heroes who helped turn the tide of the Revolutionary War. **Today’s East Texans reflect those traits.** You are patriotic, dependable, and deeply committed to making our communities better.
---
|
---
By Gwillhickers: Image obtained from hi-res scan of US Postage stamp from personal collection.., [Public Domain](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=e4202debad&e=bbce4dd6ad)
| **Each month, I plan to recognize an East Texan who has gone above and beyond in serving our region** \- someone who epitomizes the identity of a Minuteman. In addition to recognition in the monthly newsletter, we will send the person a Moran Minuteman t-shirt. Do you know an East Texan who would be a great first recipient? Please submit their name **[here](mailto:vote@nathanielmoran.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20nominate%20a%20Minuteman!).**

Our Moran Minuteman team will also be out and about serving at community events and in disaster relief efforts. Look for us, and we’ll toss you a t-shirt!
---
|
---
| [Nominate a Minuteman!](mailto:vote@nathanielmoran.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20nominate%20a%20Minuteman! "Nominate a Minuteman!")
---
|
---
|
## SOTU: Disappointed, but not surprised
President Biden's State of the Union address this week left much to be desired. I was disappointed that President Biden refused to acknowledge **the path he has taken our nation on is the wrong one.** We know the picture he is attempting to paint, but the American people know better.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
## Rooting for Mahomes in the Super Bowl
Before Patrick Mahomes became the quarterback of the Kansas City Chiefs, he was a star quarterback of the Whitehouse Wildcats and then went on to Texas Tech. **As a former Whitehouse** **quarterback** and Texas Tech alum myself, I just want to say we are very proud of this young man and wish him the best of luck this Super Bowl Sunday. **GO CHIEFS!**
---
|
---
|
## Delivering on Promises
Out on the campaign trail, I heard over and over that **we must secure our border**. I agree 100%. That is why **one of my first pieces of legislation as Congressman** is the [**Border Security Investment Act**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=9317931886&e=bbce4dd6ad), which would place a transaction fee on certain money transfers sent from the United States to one of the top five countries of origin for illegal immigration. The collected revenue would then be placed in two trusts, the first to fund border security efforts - such as Border Patrol salaries, surveillance technology, and the border wall - and the second to **reimburse states that have been required to fund their own border security due to the failures of the Biden Administration**.

For those who like a little more "behind the scenes" content, tune into KTBB radio station for a weekly update from me about what's going on in D.C. Here's the segment from last week.
---
| [ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=f34cb2d174&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| Thank you again for your continued support. I will be forever grateful for the opportunity to serve **the best region in the best state in the best nation in the world**.
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Nathaniel Moran Congressman, First District of Texas
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: re: Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend -- Can I be blunt?

From the moment Republicans took back control of the House of Representatives, key members of their party have been _adamant_ about wanting to cut Social Security.

**Yes, you read that correctly -- Republicans are planning to cut the program that _tens of millions_ of Americans are counting on for their retirement after paying into it for _decades._**

Cutting Social Security would be _devastating_ for working families across America -- so we need to act quickly to stop those cuts.

That's why the DSCC and I put together an emergency petition to stand up to House Republicans and show exactly how strong support for Social Security really is, **but I'm still missing your signature.**

| **Email:[ DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM](https://go.dscc.org/go/11900?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230210-ChuckSchumer-jtk2741-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230210-ChuckSchumer-jtk2741-Pros-sl1&akid=9745%2E9716520%2E9c9fof)**
---
**Representing: PENNSYLVANIA**
**Petition Status: INCOMPLETE**

| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://go.dscc.org/go/11900?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230210-ChuckSchumer-jtk2741-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230210-ChuckSchumer-jtk2741-Pros-sl1&akid=9745%2E9716520%2E9c9fof)
---

We need at least 250,000 signatures on this petition before midnight to show Kevin McCarthy that Americans will _not_ stand for cuts to Social Security, and I'm counting on your name to be one of the 250,000. **So I have to ask:**

**[Please, will you take a stand now and sign our petition to oppose House Republicans' cuts to Social Security?](https://go.dscc.org/go/11900?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230210-ChuckSchumer-jtk2741-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230210-ChuckSchumer-jtk2741-Pros-sl1&akid=9745%2E9716520%2E9c9fof)**

Thanks,

Chuck

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11900?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230210-ChuckSchumer-jtk2741-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230210-ChuckSchumer-jtk2741-Pros-sl1&akid=9745%2E9716520%2E9c9fof)
| |

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: update@kirstengillibrand.com
subject: the GOP is officially targeting Kirsten's seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Urgent update out of New York, friend:
**After our potential right-wing opponent, Lee Zeldin, attacked Kirsten Gillibrand directly on Twitter last month, he's now saying that running to defeat her in 2024 would be an _"epic clash."_**
Zeldin nearly won New York's governor race in November, all while New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in _two decades_ — flipping enough House seats red to retake the majority. **Now, the GOP is targeting Kirsten for defeat to turn New York red and deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell.**
**Kirsten is fighting back with everything she's got, but she doesn't take a cent from corporate PACs, which means she's relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you. That's why it's critical to reach our $25,000 rapid-response goal by midnight, but we're still WAY short.**

name: Giffords
subject: Imagine...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A future without gun violence is within our reach. But not without you.
#

Friends -
Imagine a future free from gun violence.
Just imagine it.
A future where we have universal background checks.
A future where weapons of war are no longer flowing onto our streets.
A future where our kids feel safe to go to school. Where we feel safe to go to our supermarkets, our places of worship, our movie theaters, or our night clubs without fear.
This future is within our reach. But we can’t get there without the support of people like you.
We have obstacles in our way. We have a divided Senate and a Republican majority in the House. We have the gun lobby, who spends millions of dollars and uses fear-mongering tactics to push their “guns everywhere” agenda.
We need the resources to fight back, and that starts with the donations from people like you to emails like these.
[**So please, make a contribution of $3 or any amount you can today to Giffords and help us keep up our work to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230210-1-30&t=1&akid=4246%2E3935704%2EqQfftn)

| | Peter,

You can look around and see for yourself that GOP leadership is already a disaster for the country. Over these past few weeks, they have _all_ shown their true colors.

**McCarthy failed FOURTEEN TIMES to become Speaker of the House,** stalling all House business for days and making closed door deals with MAGA extremists like Matt Gaetz and Georgia’s Marjorie Taylor Greene.

**MAGA hostage McCarthy then made good on those deals by removing me from the House Intelligence Committee,** an act of pure vengeance.

**Meanwhile, he put MAGA extremists, including Marjorie Taylor Greene, on some of the most important committees in Congress.**

**_And NOW, the GOP is threatening a debt ceiling showdown that could create utter chaos for our economy._**

Make no mistake, **these people are content to burn it all down if it means they’ll stay in power.** And if just this past month is any indication of what they’re capable of, bets are off with what they’ll try to pull next. That’s why I’m so committed to holding them accountable, no matter the cost.

[**_So here’s what we have to do: We have less than 24 hours left until our $10,000 rapid response goal, and we need all hands on deck. clean_body: | | | Peter, You can look around and see for yourself that GOP leadership is already a disaster for the country. Over these past few weeks, they have all shown their true colors. McCarthy failed FOURTEEN TIMES to become Speaker of the House, stalling all House business for days and making closed door deals with MAGA extremists like Matt Gaetz and Georgia’s Marjorie Taylor Greene. MAGA hostage McCarthy then made good on those deals by removing me from the House Intelligence Committee, an act of pure vengeance. Meanwhile, he put MAGA extremists, including Marjorie Taylor Greene, on some of the most important committees in Congress. And NOW, the GOP is threatening a debt ceiling showdown that could create utter chaos for our economy. Make no mistake, these people are content to burn it all down if it means they’ll stay in power. And if just this past month is any indication of what they’re capable of, bets are off with what they’ll try to pull next. That’s why I’m so committed to holding them accountable, no matter the cost. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for standing strong, Eric | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

body:
Sherrod Brown is running for re-election in 2024, and expert analysts at Sabato's Crystal Ball and The Cook Political Report have officially rated Ohio a "toss-up."
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58536472/391418988/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjNjODRmOC01YmE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KbvwGGIm32NCFPkLQXgyKknQTXEcz21GvZooYQcF_3w=) | Team,

Sherrod Brown is running for re-election in 2024, and expert analysts at _Sabato's Crystal Ball_ and _The Cook Political Report_ have officially rated his race a **"toss-up."**

If you're ready to defend the Democratic Senate Majority, **[split a donation between the Ohio Democratic Party and Sherrod Brown's re-election campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58536473/391418989/933181493?refcode=em23_230210_sherro_fndt_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230210_sherro_fndt_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjNjODRmOC01YmE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KbvwGGIm32NCFPkLQXgyKknQTXEcz21GvZooYQcF_3w=)**

Here's why protecting Sherrod's seat is so crucial:

National Republicans know that the Senate majority could come down to Ohio. They've already named Sherrod's seat as one of their top targets in 2024, and multimillionaire State Senator Matt Dolan recently became the first Republican to enter the race.

Here's the bottom line: This "toss-up" race is a must-win for Ohio Democrats. And Sherrod has a proven track record of delivering results for Ohio workers – we can't afford to lose his voice in the Senate.

**But multimillionaire Matt has the resources to fund his campaign, which means that our team is in for an expensive election cycle. And since National Republicans have already made Sherrod a top target, he needs our help to fight back.**

body:

---
[](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfsziR8mcAUOfgq0P5zhAedpsZP7lrCAkCuTBVwMnIruP4V1i4nKXGnlSMRAsCpEcW8YBs7uMUob2mi1HxCIn1AQ-3Dx8NO_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6xtsxUAHNALE1w9URw-2BjNr3EKClVGBVZk4Off8YX9aD9GZYtWL162PSWTsGEOsA17BNUldeQKi5hsEdknTebofBtQOS0JjcLWnPyoc-2FaFIOFwaKGHI4IUoKFD3xRmQauKRsi0HZlnAgWaONI-2BPU149XVyZVMQGAV-2FzUHDUBtBZG7AABBJAgg60G7eSMIxxKNNpeYPD5EMN5skZGakL3ey7Z9tE8XM02i-2BpY1192bRvVDB8g4XC5aABypH2ML79010RdUZP-2BQtM7MXFh-2FikD8ijeEcEbSVJHlmNx6piWmFPEwGbFHknr5sSm647Xmr0-2BvwUNiSi-2FuHo3DAAyDXgW2-2Bz74kPZUVwyF6VoCbRQC50p-2B07FMHgnM1raCHXUrgc0gsP1N5MiLf5oJBqjbJ6XM7-2FmTgYZqWHQREz-2BDkY9i0EgVWuy9mFSNb0AD2robTjsNtLNOgLeCFRDiABvxflvFfg8y-2BzCq09uAcmHyWG9-2FGuKUh2WcM4QKC5SqRqVYCLH1LE9HX6w3gvdX77VQ7ETRX0Ih2zMla-2FIcwv3DQ7rwlIhEcNxtc0l7n8PbRkQ9wY9g5pmIZryQDhUodt1Gkgs3AlgFq4unMek9wJdqL5qJK8QR0pnhC3UvV4WFKWzEJTvD3H3cgm6xiGvag2yTZuqnFRNUlW7gnxc3ItpTnh0Oouo-2F32h2MpRTuM9kcvP48mJOtn-2FNCpW47O-2BY7-2FDhgqLQ6Gpbs81TbzmuHlrNhYq-2FNzfr8igbFcdQ6N5bZ9b7hGSzi6-2BehbHQvdmhH87LSTk7aQZkEY-2BlZeLynSEDoPKNlq53lYJGK-2FJSfCd7ktnFpJx8Iid5GRrzej5xxWlvzyCO0Tw-3D-3D)
---
---
Friend, this is exciting news!

House Republicans have passed a bill to end the Covid vaccine mandates.

During my campaign, we FOUGHT to END these ridiculous mandates. And now that I am YOUR Congresswoman, one of my first orders of business was to support this bill.

Now you will no longer be forced to receive the vaccine in order to serve in the military, work as a nurse, or be employed at 1,000 different companies.

While the bill still needs to be approved by the Senate and signed into law, _this is a significant step in the right direction for YOUR personal freedom and choice._

The fight to get here has been long, and it is heartening to see that our efforts are finally paying off. I will continue to keep you updated on the progress of this bill, and any other important developments related to Covid and vaccine mandates.

You elected me to FIGHT to END the mandates and now we are that we have passed this bill, I have one final question...

clean_body: | | | | Do you support this bill? Friend, this is exciting news! House Republicans have passed a bill to end the Covid vaccine mandates. During my campaign, we FOUGHT to END these ridiculous mandates. And now that I am YOUR Congresswoman, one of my first orders of business was to support this bill. Now you will no longer be forced to receive the vaccine in order to serve in the military, work as a nurse, or be employed at 1,000 different companies. While the bill still needs to be approved by the Senate and signed into law, this is a significant step in the right direction for YOUR personal freedom and choice. The fight to get here has been long, and it is heartening to see that our efforts are finally paying off. I will continue to keep you updated on the progress of this bill, and any other important developments related to Covid and vaccine mandates. You elected me to FIGHT to END the mandates and now we are that we have passed this bill, I have one final question... | | Thank you, Harriet Hageman | | | | |

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: My next frontier, space! 🚀
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1O0h2JaHl7tRYUhm4MABKnE6Zi1fFwuletjKz3MjDU11c2RwhADZ_AcHOOcuYc_rL3-E2boJhsm4Fag6JSPNwg9aoScaMcotxzy3jB-bJBGBWEV4Dl9qxzGdq52Gldc1-cvvefe5obli2sKWMqk0NklSe-9EkQ2kM3SY7mjJ8mYqSCoVgOMP3Dfhd36pXJtcGm-t_oYFUpKjICpy2Fqly5KVHKNjyksD61x2vk83TnMTx2D93BRsFxTpAO2gLFGp-faOtDYejhszUTJDbKLSmPGSHA-KrNPomIbpYI3jfTcIgLPbllG85YF_BfNWz6E8Y2uFfJ-BwfWrQQr7t7tM2zNiVbTt3jiRP4Jbb2HJtVvQ/3tl/Ht7Hwn42ROizMiYRYf1DrQ/h0/eIbNbAhK9Tuy_nqPP5Lu1lGcECWyUsB3vNgkzYv3wx0)

Hi Peter, **I have an _astronomic_ update from Washington. I was just named the ranking Democrat on the Subcommittee on Space and Aeronautics!** This is a key posting within the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology. As the top Democrat on this subcommittee, I'll be helping direct our policy on all things related to space research and development -- including overseeing NASA! 🚀 I'm humbled that my peers trusted me for this leadership role. One area I'm eager to work on is bolstering our nation’s satellites system to improve our forecasts and severe weather models. As an expert in meteorology, it's hard to overstate just how *critical* satellite data is in combating climate change and preparing for extreme weather events. I can’t wait to get started, and before you ask: _YES!_ Working on our country’s space exploration policy is an absolute dream come true. You're the reason I'm here, Peter, and it's my hope we can continue our partnership as we work to protect our planet. **That means winning my re-election campaign in 2024 so I keep at it for the long haul!** **[Will you chip in $5 to help defend this seat so I can continue making progress in Congress?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1O0h2JaHl7tRYUhm4MABKnE6Zi1fFwuletjKz3MjDU11c2RwhADZ_AcHOOcuYc_rL3-E2boJhsm4Fag6JSPNwg9aoScaMcotxzy3jB-bJBGGnPDUogOyVrG_xc0_vE7RA28118MrlRWbnnuZpQt5RL3tbrKcy9iQvb32rYLTXWo9RwhJ4wSTVEhf23oB0Y-yL_T1Rqe03al-dnie0jhGSwG7TK9CLqXmiQC4lsRhTuaYSewFUx_iwlX3oCyjsaXG93XgypT25evgYnLMwZ-eNOUSsK2hki7jGYXeGSJd9jCGtt-kueKYZoYWL3eJ0Muzx_TYhxAeM39L9r9ZTtIKljK_ALEwjzO71aGH6EeYTACA/3tl/Ht7Hwn42ROizMiYRYf1DrQ/h1/O6QsQoRDaRd5igL3kQoPdCG6tdjI24biFJhzE_O5M9g)**

This is a key posting within the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: What can we say?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, what can we
say to move you to make your
first contribution to support our work?

What if we told you that we’re right in the middle of 2024 candidate
recruitment and your contribution will help us find the next slate of
progressive champions?

What if we told you that we recruited AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee and
Cori Bush to run for Congress in the first place? We supported their
campaigns from start to finish and helped all of them take on the
establishment and defeat entrenched incumbents.

Or what if we said that Moderate PAC plans to raise and spend $20 million
against us to stop our movement and we need your support to fight back?

We are truly a grassroots funded organization and every donation – whether
it’s $5 or $50 – really makes a difference.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126192?refcode=em20230210-27438&t=1001&akid=27438%2E1203867%2EiWGfY3 ]When thousands of people come together to chip in what they can afford,
we then have the resources to help our candidates win. Will you make a
$3 contribution right now to power our work to transform
the Democratic Party from the inside out?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126192?refcode=em20230210-27438&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27438%2E1203867%2EiWGfY3 ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=27438%2E1203867%2EiWGfY3 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=27438%2E1203867%2EiWGfY3 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230210-27438-footer&t=1023&refcode2=27438_1203867_iWGfY3&akid=27438%2E1203867%2EiWGfY3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=27438%2E1203867%2EiWGfY3

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Trump needs to be arrested, tried, and put in jail. Sign if you agree!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the petition: Put Trump in Jail! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8854c256-0eaa-4034-b260-426183e2cf08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | **He's guilty. We saw it with our own eyes. And he's a clear and present danger to our democracy. Trump needs to be arrested, tried, and put in jail.** Yes, we need to go through the legal process, and do it right. But let's be clear, we can't afford to wait forever. **Trump and his followers are actively working right now to subvert our democracy. And given the magnitude of his crimes, there needs to be punishment, and it needs to happen as quickly as possible.** There are multiple active cases in process, at both the federal and state level. And those in charge of these cases need to know that time is of the essence. [**Add your name: Put Trump in Jail.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c3be238-e921-458b-9210-c8b3be3874a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | He's guilty. We saw it with our own eyes. And he's a clear and present danger to our democracy. Trump needs to be arrested, tried, and put in jail. Yes, we need to go through the legal process, and do it right. But let's be clear, we can't afford to wait forever. Trump and his followers are actively working right now to subvert our democracy. And given the magnitude of his crimes, there needs to be punishment, and it needs to happen as quickly as possible. There are multiple active cases in process, at both the federal and state level. name: Laurie Teper
subject: NC Values and Advocacy Breakfast Information
body:
Hey All,
Just a reminder if you plan to attend the breakfast Saturday, Feb. 18, here are the details:

**What:** **NC Values Information and Advocacy Breakfast**
**Date: Saturday, February 18, 2023, from**
**Time: 9:30am-11:30am at**
**Place: Fellowship Baptist Church (450 Muldee St, Durham).**
**Cost: A $20 donation will cover your breakfast and help support the NC Values Coalition. Register:**<https://secure.anedot.com/nc-values-coalition/grassroots-breakfast>

Tami Fitzgerald, the Director of NC Values Coalition will speak and answer any questions you might have. Courtney will explain how you can be involved and we will have an action item that we can complete together that day!

We hope to see you on February 18th!

-Courtney Geels
(new email: [courtney@ncvalues.org](mailto:courtney@ncvalues.org))

Laurie Teper
Temporary Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847) 212-5651
Home Email: [teper@sbcglobal.net](mailto:teper@sbcglobal.net)

name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Fellow conservative,
---
| | Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It's the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won't stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I'll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they'll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad47b64d583942088938fc3cb364f500&_e=zOVRV-oslzJGPu-9HcjMEd46usqX7-4Fp5XZahvS0WwOaU7fXqmL4KOZRm2iXoUSRoOBt_-M8Bsac8R2AbAyJwVI1HeL12auvh_RotUMtJvJQOtK29-t_7eSDjBj4QzeAB1h_eSgWEsEq05zKIMsiDcgW_p5G5rQlrAkJYbelgxqN0X8G5VPG3smqPfWiwSgGdul5kW3BsuoJ52ly6jy602j6_J5aMMrkyYsYMYfxN0ymzNIKPvwwYqClZvBVlgGQxx0laj3eUL4UsLEabGseyTHhGT7QzZYejbbLDt6wXblFQAzcQVDbDvYZfV486d7)

name: Virginia Democrats
subject: Virginia is THE battleground.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
These races are the most important in the nation.

|
---
Derek, Here are three critical things you need to know about Virginia’s elections in 2023.
1. **Virginia is THE battleground in the nation right now.**
a. Republicans hold a majority of statewide elected offices 3-2
b. Virginia’s Congressional delegation is split 5-5 right now, with one seat open
c. The General Assembly is split with the GOP controlling the House of Delegates and VADEMS holding the Virginia Senate
2. **The Virginia GOP has attempted to ban abortion three times in the last month. Senate Dems blocked the bans with their critical Brick Wall.**
a. Republicans will try again at the next possible opportunity.
3. **Every Seat in the General Assembly and over 1000 local offices are on the ballot this year.**

These are the most important elections in the nation — they have the potential to reshape the face of our Commonwealth for years to come. **[We’re asking you to support the critical work of the VADEMS as we gear up for another round of hard-fought elections. clean_body: These races are the most important in the nation. | Derek, Here are three critical things you need to know about Virginia’s elections in 2023. 1. Virginia is THE battleground in the nation right now. a. Republicans hold a majority of statewide elected offices 3-2 b. Virginia’s Congressional delegation is split 5-5 right now, with one seat open c. The General Assembly is split with the GOP controlling the House of Delegates and VADEMS holding the Virginia Senate 2. The Virginia GOP has attempted to ban abortion three times in the last month. Senate Dems blocked the bans with their critical Brick Wall. a. Republicans will try again at the next possible opportunity. 3. Every Seat in the General Assembly and over 1000 local offices are on the ballot this year. These are the most important elections in the nation — they have the potential to reshape the face of our Commonwealth for years to come. = VADEMS | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** ******=******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. **_But the days of the Left’s radical policies leaving YOU behind are over._**

We will no longer allow Biden’s lies and failures continue to destroy this country.
