clean_body: It’s time to build back a strong America | Friend, As if Joe Biden needs another failure to add to his list, an article from The Hill has called this week’s address ‘one of the weakest, most incoherent State of the Union messages in history.’ And I couldn’t agree more. Biden used his speech to try to convince Americans that their lying eyes are deceiving them, failing to give any realistic plans to address the pressing issues impacting Americans every day. But our new House majority has made ending the Left’s failed policies and building a better and stronger America for YOU our top priority. And with your continued support, Biden’s disastrous agenda doesn’t stand a chance. Biden may have reiterated his promise to be a President for all Americans, yet his policies only cater to the Left’s woke agenda. And now Biden wastes no time in traveling to our great state of Wisconsin, a top battleground state for 2024, less than 24 hours after his speech, to lie to voters about his successful two years. But the days of the Left’s radical policies leaving YOU behind are over. My fellow House Republicans and I are making sure we address the real issues affecting Americans every day and create solutions to the problems created by the Biden Administration. We will no longer allow Biden’s lies and failures continue to destroy this country. And with you fighting alongside us, a brighter future for America is just around the corner. Thank you, Rep. name: Team Sherrod
subject: Official Team Sherrod Newsletter:
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/the-canary-chronicle-FIN.png]
The Official Campaign Newsletter of Senator Sherrod Brown
Headlines from Ohio & Across the Country
WTAP: “Sen. Sherrod Brown discusses the TRAIN Act and nursing shortages” [https://www.wtap.com/2023/01/26/sen-sherrod-brown-discusses-train-act-nursing-shortages/] Nurses work long hours and during the pandemic, they put their health at risk to provide care to others. They deserve our support, but hospital-based nursing schools are at risk of losing critical funding. Sherrod spoke to WTAP about his bipartisan bill -- which President Biden signed into law last year -- that will ensure these nursing schools, including six in Ohio, retain funding while helping to address the nursing shortage. Read Sherrod’s op-ed about the bill here. [https://www.clermontsun.com/2023/01/25/sherrod-brown-in-your-hometown-fighting-for-older-ohioans]
WATCH THE INTERVIEW [https://www.wtap.com/2023/01/26/sen-sherrod-brown-discusses-train-act-nursing-shortages/]
https://www.wtap.com/2023/01/26/sen-sherrod-brown-discusses-train-act-nursing-shortages/ [https://www.wtap.com/2023/01/26/sen-sherrod-brown-discusses-train-act-nursing-shortages/]
WCPO 9 News: “GE Aerospace confirms it will make Cincinnati its corporate headquarters” [https://www.wcpo.com/money/local-business-news/ge-aerospace-confirms-it-will-make-cincinnati-its-corporate-headquarters] Southwest Ohio is the birthplace of American aviation and thanks to GE Aerospace’s plans to keep its headquarters in Cincinnati, Ohio will continue to be part of the future of aviation, too.
State of the Race(s) in Ohio
OH-SEN UPDATE: A lot has happened in Sherrod’s race in the past few weeks. Check out the latest developments:
FIRST: The NRSC went up with its first negative ads of the election -- and they target Sherrod.
THEN: Sherrod got his first opponent, a wealthy state senator who spent millions of his own money when he ran -- and lost -- in the last Ohio Senate race.
NOW: Cook Political Report and Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball rated our race as a toss-up.
This is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country, and it’s already heating up. We’re counting on your help -- will you make a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230210nl?refcode=sbe230210nl]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230210nl?refcode=sbe230210nl]
Get Involved
Last month marked 13 years of unchecked dark money influencing our elections following the Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision. Sherrod is working to get dark money out of our politics and put power back where it belongs: with voters. Will you sign on your support for Sherrod’s efforts to overturn Citizens United ? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/uHePGogUBkq0Bsxkx6OFCw2?emci=fd281483-958b-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=f7b3d189-d499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=15826259]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/uHePGogUBkq0Bsxkx6OFCw2]
Enjoying the Canary Chronicle?
Share this online and help spread the word!
https://www.facebook.com/sherrod [https://www.facebook.com/sherrod] https://twitter.com/SherrodBrown [https://twitter.com/SherrodBrown] https://www.instagram.com/sherrod [https://www.instagram.com/sherrod]
You’re receiving these updates because you’re a dedicated member of Team Sherrod. Please take a moment to add info@sherrodbrown.com [info@sherrodbrown.com] to your contact list to make sure you don’t miss any updates from the team.

Friends of Sherrod Brown
3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333
United States

clean_body: [] The Official Campaign Newsletter of Senator Sherrod Brown Headlines from Ohio & Across the Country WTAP: “Sen. Sherrod Brown discusses the TRAIN Act and nursing shortages” [] Nurses work long hours and during the pandemic, they put their health at risk to provide care to others. They deserve our support, but hospital-based nursing schools are at risk of losing critical funding. Sherrod spoke to WTAP about his bipartisan bill -- which President Biden signed into law last year -- that will ensure these nursing schools, including six in Ohio, retain funding while helping to address the nursing shortage. Read Sherrod’s op-ed about the bill here. [] WATCH THE INTERVIEW [] [] WCPO 9 News: “GE Aerospace confirms it will make Cincinnati its corporate headquarters” [] Southwest Ohio is the birthplace of American aviation and thanks to GE Aerospace’s plans to keep its headquarters in Cincinnati, Ohio will continue to be part of the future of aviation, too. State of the Race(s) in Ohio OH-SEN UPDATE: A lot has happened in Sherrod’s race in the past few weeks. Check out the latest developments: FIRST: The NRSC went up with its first negative ads of the election -- and they target Sherrod. THEN: Sherrod got his first opponent, a wealthy state senator who spent millions of his own money when he ran -- and lost -- in the last Ohio Senate race. NOW: Cook Political Report and Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball rated our race as a toss-up. This is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country, and it’s already heating up. We’re counting on your help -- will you make a contribution today? [] DONATE [] Get Involved Last month marked 13 years of unchecked dark money influencing our elections following the Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision. Sherrod is working to get dark money out of our politics and put power back where it belongs: with voters. Will you sign on your support for Sherrod’s efforts to overturn Citizens United ? [] ADD YOUR NAME [] Enjoying the Canary Chronicle? Share this online and help spread the word! [] [] [] You’re receiving these updates because you’re a dedicated member of Team Sherrod. Please take a moment to add info@sherrodbrown.com [info@sherrodbrown.com] to your contact list to make sure you don’t miss any updates from the team. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

_**Transcript:** _

Joe Biden's war on American energy is one of the key drivers of the worst inflation in 58 years, and it's hitting every single American family very, very hard. Biden reversed every action I took that achieved energy independence and soon we were going to be energy dominant all over the world. Energy dominant.

He cancelled the Keystone XL Pipeline, he reentered the horrendous Paris Climate Accord, so unfair to the United States, good for other countries, so bad for us. He put up huge roadblocks to new oil, gas and coal production and much, much more.

In effect, Biden's anti-American energy crusade is a massive tax hike on everything. Higher energy costs, raise the price of food, raw material, shipping, transportation, construction, manufacturing, and everything else.

The country that now benefits most from Joe Biden's radical left Green New Deal is China. High energy prices in America are a gift to China, a major factor in driving our heavy industry overseas. If you want to be an advanced manufacturing nation, you must be able to produce low-cost energy. You'll never be a rich nation without it.

And if you want to deindustrialize the United States, then you would seek to drive up the cost of energy here as much as possible, just as Joe Biden has done, perhaps unknowingly. That I don't know. That's why Biden's energy agenda is China's energy agenda.

That's why China signs up for every stupid globalist climate deal, and then immediately breaks it. They don't live up to their deals. When I'm back in the White House, I will bring back a pro-American energy policy at long last.

As you know, China paid hundreds of billions of dollars to the United States when I was president. No other president got ten cents, check it out, not even ten cents. I will deploy a team of warrior lawyers to hunt down every unnecessary regulation in the federal registry that hampers domestic production.

And we will wipe them off the books. We will again get out of Paris. And we will rapidly issue approvals for all worthy energy infrastructure projects with a focus on maximum speed to bring prices down rapidly. So, get those proposals ready now, because we are going to put thousands of Americans to work building the power plants, pipelines, grids, ports, refineries, and shipping terminals of tomorrow. We are going to have very inexpensive energy again, like we did just two and a half years ago.

This great undertaking will also help restore hope and aspiration to America's young people, instead of being irrationally terrified by political predictions of climate apocalypse. Instead of toiling, for low wages or left-wing make-work projects, I have a vision that will give young Americans a chance to find real meaning and work once again, like we had it two and a half years ago, building the backbone of America that is powerful, prosperous, productive, vigorous, modern, independent, and free.

We will be great again as a country under the next Trump administration. The return of American jobs and the American dream will be powered by the return of American energy.

Nobody has more liquid gold under their feet than the United States of America. And we will use it and profit by it and live with it. And we will be rich again and we will be happy again. And we will be proud again. Thank you very much.

| | **FEBRUARY 2023 PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---

EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58540836/391434687/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk951-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODgyYTMwNy02NWE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAnnSth2MfafgBjHofXfsWrQi8MTM8B5m12yhaO4-Fw=&emci=cfd86ba3-08a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a882a307-65a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.

I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. I received my full education, kindergarten through college, from the New York City public school system. And, throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were directly affecting me and my family.

**You might be wondering why I’m telling you this, and the answer is simple: I know what it is like to feel voiceless.**
That’s why, when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to never let another person feel the same way – and that’s why I created my priorities survey.

**[Peter, I’m proud to put the people’s priorities first, but to do that effectively, I need to know what your concerns are. So please, will you take my February Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58540837/391434688/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk951-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODgyYTMwNy02NWE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAnnSth2MfafgBjHofXfsWrQi8MTM8B5m12yhaO4-Fw=&emci=cfd86ba3-08a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a882a307-65a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58540838/391434689/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk951-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODgyYTMwNy02NWE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAnnSth2MfafgBjHofXfsWrQi8MTM8B5m12yhaO4-Fw=&emci=cfd86ba3-08a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a882a307-65a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
I know that Democrats were able to win big in the 2022 elections – but our work is nowhere near complete. This year, we are still fighting for abortion to be safe and accessible to all, we are still fighting against voter suppression laws that are eerily similar to those seen during the Jim Crow era, and we are still losing too many loved ones to gun violence.

Peter, I vow to never stop fighting until all people who live in America are protected, but I need your help. With the political landscape drastically different today than it was four months ago, I need to know which fights to prioritize this year – and that’s where you come in.

**I’m looking for 1,000 fearless fighters to step up now and complete my survey before midnight, but it looks like I’m still missing your response, Peter. So please:[Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58540839/391434690/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk951-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODgyYTMwNy02NWE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAnnSth2MfafgBjHofXfsWrQi8MTM8B5m12yhaO4-Fw=&emci=cfd86ba3-08a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a882a307-65a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58540840/391434691/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk951-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODgyYTMwNy02NWE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAnnSth2MfafgBjHofXfsWrQi8MTM8B5m12yhaO4-Fw=&emci=cfd86ba3-08a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a882a307-65a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Fair Fight Sued Me - A Citizen's Story
body:
A Critical Fight in Defense of the First Amendment | | | | | |
---
| | **Fair Fight Sued Me - A Citizen’s Story**
_**“They've set up a multimillion-dollar lawfare machine.”**_ _Mark Davis, private citizen sued by Fair Fight and defended by True the Vote_
Coming into the 2020 election cycle it was a well-known fact that Georgia's voter rolls were a mess. The state had been involved in a multi-year lawsuit (filed by Fair Fight) that sought to limit the state's ability to maintain accurate voter records. True the Vote heard from voters all over Georgia who were frustrated, and after November's debacle rightfully concerned, that these pervasive inaccuracies would persist into their January 5, 2021 run-off elections. They wanted to do something to address the problem ...
We knew that Georgia election code provided a means, called an Elector Challenge, to address voter roll inaccuracies in an orderly manner. Under Georgia's Elector Challenge process, a registered voter may provide his or her county records for any voter believed to be ineligible based on state law, stating the basis for that belief. The county elections board may then hold a hearing to review the challenges and determine whether to accept the challenges, to deny then, or hold them for further consideration.
Significantly, in no case would a challenged voter be disqualified from voting -- the process simply calls for the county election board to verify the voter’s eligibility -- a small step for secure elections.
So, True the Vote offered to help citizens who wanted to file Elector Challenges by comparing residential addresses on record in the voter roll to residential addresses on record with the United States Postal Service. We identified over 300,000 inaccurate records. The process we used was an advanced comparison of several commercial data sets, including the National Change of Address Registry. This process has been acknowledged by the United States Supreme Court as the “gold standard”.
In December 2020, True the Vote founder Catherine Engelbrecht made a public statement about Georgia voters submitting Elector Challenges. Several private citizens were independently working on elector challenges in their counties. In her remarks, Catherine complimented their good work, recognizing them by name.
**Within days of that statement, Fair Fight filed suit against Catherine, True the Vote, and every private citizen she'd recognized. We’ve been in court ever since.**
[**Here’s a link to the lawsuit**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3129cbefc0&e=ad8cba7e98)****
---
Fair Fight's complaint against True the Vote reads like a laundry list of tired racial stereotypes. Marc Elias and Stacey Abrams contend that efforts to maintain accurate voter rolls, which are bloated with ineligible records, is an attempt to suppress and deter the vote of “Black and Brown people” (their terms not ours) and would somehow lead to threats and harassment of individual voters. Elias and Abrams set out to hold True the Vote et al liable for a fiction of Fair Fight's own creation, with sweeping accusations that evoked highly charged emotional responses. This gave Ms. Abrams lots of primetime media coverage and spurred a barrage of threats against us.
What should have been viewed as a positive effort in civic engagement and good government has now become a multi-year lawsuit. Here’s the story of one citizen, among many, sued by Fair Fight.
_“I’ve been working with voter data since my father, Guy Davis, was the Republican nominee for governor in 1986, and I worked on the campaign. Having worked with voter data for that many years, you see a lot of issues. Because of all the problems that I was seeing, I became an advocate for election integrity over 20 years ago._
_In the general election of 2020 in Georgia, I saw nearly 35,000 potentially unlawful ballots_ , _and the margin between Trump and Biden was like 11,700 or somewhere around there. There were other issues we found, like voters that were registered at a commercial mail-receiving agency. There was one address in downtown Atlanta that had 2000 people registered at it. My goal is to raise awareness about the problems with our voter registration system and the management of our voter rolls._
_Getting sued ... well, it’s been a nightmare. We all got served on Christmas Eve, and I do not think that happened by chance. All the depositions and the request for production of documents, the whole thing has been a nightmare. The great irony here is they’re suing us for allegedly intimidating voters, when we didn’t talk to a single voter, we didn’t intimidate a single voter. With vote challenges, you are petitioning the government. You are not confronting voters._
_Nobody should have to go through this. In my opinion, Fair Fight should be getting sued for trying to intimidate us from using our rights. Fair Fight is trying to prevent us from exercising our First Amendment right to petition our government for Redress of Grievances. OCGA 21, 229 and 230 were enacted for exactly that purpose. Our legislature set forth a procedure for petitioning the county government._
_Thank God for True the Vote providing us legal support. When you get involved in a case like this the fees can add up real quick. There’s the light at the end of the tunnel here.”_
Thank God for people like Mark Davis and all the other voters improperly and unfairly drawn into this case. We’ll keep you updated on the progress of this lawsuit (along with the many others). [**Please consider supporting us, you can donate here.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=dd4f0307e1&e=ad8cba7e98) Our opposition is extremely well funded. We need you.
Stay strong. Never quit.
Ever onward - The True the Vote Team
|
---
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=24f741855f&e=ad8cba7e98)
| | | | |
---

They wanted to do something to address the problem ... We knew that Georgia election code provided a means, called an Elector Challenge, to address voter roll inaccuracies in an orderly manner. Under Georgia's Elector Challenge process, a registered voter may provide his or her county records for any voter believed to be ineligible based on state law, stating the basis for that belief. The county elections board may then hold a hearing to review the challenges and determine whether to accept the challenges, to deny then, or hold them for further consideration. Significantly, in no case would a challenged voter be disqualified from voting -- the process simply calls for the county election board to verify the voter’s eligibility -- a small step for secure elections. So, True the Vote offered to help citizens who wanted to file Elector Challenges by comparing residential addresses on record in the voter roll to residential addresses on record with the United States Postal Service. We identified over 300,000 inaccurate records. The process we used was an advanced comparison of several commercial data sets, including the National Change of Address Registry. This process has been acknowledged by the United States Supreme Court as the “gold standard”. In December 2020, True the Vote founder Catherine Engelbrecht made a public statement about Georgia voters submitting Elector Challenges. Several private citizens were independently working on elector challenges in their counties. In her remarks, Catherine complimented their good work, recognizing them by name. Within days of that statement, Fair Fight filed suit against Catherine, True the Vote, and every private citizen she'd recognized. We’ve been in court ever since. ** Fair Fight's complaint against True the Vote reads like a laundry list of tired racial stereotypes. Marc Elias and Stacey Abrams contend that efforts to maintain accurate voter rolls, which are bloated with ineligible records, is an attempt to suppress and deter the vote of “Black and Brown people” (their terms not ours) and would somehow lead to threats and harassment of individual voters. Elias and Abrams set out to hold True the Vote et al liable for a fiction of Fair Fight's own creation, with sweeping accusations that evoked highly charged emotional responses. This gave Ms. Abrams lots of primetime media coverage and spurred a barrage of threats against us. What should have been viewed as a positive effort in civic engagement and good government has now become a multi-year lawsuit. Here’s the story of one citizen, among many, sued by Fair Fight. “I’ve been working with voter data since my father, Guy Davis, was the Republican nominee for governor in 1986, and I worked on the campaign. Having worked with voter data for that many years, you see a lot of issues. Because of all the problems that I was seeing, I became an advocate for election integrity over 20 years ago. In the general election of 2020 in Georgia, I saw nearly 35,000 potentially unlawful ballots , and the margin between Trump and Biden was like 11,700 or somewhere around there. There were other issues we found, like voters that were registered at a commercial mail-receiving agency. There was one address in downtown Atlanta that had 2000 people registered at it. My goal is to raise awareness about the problems with our voter registration system and the management of our voter rolls. Getting sued ... well, it’s been a nightmare. We all got served on Christmas Eve, and I do not think that happened by chance. All the depositions and the request for production of documents, the whole thing has been a nightmare. The great irony here is they’re suing us for allegedly intimidating voters, when we didn’t talk to a single voter, we didn’t intimidate a single voter. With vote challenges, you are petitioning the government. You are not confronting voters. Nobody should have to go through this. In my opinion, Fair Fight should be getting sued for trying to intimidate us from using our rights. Fair Fight is trying to prevent us from exercising our First Amendment right to petition our government for Redress of Grievances. OCGA 21, 229 and 230 were enacted for exactly that purpose. Our legislature set forth a procedure for petitioning the county government. Thank God for True the Vote providing us legal support. When you get involved in a case like this the fees can add up real quick. There’s the light at the end of the tunnel here.” Thank God for people like Mark Davis and all the other voters improperly and unfairly drawn into this case. We’ll keep you updated on the progress of this lawsuit (along with the many others). Our opposition is extremely well funded. We need you. Stay strong. Never quit. Ever onward - The True the Vote Team | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 True the Vote, All rights reserved.

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e26ae429ddf4c32b8fccebcb7eb15ee&_e=Vsgb1E2lUzgHa9CSWGLaLkv_MsB2wOIGW1afe6NHuh0tv0CPNZbMAuEc10atz4kTy81L7wgbpx9tmv2c9UweOSome5g3kAKJ0I4aWZukE6vXQeS9mCRqyQx8xvFdvaSR_JpNtA8wHKGCwo_NqBYD2mYOI2w8bpWqWokN4ESFvk-kEG-zGIwoQrctMwqWEbnUhEVjWGzPwCI0ptQltTO6Vw69HHKC-3YPxSwzHZJm6BePWW7j8sHby5ZPzyh5g89gR8JfXOifVJ4Yh1ms15ZlMYh4yUsAvrBaIFqA6y4_NDM%3D)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e26ae429ddf4c32b8fccebcb7eb15ee&_e=Vsgb1E2lUzgHa9CSWGLaLkv_MsB2wOIGW1afe6NHuh0tv0CPNZbMAuEc10atz4kTy81L7wgbpx9tmv2c9UweOSome5g3kAKJ0I4aWZukE6vXQeS9mCRqyQx8xvFdvaSR_JpNtA8wHKGCwo_NqBYD2qhXzDWQG4BH2mYLlL1rY6mTwc-Uk_3VBc-n_eUruY3pySxzCW6bYJLTxffsnbP3gXn5Vq9BdoXXPK3nHuWmqhdqW4YiWOQyo-vwoEbl-IgXSmLpGa5YoCxfUgzKVHU02dOno2ussPth42hdle05UY4%3D)
---
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e26ae429ddf4c32b8fccebcb7eb15ee&_e=Vsgb1E2lUzgHa9CSWGLaLkv_MsB2wOIGW1afe6NHuh0tv0CPNZbMAuEc10atz4kTy81L7wgbpx9tmv2c9UweOSome5g3kAKJ0I4aWZukE6vXQeS9mCRqyQx8xvFdvaSR_JpNtA8wHKGCwo_NqBYD2nfhW4rQzv2xxCOGLN5uxmJNPz8eVTc7tTKKiBXW36ZlLdzCr5UJKNcxeVF62TGdydPOQbhr2jKA43ZzaTq24MvT5auL3VYiuf5h2Dwkjx0b_5dvUl4JYr7c6CZOX6nNLmyUkPApO0IEej2-A2gFHoI%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e26ae429ddf4c32b8fccebcb7eb15ee&_e=Vsgb1E2lUzgHa9CSWGLaLkv_MsB2wOIGW1afe6NHuh0tv0CPNZbMAuEc10atz4kTy81L7wgbpx9tmv2c9UweOSome5g3kAKJ0I4aWZukE6vXQeS9mCRqyQx8xvFdvaSR_JpNtA8wHKGCwo_NqBYD2vFFRX7AVgX5kHqquowI8T1EcgPH_zgaCmhkKuFCy9FMoABj7mH-asI2iNPj8MtzeBksBf0aGF3W1FJZGnRZYZulRq09KDbnkARbXUllVTCTrv-bAQoZiR6smzRn8pKxh11oczthe9nlyp9C16KlZZM%3D)
---
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e26ae429ddf4c32b8fccebcb7eb15ee&_e=Vsgb1E2lUzgHa9CSWGLaLkv_MsB2wOIGW1afe6NHuh0tv0CPNZbMAuEc10atz4kTy81L7wgbpx9tmv2c9UweOSome5g3kAKJ0I4aWZukE6vXQeS9mCRqyQx8xvFdvaSR_JpNtA8wHKGCwo_NqBYD2uXV-OyQwEbRmdIt-CQwONrS9gYMjykGnk_xeCoGN7oS1F_oqAKMiDaWANaWZ3MYOtdR-5rYQledL_gUwG2UPwF_0C__r6soVZxDpz459JFDB0Xu3q0pXJQDv0WyRo_1XU9Ev4-pGixJVyd0IAzNpwg%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: We can do better

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.10.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.10.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Hi friend,
As someone who served six-years in the Virginia House of Delegates, I know what it means to take on tough fights in our state government.
Whether it was championing legislation to create more jobs, to ensuring the passage of life-saving reforms like prohibiting the use of no-knock search warrants -- being your advocate in the General Assembly was an honor I took seriously.
Now, I am running for State Senate because our district deserves better representation. We need more decisive progressive voices that won't back down from supporting our public schools, passing justice reforms that will make our communities safer, and who will never compromise on ensuring access to reproductive health care.
But I can't do it alone. That's why I'm reaching out to you today to ask for your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.10.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Our primary is in June, and I need your help to ensure this campaign can reach each voter in our district and communicate our vision.
Every donation, no matter the size, makes a difference and will help us get one step closer to winning this nomination. If you can contribute $5, $15, or even $50, it would mean the world to me and my campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.10.2023_LA_all&amount=15]
Thank you for everything you’ve done to get us this far. Together we can take our fight for our community to the Virginia State Senate!
Onward!
Lashrecse
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.10.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.10.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democratic Delegate Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Lashrecse campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.10.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.10.2023_LA_all&amount=25]

body:
Help us stop this by electing conservative local candidates across our state

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .

clean_body: Help us stop this by electing conservative local candidates across our state Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd! With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms. We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! () State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. () Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press: “We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. () Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I fact checked the many glaring stats and omissions in Biden's State of the Union address and I called out the cartel leaders who are profiting off of the fentanyl crisis at America's southern border. And I introduced legislation that would reimburse border states for doing the federal government's job of enforcing American sovereignty.
As always, thank you for your support.
Now, here's your brief:

| Clearly Biden was confused when he gave his speech at the State of the Union on Tuesday night. So I fixed some of the stats for him:
CLAIM: "A record decrease in the deficit." FACT CHECK: Biden's policies have put us on the path to spend over $10 trillion in the next decade - a record increase for a president's first two years in office.
CLAIM: "Gas prices are down $1.50 a gallon since their peak." FACT CHECK: Gas prices are only down from the $5/gallon national average that Biden's destructive energy policies caused. The average gas price was $2.39 when Biden took office, now it's $3.47. That's still over a dollar more.
CLAIM: "Inflation is coming down. Wages are going up." FACT CHECK: Inflation has risen over 13% since Biden took office. Inflation was 1.4% when he started and is 6.5% today. December was the 21st straight month that real wages have been negative, which means inflation is outpacing wage growth.
CLAIM: "Republicans want to cut Social Security." FACT CHECK: Republicans have repeatedly assured that we are not cutting Medicare & Social Security. Speaker McCarthy and other Republicans have echoed that we will not default on our debt - but it's up to President Biden to come to the table and negotiate with Republicans.
CLAIM: "We have created a record 12 million new jobs." FACT CHECK: Biden is leaving out the workforce participation rate - 2.6 million fewer Americans are participating in the U.S. labor force compared to before COVID-19. All of the government-imposed lockdowns are still causing repercussions that the economy hasn't recovered from.
What would you add to it? Share your thoughts in my survey [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019OG7nEa09smH334J933QWMuu4d7pN4LLR2M_uX9WaZuZlXwxijS_gk1tECFBvc36zmDDl5kOnHd4GRYmYebcQmpQ1sfClgRuchPXtDVN9iVOpjnReUzYh32nenpI-lANAD-4aw5KQiDo9x7q0E4mDOWCUbQzsKJ0VT4JWqw59Lg-gAW1nKXy3CZFo1T3ibJKUthjZ1ZWh9WAov0SljvEVFFHkpcK6Kj80HcYE6KI5fkRvtL6O8GSRbr-gotXlv_CXgX_Y35Gbu1F2Jvz_GTzooDc_c0f4cbIMAkBFJM3SibfQYV39u-UTFMNmQJW1cq3SBTn67L-ZyscQ23ffg9WKikjXmNryO_6&c=WsK7hnoeWIMfcs2LSbHK6zKH7t2dh9Wd0QX8PspMnWvGhEvplOgLUg==&ch=IyB9JLhtu1cPbSoEYAqwX2uuZMyqB5zkjrOBZ_LcVLbD0umnWhNk9Q==).

| Biden did the absolute bare minimum at SOTU -- only mentioning the border 4 times. Did he propose any policies to secure the border? No. Did he mention any plans to help understaffed CBP agents? No. Did he mention that the way we solve the fentanyl crisis is by stopping cartels dead in their tracks? You guessed it. No.
Ismael Mario Zambada - leader of the Sinaloa Cartel - and Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes - leader of the Jalisco Cartel - are the two men primarily responsible for the fentanyl trafficking that's killing nearly 80,000 Americans every year. Why won't Biden say their names? These narcoterrorists should be household names, but Biden wouldn't acknowledge their existence or even the word "cartel" in his address.
Instead, he complained that Congress has refused to act on immigration, when that's just not true. Maybe it's just not in the way HE wants Congress to act (which, by the way, is pushing for amnesty for illegal immigrants).
We have the bills to target these cartels, including the one I [introduced with Rep. Mike Waltz](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019OG7nEa09smH334J933QWMuu4d7pN4LLR2M_uX9WaZuZlXwxijS_glcpAbxVT3m2wBzAuxVTmkerGn6ygys72xOYvftT4rNA24hZwJbSy2RAVUu43Iko6J2_ItvOURUU_VXvA0HjtvtjIza1g5pAN76fXRzlhND7frd7Xa0pHoc=&c=WsK7hnoeWIMfcs2LSbHK6zKH7t2dh9Wd0QX8PspMnWvGhEvplOgLUg==&ch=IyB9JLhtu1cPbSoEYAqwX2uuZMyqB5zkjrOBZ_LcVLbD0umnWhNk9Q==) to authorize the use of military force against cartels at our southern border.
Let's get our common sense bills on the floor and do everything in our power to capture these thugs.
[SIGN THE PETITION. TELL REPUBLICAN LEADERSHIP TO PASS LEGISLATION TO FIGHT THESE CARTELS.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019OG7nEa09smH334J933QWMuu4d7pN4LLR2M_uX9WaZuZlXwxijS_gmz2lLfrwSV-C2jSC-Na89uO67DPUUTBel7j7SXGuVyxJNqn9VB0YrUAo8ySwKDQCFG1BQN9NQiEI-biNF4r3fVFgyQ4_d86qkHt9sHFu88B_8RCeDazn7Gh64U8JYcSBg2ca95VhqrE7zI3zIHVx2JR790Xku7IvuThJVds7oto28Xd33x2yscGoaPWggiW0mdQnha_coCkT5CvOG269-9jiKGSKQyRM8pjZJGC0f-yTU8Y2cVWWmYzpeLxsM2J1tNX94t-5MybmwyCD1yOsvf-WnEQrILfp4-E-hj83OjVwGwbbd99TBc=&c=WsK7hnoeWIMfcs2LSbHK6zKH7t2dh9Wd0QX8PspMnWvGhEvplOgLUg==&ch=IyB9JLhtu1cPbSoEYAqwX2uuZMyqB5zkjrOBZ_LcVLbD0umnWhNk9Q==)

| The federal government is responsible for securing America's borders and controlling the flow of immigration. When it fails to do its job, border states will have no choice but to do it for them. Otherwise they will suffer serious repercussions to public safety and rule of law.
Texas alone has spent more than $2.5 billion on securing the border. My new bill, the State Border Security Reimbursement Act, would require the federal government to reimburse states for the billions of dollars spent on security and immigration issues.
Border state citizens are essentially taxed twice for the same purpose. The federal government taxes them to meet border security obligations. And their own state taxes them (out of pure necessity) to cover all of the obligations which the Biden Administration refuses to fulfill. Taxpayers in Texas and other border states shouldn't have to pay twice for Biden's inaction, and my bill helps correct that.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I fact checked the many glaring stats and omissions in Biden's State of the Union address and I called out the cartel leaders who are profiting off of the fentanyl crisis at America's southern border. And I introduced legislation that would reimburse border states for doing the federal government's job of enforcing American sovereignty. As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief: | | | | | | | | FACT CHECKING BIDEN'S STATE OF THE UNION | | | == | == | | | Clearly Biden was confused when he gave his speech at the State of the Union on Tuesday night. So I fixed some of the stats for him: CLAIM: "A record decrease in the deficit." FACT CHECK: Biden's policies have put us on the path to spend over $10 trillion in the next decade - a record increase for a president's first two years in office. CLAIM: "Gas prices are down $1.50 a gallon since their peak." FACT CHECK: Gas prices are only down from the $5/gallon national average that Biden's destructive energy policies caused. The average gas price was $2.39 when Biden took office, now it's $3.47. That's still over a dollar more. CLAIM: "Inflation is coming down. Wages are going up." FACT CHECK: Inflation has risen over 13% since Biden took office. Inflation was 1.4% when he started and is 6.5% today. December was the 21st straight month that real wages have been negative, which means inflation is outpacing wage growth. CLAIM: "Republicans want to cut Social Security." FACT CHECK: Republicans have repeatedly assured that we are not cutting Medicare & Social Security. Speaker McCarthy and other Republicans have echoed that we will not default on our debt - but it's up to President Biden to come to the table and negotiate with Republicans. CLAIM: "We have created a record 12 million new jobs." FACT CHECK: Biden is leaving out the workforce participation rate - 2.6 million fewer Americans are participating in the U.S. labor force compared to before COVID-19. All of the government-imposed lockdowns are still causing repercussions that the economy hasn't recovered from. What would you add to it? Share your thoughts in my survey ==. | | | | | | | | SAY THEIR NAMES | | | == | == | | | Biden did the absolute bare minimum at SOTU -- only mentioning the border 4 times. Did he propose any policies to secure the border? No. Did he mention any plans to help understaffed CBP agents? No. Did he mention that the way we solve the fentanyl crisis is by stopping cartels dead in their tracks? You guessed it. No. Ismael Mario Zambada - leader of the Sinaloa Cartel - and Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes - leader of the Jalisco Cartel - are the two men primarily responsible for the fentanyl trafficking that's killing nearly 80,000 Americans every year. Why won't Biden say their names? These narcoterrorists should be household names, but Biden wouldn't acknowledge their existence or even the word "cartel" in his address. Instead, he complained that Congress has refused to act on immigration, when that's just not true. Maybe it's just not in the way HE wants Congress to act (which, by the way, is pushing for amnesty for illegal immigrants). We have the bills to target these cartels, including the one I == to authorize the use of military force against cartels at our southern border. Let's get our common sense bills on the floor and do everything in our power to capture these thugs. == | | | | | | | | BORDER STATES SHOULDN'T HAVE TO PAY FOR BIDEN'S INACTION | == | == | The federal government is responsible for securing America's borders and controlling the flow of immigration. When it fails to do its job, border states will have no choice but to do it for them. Otherwise they will suffer serious repercussions to public safety and rule of law. Texas alone has spent more than $2.5 billion on securing the border. My new bill, the State Border Security Reimbursement Act, would require the federal government to reimburse states for the billions of dollars spent on security and immigration issues. Border state citizens are essentially taxed twice for the same purpose. The federal government taxes them to meet border security obligations. And their own state taxes them (out of pure necessity) to cover all of the obligations which the Biden Administration refuses to fulfill. Taxpayers in Texas and other border states shouldn't have to pay twice for Biden's inaction, and my bill helps correct that. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | QUOTE OF THE WEEK | | "Do you know that one of the great problems of our age is that we are governed by people who care more about feelings than they do about thoughts and ideas?" -Margaret Thatcher | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | WEEKEND READS Fox News: == WSJ: == The Free Press: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thanks for reading. Want to build the next generation of the conservative movement? == None of this is possible without your support. I promise I won't let you down. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | If you'd prefer to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: Congresswoman Shontel Brown
subject: A call to action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Black people and our history are under attack.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58562930/391487118/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230210BHM_H_SB_30DO_4_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc4ZDI2OS05NGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MlwLf0xb1AK2kcOnO4C1L246NlYqnqh9A2YyD9CJbMU=) Peter,

Black History Month is not only a time to commemorate and celebrate the achievements of Black Americans, but also a call to action. Decades after the successes of the civil rights movement, the fight for justice and equality continues.

Recent events like the loss of Tyre Nichols and countless others remind us that violence against Black Americans is still present to this day. At the same time, Black people are physically being abused, and states like Ohio are banning the teaching of Black history in schools, depriving our children of the education needed to learn from our past. With recent acts of intensifying violence and repression toward Black Americans, Black History Month has never been more important.
Black people and our history are under attack. We must continue the legacy of figures like Dr. King, Malcolm X, and Rosa Parks in the pursuit of justice and equality. We cannot allow our voices to be silenced and our history to be erased.

I hope you’ll join me in the fight against violence and discrimination. Let's get to work ensuring that our future is one of justice and equality for all. Keep moving forward,

Rep. Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---

subject: Now that we heard the State of the Union

body:
| | **[Now that President Biden has addressed the nation, Dan wants to hear from you. Take our State of the Union priorities survey now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58542688/391441559/1466275817?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230210_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_sotu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEyM2JhNC02YWE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PcYstVrY9WWVh-ZoBmPlk5hlZ_JBqSd0kqwUdfPWQdg=&emci=824e3745-62a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8aa23ba4-6aa9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
**[Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58542690/391441565/1466275817?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230210_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_sotu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEyM2JhNC02YWE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PcYstVrY9WWVh-ZoBmPlk5hlZ_JBqSd0kqwUdfPWQdg=&emci=824e3745-62a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8aa23ba4-6aa9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
---

Earlier this week, President Biden addressed the nation. The president used his address to reflect on the accomplishments so far—and what we still need to do to lower costs for families and grow our economy.

**Over the last two years, Dan and Democrats in Congress delivered:**

→ Bipartisan Infrastructure Law to rebuild roads and bridges, remove lead pipes and expand high-speed internet
→ Allowing Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices
→ CHIPS and Science Act to invest in American manufacturing and fix broken supply chains
→ Capping the cost of insulin at $35/month for seniors
→ Largest investment to combat climate change and protect the Great Lakes
→ First new law to prevent gun violence and expand background checks
→ Protecting same-sex marriage and interracial marriage

**[But we know there is more work to do. That’s why, now that we’ve heard from the president, Dan wants to hear what issues are most important to you right now. What do you want Dan to work on next? Answer in the next 24 hours to have your response recorded.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58542692/391441567/1466275817?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230210_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_sotu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEyM2JhNC02YWE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PcYstVrY9WWVh-ZoBmPlk5hlZ_JBqSd0kqwUdfPWQdg=&emci=824e3745-62a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8aa23ba4-6aa9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
**[Answer Now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58542697/391441569/1466275817?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230210_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_sotu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEyM2JhNC02YWE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PcYstVrY9WWVh-ZoBmPlk5hlZ_JBqSd0kqwUdfPWQdg=&emci=824e3745-62a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8aa23ba4-6aa9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
Dan brought a local farmer, Joe Cramer, with him as his guest Tuesday, highlighting the importance of mid-Michigan agriculture as Congress is set to work on another Farm Bill this year.

That has always been Dan’s focus. He’s committed to working with Democrats and Republicans to deliver real results for Michigan families.

Thank you,

DanKildee.com

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. clean_body: | | Earlier this week, President Biden addressed the nation. The president used his address to reflect on the accomplishments so far—and what we still need to do to lower costs for families and grow our economy. Over the last two years, Dan and Democrats in Congress delivered: → Bipartisan Infrastructure Law to rebuild roads and bridges, remove lead pipes and expand high-speed internet → Allowing Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices → CHIPS and Science Act to invest in American manufacturing and fix broken supply chains → Capping the cost of insulin at $35/month for seniors → Largest investment to combat climate change and protect the Great Lakes → First new law to prevent gun violence and expand background checks → Protecting same-sex marriage and interracial marriage Dan brought a local farmer, Joe Cramer, with him as his guest Tuesday, highlighting the importance of mid-Michigan agriculture as Congress is set to work on another Farm Bill this year. That has always been Dan’s focus. He’s committed to working with Democrats and Republicans to deliver real results for Michigan families. Thank you, DanKildee.com Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa7c07f0dde34af99822e17f138992f0&_e=JLa7HMuPxZVfX7lQcxtRzESOXy8ZHon3xh1qQW7qX2GiJSoAzVAcpiBLIcuPcz-DaoVwQHsx2WGIdDKCJe70Hdh4zddjqnUAJh7seo6OqknSPc211X5-TI_xWWUugoag2Si-cMigOtrnxDWjfQtsjkz3V14lT1pkGlA8RsS5fdyBYTITdW4qhcDw1ywJ9-oRLkc-cc5X1Wf-_mTD7kK_r0pu4wVVs0xpypMG_APbk_LMOUZc80dO_gmsO8a5F0KDOWi39lGKlsGCt8EEud7QF_4cWNbDIELD14Z6a0n7LwdWAsAXEtH2s9sOeqzPh7n6)

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa7c07f0dde34af99822e17f138992f0&_e=JLa7HMuPxZVfX7lQcxtRzESOXy8ZHon3xh1qQW7qX2GiJSoAzVAcpiBLIcuPcz-DaoVwQHsx2WGIdDKCJe70Hdh4zddjqnUAJh7seo6OqknSPc211X5-TI_xWWUugoag2Si-cMigOtrnxDWjfQtsjsU4PLsvP2tt-RczLPHHtiVThDIcYe8Wn0DaLlKDFUn9bxKNqJL4AyKESuTvB6HeKoHKdbmO2BHTHAp70vdCo6ZwdWRpbhYFOMYrtqN08q21cTTog8wt27GyuHfEIfIU183EuHCakBo39ldJlEIK6ew_tWm2fC2ji0BrJXU1-FDn)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa7c07f0dde34af99822e17f138992f0&_e=JLa7HMuPxZVfX7lQcxtRzESOXy8ZHon3xh1qQW7qX2GiJSoAzVAcpiBLIcuPcz-DaoVwQHsx2WGIdDKCJe70Hdh4zddjqnUAJh7seo6OqknSPc211X5-TI_xWWUugoag2Si-cMigOtrnxDWjfQtsjokJkis5RN1Pv-9bZhbKRCQ0Sde6xfIz87JdX54g6Mshhsz2OzYVXlG5bqtlzWt1vLvJniKEzuXvyl7x5jaU0qGFIq4QojIDxvtru57UVT0y4LDWS-6jv7qvtuSidaaPwyxdaeCHJ2a1-G0gt_DykXmchcuncaGb1PVlRp8WTw7U)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa7c07f0dde34af99822e17f138992f0&_e=JLa7HMuPxZVfX7lQcxtRzESOXy8ZHon3xh1qQW7qX2GiJSoAzVAcpiBLIcuPcz-DaoVwQHsx2WGIdDKCJe70Hdh4zddjqnUAJh7seo6OqknSPc211X5-TI_xWWUugoag2Si-cMigOtrnxDWjfQtsjie83aNNR0YzOBL244lyCHVuRMEbSCkNdKJo3XtFPYqNsdfkM-QR46tIH8ebnQDo1o-hapKhuqQZyLhCiMgcV4g5p5PDZvgygdLMF9UO1ad62UQSsIs2dAHuhaEld7zxG4FFRSoxBCE0T2y5WvNhHGQoSRvXP-q7T4GiLXsDUtSA)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa7c07f0dde34af99822e17f138992f0&_e=JLa7HMuPxZVfX7lQcxtRzESOXy8ZHon3xh1qQW7qX2GiJSoAzVAcpiBLIcuPcz-DaoVwQHsx2WGIdDKCJe70Hdh4zddjqnUAJh7seo6OqknSPc211X5-TI_xWWUugoag2Si-cMigOtrnxDWjfQtsjolsJxkvdT6afO-50YzJe7Nfb-DA_MTgBNJt5Lho5yae7T2yeaqEDxqGqYPWy5Avm5vxyVZHf9YRQ-tRL67czOepoaOz4X6017pm9SbloeE9jOrvaJ6C5Ex1Y8XkD9haopjUsGRqM13amnCpD6ltxV9GJbCrPl813EGi3ShnKstW) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa7c07f0dde34af99822e17f138992f0&_e=JLa7HMuPxZVfX7lQcxtRzESOXy8ZHon3xh1qQW7qX2GiJSoAzVAcpiBLIcuPcz-DaoVwQHsx2WGIdDKCJe70Hdh4zddjqnUAJh7seo6OqknSPc211X5-TI_xWWUugoag2Si-cMigOtrnxDWjfQtsjjK5s6bTwJ7B5BNGCAIGGoowPVG4EHb76TVB_O6MoRady3EZi_q-P7nBmu4YNY9yxH6X5JVfybte1MjObATnzeT9lUL3OoNkg15R4wtHRkhAbWFaZtudddmDP01CjONuM0f44s32YJf4sruiXCUx4NxWsBcG9WTZwKZdGL58PdGO)

[**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa7c07f0dde34af99822e17f138992f0&_e=JLa7HMuPxZVfX7lQcxtRzESOXy8ZHon3xh1qQW7qX2GiJSoAzVAcpiBLIcuPcz-DaoVwQHsx2WGIdDKCJe70Hdh4zddjqnUAJh7seo6OqknSPc211X5-TI_xWWUugoag2Si-cMigOtrnxDWjfQtsjmJYjV6AiO-AOpC7q4sUj7jZEhoLHP2dGqvrMOzajh88Bq-pctmI-aRBYEQCEHqTZp4GcuYlmluuvjDNlYTqTSSrVxXZzvAjb8i0o0vOhLdVl8AwKc0WxH_aTtCNyCTkD15yPU19qYxoO8si6HBGvS2dOWGv2Sczh7TOPhiB7PWf) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

body:
From the Desk of Senator Chase
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q81YVEu3AA4xfF5-zb-MZJ1LJCzK8HHnT8paBcsQS4B0wZ8mSCCfU8171HsnjmWno3VI0AESwftlgdbP5s9WS0qRpI6GfOQjMTMBI0lwDJ8-Rpmqr17dM4JFWAG9ofRfPR0tbJAWrGzL7aVwcbTY0a44FoCFAHxGlyTgUlmVjZU=&c=jGgq6o8ENCh8LF2dRHOUSWInFFMMhUXeUyT6XSGU6aT-PRjINRrAZg==&ch=8iTdpXqwS7JpqG7q_PGxUaY4ioWyOuuFgvQkg4xMUE3jwh0nAGQY-g==)
---
| CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Session Newsletter Week 5 of 7
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK?
---
| WEEK 5: GENERAL ASSEMBLY UPDATE
---
| |
---
| Senator Amanda Chase
---
Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years.
She has been rated as one of the most conservative Senator in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.
---
| Democrats Continued the Gun Grab
---
| 2023 SESSION WEEK 5 OVERVIEW Crossover Week
Dear Friends, The 2 days prior to "cross over" are the longest and hardest, as the Virginia Senate must finish voting on all bills before Tuesday midnight. Other than amendments to the budget, all of our work on Senate bills must come to completion because Wednesday, February 8, the Senate begins hearing any House bills that made it out of the Republican controlled House.
Now what kind of bills do you think passed out of the Republican controlled Senate? And what kind of bills do you think passed the Democrat controlled Senate? I think you get the picture.
I wouldn't be surprised if most bills that passed the House will die in the Senate and most bills that made it out of the Senate will die in the House. We're pretty much canceling each other out.
While this doesn't seem productive, I'm thankful that many of these bad Senate bills will die in the Republican controlled House.
Remember when the "Democrat Trifecta" passed and signed into law every liberal bill they could get through for a 2 year period? I'm so thankful that when a bad Senate bill passes the Senate, it will most likely die.
Unfortunately, that peace of mind expires this year, as we're all up for re-election. That's 140 seats. 100 in the House and 40 in the Senate. All seats are in newly drawn districts in which many incumbent senators will actually face off against fellow incumbents or face retirement.
While I'm thankful that I'm the only incumbent with an address in Senate District 12, both of my opponents Tina Ramirez and Glenn Sturtevant are not explaining to voters that they are running against one of the most conservative Republicans in the Virginia Senate. While I believe the seat belongs to the people, not politicians; it is important that we spend our resources against Democrats not incumbent Republicans who have a history of being re-elected.
That said, I do support term limits. I have introduced term limit legislation every year for the 8 years I've been in office. But other self-serving politicians kill this bill every year.
So it doesn't bother me that at least half of the Senate will turnover this year. In fact, when we return in January 2024 the entire General Assembly will experience a great reset.
Many of our more senior members have already announced they are retiring, like Democrat Senators Dick Saslaw and Janet Howell. So has Republican Jill Vogel.
Personally, I'm really looking forward to the New Virginia Senate after what I call the "Great Reset of the General Assembly." We need new blood in the General Assembly.
That said, we must keep the House and win back the Senate. This Tuesday, June 20 I humbly ask you to vote for me in the Republican Primary and again on Tuesday, November 7 in the General Election. Elections have consequences and determine your quality of life and freedoms. You can trust me. You know my 8 year solid conservative voting record and you know I stand up for the people of my district.
This week we voted on a number of 2nd Amendment bills. So, this week I will highlight a number of gun bills that passed out of the Democrat controlled Senate and should be killed in the House. We also battled through budget amendments and Governor's appointments. 3 of those appointments didn't make it through the Democrat controlled Virginia Senate.
We've seen first hand that just because a Republican has an R by their name doesn't mean they're going to defend gun rights. In fact, we've seen an increasing number of "Republicans" vote for gun control. Now more than ever VOTING RECORDS MATTER.
Currently, we have 3 Republican Senators that sometimes vote with Democrats on gun control measures. That's 3 Republican Senators out of 18 or 17% of our Republican Senators who vote for gun control. And now, my former seatmate who voted for anti-American red flag laws and lost the seat in 2019, wants to run against me.
Gun owners can't trust Glenn Sturtevant. He's already proven we can't count on him.
This week, just look at how much gun bills were voted on. Let me summarize for you some of the bad Senate gun bills that made it out of the Senate.
I voted against all bills that are a direct threat to the 2nd Amendment
SB1382- assault weapon and magazine ban
Democrat Senator Creigh Deeds introduced [SB 1382](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q81YVEu3AA4xfF5-zb-MZJ1LJCzK8HHnT8paBcsQS4B0wZ8mSCCfUyxkyVs6PuoPbB9uKRYK-HkG81NoChmn0LpVKkIvL2OeXQiUbtuSjJMus0_Hm1f1ndobmhYtbrRZHNciCTakGftmw1Xp3bZqYdO4YXk5BzDCXsDlozx_bIJKN9hkf_n0Fx6xHuhd5OuGFbRyJLd3J6G5EyQo36rVHWuXRDfl7d00&c=jGgq6o8ENCh8LF2dRHOUSWInFFMMhUXeUyT6XSGU6aT-PRjINRrAZg==&ch=8iTdpXqwS7JpqG7q_PGxUaY4ioWyOuuFgvQkg4xMUE3jwh0nAGQY-g==) which targets "assault firearms" and certain ammunition feeding devices; purchase, possession, etc., prohibited.
SB1382 creates a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person who imports, sells, manufactures, purchases, possesses, transports, or transfers an assault firearm, as that term is defined in the bill, and prohibits a person who has been convicted of such violation from purchasing, possessing, or transporting a firearm for a period of three years from the date of conviction.
The bill provides that an assault firearm does not include any firearm that is an antique firearm, has been rendered permanently inoperable, is manually operated by bolt, pump, lever, or slide action, or was manufactured before July 1, 2023.
The bill also prohibits the sale of a large capacity ammunition feeding device, as that term is defined in the bill. The bill provides that any person who willfully and intentionally (i) sells an assault firearm to another person or (ii) purchases an assault firearm from another person is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor and that any person who imports, sells, barters, or transfers a large capacity ammunition feeding device is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor.
The bill also makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person younger than 21 years of age to import, sell, manufacture, purchase, possess, transport, or transfer an assault firearm regardless of the date of manufacture of such assault firearm.
Wait a minute. So you can serve in the Armed Forces at age 18 and learn how to use assault firearms but when you return home, you lose that right? This makes no sense.
Here's the vote.
floor: 01/31/23 Senate: Read third time and passed Senate (23-Y 16-N)
YEAS--Barker, Bell, Boysko, Deeds, Dunnavant, Ebbin, Edwards, Favola, Hashmi, Howell, Locke, Lucas, Marsden, Mason, McClellan, McPike, Morrissey, Norment, Petersen, Rouse, Saslaw, Spruill, Surovell--23.
NAYS--Chase, Cosgrove, DeSteph, Hackworth, Hanger, Lewis, McDougle, Newman, Obenshain, Peake, Pillion, Reeves, Ruff, Stanley, Stuart, Suetterlein--16. RULE 36--0. NOT VOTING--Vogel--1.
Thankfully this bill died in the House 5 to 3.

SB1067 - Expansion of Red Flag Laws
On Monday, the Senate voted 23-16 to [advance a bill](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q81YVEu3AA4xfF5-zb-MZJ1LJCzK8HHnT8paBcsQS4B0wZ8mSCCfUyxkyVs6PuoPrQ5jhQaBsiEjmgSK2g7fjQ6-QkzS9I4RuXEwVeCrHjIKkQk7pteKgRY99iwGJnj_1EM-j62hmt1s28Pt3PWKOogIo4dYiql_CaC8FCi4UiojTyZRi7_01Ph7lPrDPN_6vN6gnwo1XK0=&c=jGgq6o8ENCh8LF2dRHOUSWInFFMMhUXeUyT6XSGU6aT-PRjINRrAZg==&ch=8iTdpXqwS7JpqG7q_PGxUaY4ioWyOuuFgvQkg4xMUE3jwh0nAGQY-g==) [SB1067](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q81YVEu3AA4xfF5-zb-MZJ1LJCzK8HHnT8paBcsQS4B0wZ8mSCCfUyxkyVs6PuoPrQ5jhQaBsiEjmgSK2g7fjQ6-QkzS9I4RuXEwVeCrHjIKkQk7pteKgRY99iwGJnj_1EM-j62hmt1s28Pt3PWKOogIo4dYiql_CaC8FCi4UiojTyZRi7_01Ph7lPrDPN_6vN6gnwo1XK0=&c=jGgq6o8ENCh8LF2dRHOUSWInFFMMhUXeUyT6XSGU6aT-PRjINRrAZg==&ch=8iTdpXqwS7JpqG7q_PGxUaY4ioWyOuuFgvQkg4xMUE3jwh0nAGQY-g==) by Democrat Senator Scott Surovell that would expand Virginia's red flag law.
A red flag law is a common term for substantial risk orders. These orders allow law enforcement and prosecutors to petition courts to temporarily prohibit possession, purchase or transportation of firearms from people who have been deemed a risk to themselves or others. My problem with red flag laws is that they deny the accused due process for up to 10 days.
SB 1067 Substantial risk orders; substantial risk factors and considerations. floor: 01/30/23 Senate: Read third time and passed Senate (23-Y 16-N)
YEAS--Barker, Bell, Boysko, Deeds, Ebbin, Edwards, Favola, Hanger, Hashmi, Howell, Lewis, Locke, Lucas, Marsden, Mason, McClellan, McPike, Morrissey, Petersen, Rouse, Saslaw, Spruill, Surovell--23.
NAYS--Chase, Cosgrove, DeSteph, Dunnavant, Hackworth, McDougle, Newman, Norment, Obenshain, Peake, Pillion, Reeves, Ruff, Stanley, Stuart, Suetterlein--16. RULE 36--0. NOT VOTING--Vogel--1.
The only Senate gun-control bill still left alive is SB 1067, Surovell, which expands the reach of the Red Flag law. It just got assigned to the House Courts of Justice committee. It will probably get heard next week.

The state Senate voted 22-17 for Democrat Senator Adam Ebbin's [SB1181](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q81YVEu3AA4xfF5-zb-MZJ1LJCzK8HHnT8paBcsQS4B0wZ8mSCCfUyxkyVs6PuoPkYN7zmulkNa_9eglv7rybLtV50Zf3z2zjfoZec8ErIiV_RY_rzLB2FdqxmQcxytk3UYivq8tw9b675bpM3Uo_3-VGnXuihPDJp_zfVVGoSSne2rzxnoxcGJyDSEVVLOKupnuoD_sB04=&c=jGgq6o8ENCh8LF2dRHOUSWInFFMMhUXeUyT6XSGU6aT-PRjINRrAZg==&ch=8iTdpXqwS7JpqG7q_PGxUaY4ioWyOuuFgvQkg4xMUE3jwh0nAGQY-g==) along party lines to [ban the sale of so-called ghost guns](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q81YVEu3AA4xfF5-zb-MZJ1LJCzK8HHnT8paBcsQS4B0wZ8mSCCfUyxkyVs6PuoPkYN7zmulkNa_9eglv7rybLtV50Zf3z2zjfoZec8ErIiV_RY_rzLB2FdqxmQcxytk3UYivq8tw9b675bpM3Uo_3-VGnXuihPDJp_zfVVGoSSne2rzxnoxcGJyDSEVVLOKupnuoD_sB04=&c=jGgq6o8ENCh8LF2dRHOUSWInFFMMhUXeUyT6XSGU6aT-PRjINRrAZg==&ch=8iTdpXqwS7JpqG7q_PGxUaY4ioWyOuuFgvQkg4xMUE3jwh0nAGQY-g==), homemade firearms without serial numbers typically assembled using 3D printers, or the components used to build one.
SB 1181 Unfinished frames or receivers and unserialized firearms; sale, transfer, or purchase, penalty.
The measure makes it [a Class 1 misdemeanor](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q81YVEu3AA4xfF5-zb-MZJ1LJCzK8HHnT8paBcsQS4B0wZ8mSCCfUyxkyVs6PuoPYCjhh9E07PMN7BalZNXkcHsCPVModUwSs8aemYOMYmyyEJwwq36j1wrmROYrG7xez25dgSwLyHPwlzheAUz0txjPMzyIe6z2usMY3MFUWgfBCZJ4dOuouzi_62Ga-yOtVLQOcPPwRFEtIKn4GsXcmx0hS-kojZKAqHunS93alTWUVDZ842V-75xlHWhzTrVgW8un0NeJPETQWti_08FZHPebg3tsB12ehruWYfwmxtn_wyfJmLxbtANvEovBNpz1VPQi-aO55FJ9hXH67KGUQFw9JAPvVpk9gwooD00Ia0Hj5drOX1VJw9j-Wj3aPhCcZaIzZ9h604Y=&c=jGgq6o8ENCh8LF2dRHOUSWInFFMMhUXeUyT6XSGU6aT-PRjINRrAZg==&ch=8iTdpXqwS7JpqG7q_PGxUaY4ioWyOuuFgvQkg4xMUE3jwh0nAGQY-g==), which carries up to a year in jail and a $2,500 fine, for those knowingly selling or offering to sell, transfer or buy them unless they are a federal firearms importer, dealer or manufacturer.
There is also an exception if "the unfinished frame or receiver is required by federal law to be, and has been, imprinted with a serial number by a federal firearms importer, manufacturer, or dealer."
Violators charged with any subsequent offense could face [a Class 4 felony charge](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q81YVEu3AA4xfF5-zb-MZJ1LJCzK8HHnT8paBcsQS4B0wZ8mSCCfUyxkyVs6PuoPix_sBl3tiHXR9HdsOY177iFSzrSDcKFIsqexHytdOXY-DkWZAiLaqV2kFauHZXNYnrdtyc2DXQT-STsMg7np4dmv5uokRjEx1o8vvcwr_M9b6VsDKjVtjopD6q6e43l9RxCikLQCMkMzKHAQfqco-g==&c=jGgq6o8ENCh8LF2dRHOUSWInFFMMhUXeUyT6XSGU6aT-PRjINRrAZg==&ch=8iTdpXqwS7JpqG7q_PGxUaY4ioWyOuuFgvQkg4xMUE3jwh0nAGQY-g==), which carries up to a 10-year sentence and a $100,000 fine.

SB1192 - Assault Weapon and Magazine Ban
The Senate also passed a bill [SB1192](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q81YVEu3AA4xfF5-zb-MZJ1LJCzK8HHnT8paBcsQS4B0wZ8mSCCfUyxkyVs6PuoPgY5HE64sgPZD1-TT2suFGbRAaXFYwQxGZiQptZQGa5giENl-u1zgAp5t0GcSCTQw-hCFUOdGc-Bo_hrfmtQpofbGnmSMkXyRq2dUvTN7H7tVZpQQ73gBg4iPBUjaHH9g4Bdp8Zo9Bc4=&c=jGgq6o8ENCh8LF2dRHOUSWInFFMMhUXeUyT6XSGU6aT-PRjINRrAZg==&ch=8iTdpXqwS7JpqG7q_PGxUaY4ioWyOuuFgvQkg4xMUE3jwh0nAGQY-g==) that prohibits people from carrying certain assault weapons in public on a 21-18 vote, with state Sen. Lynwood W. Lewis Jr., D-Accomack, siding with Republicans in opposition.
The legislation would ban certain semi-automatic center-fire rifles, pistols, and shotguns in public spaces, including streets, sidewalks and parks. Under Virginia law, the ban on guns in public spaces is only in certain localities and applies to certain loaded guns.
The bill would apply to firearms that are unloaded and expand the group of semi-automatic center-fire rifles, pistols and shotguns banned in public.
Among other criteria, the proposal would remove the requirement that the banned weapon have a magazine capable of holding more than 20 rounds of ammunition or designed to include a silencer or "equipped with a folding stock."
SB 1192 Assault firearms; carrying in public areas prohibited, penalty.

The bill passed the Senate 22-Y 16-N with the help of Republican Senator Siobhan Dunnavant.
Violations of the proposed law, which would require gun dealers to post notices at their stores informing customers about the consequences of improper gun storage, would be a misdemeanor offense punishable by fines of up to $250.
