_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8d10d1ebdda45da8bbfe4d9fb0067fa&_e=iI-My8rpbKW5HGKDLs1v9jxiXafqNZ3yGJL7H42TaIf_-sdq-Vsmi9QkDfhp0Fo5R9RPdT27nnann6j3xZiBzP_TiOtlXK6GhvmqCcXSwd8dDjQBfqqbLUTJU2V1o1pPHf83hhHE2xSloFTpNA1LX8NEo-FRPAwb9TCVX5qvLsgr-1CC8U6Jh52SzbJe78IVKIsOjrOj7BS687JS4Ii07QFFTP7--moqhV-ZW4HmuEXK7RGMw_7zbKvmhqXS2j6JpsjXfE2PKoO0ZN2tLqV26hGoUj64AaZx7UVDGmcjsDE%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8d10d1ebdda45da8bbfe4d9fb0067fa&_e=iI-My8rpbKW5HGKDLs1v9jxiXafqNZ3yGJL7H42TaIf_-sdq-Vsmi9QkDfhp0Fo5R9RPdT27nnann6j3xZiBzP_TiOtlXK6GhvmqCcXSwd8dDjQBfqqbLUTJU2V1o1pPHf83hhHE2xSloFTpNA1LXzcSX5CwOXB58dnGzlwENcjsaQ29lBvqk2qc-qyDGvenkzllDnh5UwVZaryKGSxMUZ-M6eF_xmWvU21TIAIb1mZSTe8oGL-DLoRr367akD14PC6OxIqrghBSa_xfw1ODwSlZBwmmWIdRN7pmlJzcfFc%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8d10d1ebdda45da8bbfe4d9fb0067fa&_e=iI-My8rpbKW5HGKDLs1v9jxiXafqNZ3yGJL7H42TaIf_-sdq-Vsmi9QkDfhp0Fo5R9RPdT27nnann6j3xZiBzP_TiOtlXK6GhvmqCcXSwd8dDjQBfqqbLUTJU2V1o1pPHf83hhHE2xSloFTpNA1LX3m8navOYfsKrfe9wc1IiFVjouV5DUk4P45alSIlVWZTg4qLz2zQY-LUidHfcAW3KhRrf8Nm-Pe_s23Zd_immcdhqcoIcxxC3dpAGNIN15UtU7uvq3DEBvhSgdBwE4t2Y3kdJVELM6V1y6bYLMd7YXg%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8d10d1ebdda45da8bbfe4d9fb0067fa&_e=iI-My8rpbKW5HGKDLs1v9jxiXafqNZ3yGJL7H42TaIf_-sdq-Vsmi9QkDfhp0Fo5R9RPdT27nnann6j3xZiBzP_TiOtlXK6GhvmqCcXSwd8dDjQBfqqbLUTJU2V1o1pPHf83hhHE2xSloFTpNA1LX2F36dOIVtcOvbQKIaS5Addx3AiDFj7N6Gzrqcv2J63KriNMsBVdd0csAu-XintcGToBECSZyrlpGGwCM4ZKgXqo3YBE7ho1xKGZHRESe7eckUQAIyWDeVtQaoHnkmkhC3QhxL15DMU7G6bjZeOfoY0%3D)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8d10d1ebdda45da8bbfe4d9fb0067fa&_e=iI-My8rpbKW5HGKDLs1v9jxiXafqNZ3yGJL7H42TaIf_-sdq-Vsmi9QkDfhp0Fo5R9RPdT27nnann6j3xZiBzP_TiOtlXK6GhvmqCcXSwd8dDjQBfqqbLUTJU2V1o1pPHf83hhHE2xSloFTpNA1LXxyuH1C-u9r0mD575w7rmZRQh1za9CNaG8evPg9XtFVe3kuOhfpZFzLIbRKsB4I4WccigspVAA4XbSLHUMbWqFJMb4WxdRP8mKr4s11M_cxOEmFIHtkuf-WpWesQJ92PqKSuTzoE6ffsrqximQzMltY%3D) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: A slap in the face
body:
HERE’S WHAT YOU NEED TO KNOW: | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=748cbb5ab8e4476a902f3b668d3d5511&_t=j7rKBt2WXoEIt_9_eU5uIkEYFaAJIvpQCEMnAlBWH8zsL9851Aeb-1ivhZ5eyCN1K3IgeQ7ibkkh3KpKYXvtNTM15ZM4NrHk1nHJoZHeUy4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=748cbb5ab8e4476a902f3b668d3d5511&_t=j7rKBt2WXoEIt_9_eU5uIkEYFaAJIvpQCEMnAlBWH8zsL9851Aeb-1ivhZ5eyCN1K3IgeQ7ibkkh3KpKYXvtNTM15ZM4NrHk1nHJoZHeUy4%3D)

| First, Joe Biden instituted an unconstitutional COVID vaccine mandate and fired over 8,000 military members.

Then, thanks to our hard work, the Pentagon officially ditched the mandate for our troops.

But NOW, our military members just received another slap in the face from the Biden Administration.

_**HERE 'S WHAT YOU NEED TO KNOW:**_

**The brave men and women who refused to comply with the COVID vaccine mandate haven 't been reinstated and are now REQUIRED to pay back their recruitment bonuses.**

We secured the first major win by repealing the mandate, _**[but your work can't stop here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=748cbb5ab8e4476a902f3b668d3d5511&_e=RmbdRmS_2uPhZgiZbvJddMrmu4CAzhuknTYWgdBv4COGJf1TKML5r2NpN7oXFuewQ1CnorJIktzeIhpbILR9lnOwZpo58mZm7IUTpKBN0xmNLQRcaL826PAXIUKVSgHtHDWLdAp9coH1M_qW60CGXdn0buUcemMvQK4Ap57CNeAG2YN0o1Qh2j4uIjEWlj9tzH9RRO-rwP9-BoU27Fewx0-qw1sch9jMU1DECIRlk-z9aMIAScbGh0Hyz8sW46xXvdVd55wR8xQfOzqpOQQMZEKcdz0EClr9528Hy8bkEP0puGCXX-zMYUoSNz5VG8XmiDOUQHcf4erWYNdyvK3riUdEWEoKzm9YHfWgdpsRuA_q8K6sDo5bQtJL2AxS9LLNQ9KsQe0vrsf9rGauYLNiaboy5mApfqjS9v7fwCzIR3n4B-b-pH-lkcxNEw1iah6I_VQMz59MkhOv9TSkmg96bmZ1EYZ57-h-Ax92J0r66RVqXQZxBzXhPBOUPZjEtZ4np1omxzzrB62JTWx293yCKQ%3D%3D "but your work can’t stop here.")**_

This treatment of our military by Joe Biden is frankly inexcusable and is a devastating blow. I have spent countless hours on the Senate floor advocating for the reinstatement and back pay of these troops, but I cannot win this uphill battle alone.

_**[I need your help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=748cbb5ab8e4476a902f3b668d3d5511&_e=RmbdRmS_2uPhZgiZbvJddMrmu4CAzhuknTYWgdBv4COGJf1TKML5r2NpN7oXFuewQ1CnorJIktzeIhpbILR9lnOwZpo58mZm7IUTpKBN0xmNLQRcaL826PAXIUKVSgHtHDWLdAp9coH1M_qW60CGXdn0buUcemMvQK4Ap57CNeAG2YN0o1Qh2j4uIjEWlj9tzH9RRO-rwP9-BoU27Fewx0-qw1sch9jMU1DECIRlk-z9aMIAScbGh0Hyz8sW46xXvdVd55wR8xQfOzqpOQQMZEKcdz0EClr9528Hy8bkEP0puGCXX-zMYUoSNz5VG8XmiDOUQHcf4erWYNdyvK3riUdEWEoKzm9YHfWgdpsRuA-I9U_e7cFJnvgrjCyX6qQzHKPg51TjDORo-0UZDcnW7XQ_U_fIUbbE-9cXJrvCT1pt6M_IFea2LxIUHUT1Wc78er6oXH6_81lpJKPN8ZGl5C6-8oj9hraqhEmmM2PlUv3md4nQvRqoWMMUzQ_HOWyLxahnmFIgDyPxyahaCHd7lQ%3D%3D "I need your help.")**_

We must join together _immediately_ to demand that the Biden administration allow these wrongfully fired troops to be back paid and reinstated. Joe Biden is dragging his feet in righting the wrong that he caused.

So, I need to know... _**[Can I count on you to support my efforts to reinstate and back pay American troops who were fired due to the now overruled COVID vaccine mandate?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=748cbb5ab8e4476a902f3b668d3d5511&_e=RmbdRmS_2uPhZgiZbvJddMrmu4CAzhuknTYWgdBv4COGJf1TKML5r2NpN7oXFuewQ1CnorJIktzeIhpbILR9lnOwZpo58mZm7IUTpKBN0xmNLQRcaL826PAXIUKVSgHtHDWLdAp9coH1M_qW60CGXdn0buUcemMvQK4Ap57CNeAG2YN0o1Qh2j4uIjEWlj9tzH9RRO-rwP9-BoU27Fewx0-qw1sch9jMU1DECIRlk-z9aMIAScbGh0Hyz8sW46xXvdVd55wR8xQfOzqpOQQMZEKcdz0EClr9528Hy8bkEP0puGCXX-zMYUoSNz5VG8XmiDOUQHcf4erWYNdyvK3riUdEWEoKzm9YHfWgdpsRuA-XOqXeApJnvbWRTARfFMtUjwLcr5QYywV2RNRE_hVSFmzqV586rtCuQUUrrG9mCwoudo0j0OeUMLqpe5D3e2VRWkfU_MJOC6pUaHqgHrprkqmYLj3aCmzIolZ43AOPZ2RvxWBSvZbkACNfSGn7r5TODK1USDYHaRVQHsfuxHK8bA%3D%3D "Can I count on your support my efforts to reinstate and backpay American troops who were fired due to the now overruled COVID vaccine mandate?")**_

name: Sen. Scott
subject: It keeps getting worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
It’s shocking.

Joe Biden said Republicans “haven’t been serious” about the crisis at our border.

Peter, we’re the ONLY ones who are serious about what’s happening at our Southern Border.

_**We started the Wall under President Trump.** _

**We stood by our bold border patrol agents.**

**And we held criminals accountable for coming into our country illegally. **

**But what have Biden and the Democrats done to secure our border?_A _bsolutely nothing.__**

**It’s time to hold the Biden Administration accountable for open borders and keep America safe.[Join us today to BUILD THE WALL and STOP our border crisis once and for all.>>>](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7b52b2db58ec4d62bf302156b74d5a27&_e=WUISkB9HSFLn5or1W96Is_cJmjidiNCZWxuFjIBCq4LU1eI-BAB60OwdQFvd7LQBnctHkF1fNJam8eYVmDFytg0g8c8l4ES_z18UPMfDjuYc_2OXGIlfmhCQF3TCg3QnjAuYndKjL0uhffvyWl7eBRaQWbOxIj05m-gdXQLQuLsbrLsb0t0t7_9p0Q0KA04Uf2xG32KyDci2Ix-3CfNv7upD14YpdCE9k4khoXnR_qf_sRoMyB3YMtaD4_g1RRBJHHd17n47LA0mM-i7_yNJdbp63i__cE8K6AADpcpTkS8mRxRURZX3snkNa2Dctk63Z_bKgF7uBSDkkGUhtFuegHLufO9D2zJ4gqqCwNoVYAs%3D)**

| | The only person Joe Biden should blame for our border crisis is staring back at him in the mirror.

On top of REFUSING to hold criminals accountable at our border, his woke Democrat colleagues are branding any sort of border enforcement as “racist” and “inhumane.”

clean_body: Read on for a more in-depth look at President Biden’s speech → | | | Peter -- Did you catch President Biden’s second State of the Union address on Tuesday? In his remarks, he touched on topics like the economy, the historic legislation we passed together, and what the future looks like for our nation. He reminded the country that America is a story of progress and resilience made possible by a strong democracy and that together -- with the support of this grassroots team -- we can deliver for the American people and finish the job. | | | Read on for a more in-depth look at President Biden’s speech → Standing up for Social Security and Medicare 💪 Some Republicans are coming for Medicare and Social Security. They have repeatedly demonstrated they are hellbent on gutting these programs -- but President Biden is ready to fight for our seniors. President Biden has promised he will veto any legislation that cuts Social Security or Medicare -- benefits that millions of Americans rely on -- and is working to not only protect, but strengthen Social Security and Medicare and lower health care costs. | | Post-SOTU Reactions 🗣️ Check out what Democrats across the country have been saying about President Biden’s State of the Union address: “It was the best State of the Union speech I’ve ever heard! Proud of the Democratic accomplishments.” -- Laura “It was a great address. I celebrated by making a big contribution last night.” -- Nancy “President Biden was brilliant. Our friends and family agree he ‘knocked it out of the park.’ ” -- Cal “Fabulous speech. One of the best State of the Union speeches in the last 40 years that I’ve been watching. Superb record for the past two years.” -- Richardo “I thought he did a great job! Very inspiring and brought his A game!!” -- Dian | | Newest addition to our store 🛍️ Under President Biden’s leadership, Democrats have made immense progress. But there’s more work to do and that’s why President Biden said we need to finish the job \-- what better way to show your support for all our progress than by making a purchase in the Official Democratic Store? | | Looking ahead → Peter, we’ve made amazing strides. From holding our Senate majority in 2022 to passing critical legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act and the Respect for Marriage Act, President Biden is delivering for the people. But let’s be honest, none of this would have been possible without this grassroots team. Until next week, Team Joe | ---|--- | |

name: Replace Sinema
subject: NEWS: Sinema is running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, She’s running.... While Sinema is still playing coy about running for re-election, we know she’s full steam ahead because she keeps raising money into her account. And where’s that money coming from? Wall Street, of course. **And specifically: private equity.** Just today, Puck News reported that the **CEO of private equity firm** **Blackstone** held a fundraiser for Sinema at his house in Palm Beach. Blackstone's private equity business has been one of the largest investors in leveraged buyouts in the last three decades. So of course, they owe Sinema a great deal of thanks after she protected the carried interest loophole in the Inflation Reduction Act. Sinema sold out Arizona to Wall Street and we’re going to make sure every voter knows it in 2024, **[donate now to help us fund our first TV ad >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcoOS2mZg5CdxcqQjqzKbQkIINOrcH02Ua08-Mo1D0Knyhz9so-mAdLh_QQqZcL7INa6Vq8qPo8cqUwb44W_LEAfFFsHjuMkL6TQXagyXTnBzKyG2uqCYkMFEiZjNFkoxa6DnpZsrg9pyIWxBLX6M9ftt07M7m8eWFj_9XRYB8e38K8VZ8t-GGYuM-sIm8b3Q90Uv2Xf_f2ce4MYSHEolMCrT3V4ctKg65OQVYOx97Nurd7VG5FzE36Mwl0pU7lcH1pgwcFXSvvVBDDVCmWfCyXw/3tl/7cbFhXBwTJ2mG-NuhIYOMQ/h0/b7Zm1GN-F_DU2-vBBEZnrULwwPhOYVmVmB_qePiBh_Y)**
Sinema was also reportedly at the No Labels conference last weekend, which despite promoting itself as a bipartisan policy organization is actually just a front for Wall Street that raises dark money from right-wing billionaires like the Kochs and Peter Thiel, and that worked to derail President Biden’s agenda. No Labels even praised Sinema in the past for obstructing tax increases on billionaires and corporations. We all know Sinema is a tool of special interests. Her work to keep the carried interest loophole open was an $18 billion gift per year to Wall Street, particularly private equity. And she’s been rewarded handsomely, with millions of dollars in campaign contributions. Sinema still hasn’t announced whether she’s running again, but her fundraising hasn’t slowed down one bit. And that’s why we need to do everything we can, right now, to make sure Arizonans understand what’s at stake and why she must be replaced. **[Please donate now and help us fund our very first TV ad >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcoOS2mZg5CdxcqQjqzKbQkP_W2_WMSS8Ughhdnvbb_RQsyD6TzC_2dlo9diMDdN32NNeHXm2XOZzVHz6hfr-sBN53EHloW2Bwh4f9_mJRD0VCC_vpbM5i3wDg4n6PT9vC-mwwXToF88OVzPeFlyWNqpWgV1ahge32SQiwxlRUOrAEQKkdagsoKAOyMA3XdOrnAKuG6gafcyESHsFPf-_DAkNEOEJhP2e99Cn-csugIMw-A_ROc2SMH8QWA9xUkd3__OXNldzgOz9nv6DbysmGmA/3tl/7cbFhXBwTJ2mG-NuhIYOMQ/h1/awm2kfxBSzWtP1vLBsFVLtV88dPje4PV8Kdmx4gIafQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $7 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcPNzKAqJGJ1I8rBND8mjDzWAhPSnkxjXhITLpgEBbqGP3LEaEZKTvlbB_yshGm-1IxppTkVtieg-dgTAUaFXqnbCmSEqnK-RdG1KqS_uaAcFD3OODZkAr-o6xur_qcNN7BNkPgRLzCDXTxzhrGNv4DuJoKS_qs-O_BtHu-_AF_AC2JsFghfZwFZUtNKTdYRYFcHmwoTGU1Zuuq6giaWK3NBVRrYQCn7n7nvx0bcAr038A1p0BAuOK0yRbt0tc1kZWKgeuOlhYpR9OJom5Gz5PNoOs7lS-UPZ1rKv0mSws-f-1m1dZW3BJZI01mSeJpz-fhcoHHiYyZnBz-SFpPDK8vA/3tl/7cbFhXBwTJ2mG-NuhIYOMQ/h2/bpM9REwTwhq7yPqjjPs9X9RvrXT4PihtvKJ-VLmgULA)

Blackstone's private equity business has been one of the largest investors in leveraged buyouts in the last three decades. So of course, they owe Sinema a great deal of thanks after she protected the carried interest loophole in the Inflation Reduction Act. Sinema sold out Arizona to Wall Street and we’re going to make sure every voter knows it in 2024, Sinema was also reportedly at the No Labels conference last weekend, which despite promoting itself as a bipartisan policy organization is actually just a front for Wall Street that raises dark money from right-wing billionaires like the Kochs and Peter Thiel, and that worked to derail President Biden’s agenda. No Labels even praised Sinema in the past for obstructing tax increases on billionaires and corporations. We all know Sinema is a tool of special interests. Her work to keep the carried interest loophole open was an $18 billion gift per year to Wall Street, particularly private equity. And she’s been rewarded handsomely, with millions of dollars in campaign contributions. Sinema still hasn’t announced whether she’s running again, but her fundraising hasn’t slowed down one bit. And that’s why we need to do everything we can, right now, to make sure Arizonans understand what’s at stake and why she must be replaced. | Dear Patriot, This week, Joe Biden stood up in front of the entire nation and delivered his State of the Union speech. It was full of lies, distortions, and fake news. Here's the real state of our union in 2023: the border is wide open, crime is up, inflation is rampant, and Europe is at war! Biden and his radical left administration are trying to destroy our nation. But we will never let him. name: Team Jayapal
subject: Tell Congress: Ban ALL assault weapons now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
**Peter, it’s time to ban assault weapons. Do you agree?** [**Add your name to our petition to ban ALL assault weapons in America »**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/assault-weapons-bans-20230210?source=em20230210-2153&t=1&akid=2153%2E420207%2EJAz7T1) **[Sign the Petition »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/assault-weapons-bans-20230210?source=em20230210-2153&t=2&akid=2153%2E420207%2EJAz7T1)**
---
We must end the senseless epidemic of gun violence in our country. In 2022 and already in 2023, we’ve been rocked by mass shooting after mass shooting, grieving for communities all over the nation. Enough is enough.
**That’s why last year, the House passed a bill to ban assault weapons -- the first time a bill like this has passed since 1994.** And last week, House Democrats re-introduced the bill at the start of Gun Violence Survivors Week.
We need to pass the bill ASAP -- but despite the bipartisan vote last year, there will almost certainly be Republicans who will try to stall this critical legislation.
This is not the time to politicize gun violence -- it’s time for action for all of the survivors, families, and communities who are grieving. It’s time to commit to keeping our communities safe by keeping assault weapons off the streets.
[**Add your name right now to stand with Pramila and show House leadership that we want a full ban on assault weapons and we won’t stop until it’s passed.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/assault-weapons-bans-20230210?source=em20230210-2153&t=3&akid=2153%2E420207%2EJAz7T1)
**[Add your name →](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/assault-weapons-bans-20230210?source=em20230210-2153&t=4&akid=2153%2E420207%2EJAz7T1)**
Thank you for taking action with Pramila today,
-- Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230210-2153-footer&t=5&refcode2=2153_420207_JAz7T1&akid=2153%2E420207%2EJAz7T1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2153%2E420207%2EJAz7T1)

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Democrats Gain Control of the PA State House, Again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Good evening, friends, advocates and voters.
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Congratulations to the three newly elected state representatives in Allegheny County. Matt Gergely (HD35), Abigail Salisbury (HD34), and Joe McAndrew (HD32) will all be sworn in by the end of the month ensuring the State House is becoming even more reflective of Pennsylvania’s electorate.
Despite this huge victory for our Commonwealth, our work continues. As a voting rights organization, we must protect our freedom to vote and push back against any policies that make it harder for constituents to cast their ballots. With a Democratic majority in the State House, we hope to see progressive policies such as; expanding voting rights, raising the minimum wage, fair funding for education and affordable housing as priorities for all the people of Pennsylvania.
Picture of Team NPP in Allegheny County during Get Out The Vote [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2458.jpg]
News You Can Use
After a Special Election Landslide in Allegheny County, What’s Next For Democrats and GOP? [https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ntXvGEqwGYyaPe7_zb1dZ0KZCmWhyPAfxpAG5I-GyrRdOu16SRx4KIg4KaWWAcVLXb9biEAM6H_B215r419WumwvlYqKydK0cmDW0ccwRysLwfdv6LOZM-lDpj846IVmaDuKtYBKLOzr05sNro6lzZ5Yl9VQocb5hOY6zivRX3f1fS2fzf8iB1Xo-jEbMxu4Jp7dSbD2bZxbtNP9nTuSBkZZa04CTEcBZBzYLFVmYcvX0qbTREYkc_FFrbXKhToIAyZszkrBYospLqqi2KBR6Iwjf-CRfPK4X1_TyaREC7M=&c=hA6TFoLazcJBJFO0ROtYjf-OP8SIyZd-lPvQhBt7GoIqku-7grwVUA==&ch=e2dJM8P2dUyiVsCsomzlM0S8B_bvUEhS6muHVhlgnAzHdv5Bz8Bl5Q==] (WESA)
“It’s tempting sometimes to see special elections as harbingers of races to come — if only because those races often take place when there isn’t much else for pundits to talk about.”
Advocates Call For Action To Fund PA Schools After Landmark Court Decision . [https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ntXvGEqwGYyaPe7_zb1dZ0KZCmWhyPAfxpAG5I-GyrRdOu16SRx4KIg4KaWWAcVLaiI-LFabxhmvxOvRRbaj1ClPE_CdAa5WYiGD12qsXdyCfkXEg9J7s9FK_vfetZLoUuqOAZxVQTfyv_KmrbAhjk_M2kMTqBJseWprbBh29ZuQjZwQYuNHVjhSVPgVEcbQHxR73wbwmac6O76MtSI6Eh7Ifwgh16l08veYL0ug2XdEEpwRoo1kSrtEOB2q0jLuJrHxmUfBfA99ymbh-2DIoXe336EcHUIY&c=hA6TFoLazcJBJFO0ROtYjf-OP8SIyZd-lPvQhBt7GoIqku-7grwVUA==&ch=e2dJM8P2dUyiVsCsomzlM0S8B_bvUEhS6muHVhlgnAzHdv5Bz8Bl5Q==] (PennLive)
“The representatives of the statewide PA Schools Work coalition said Tuesday’s Commonwealth Court decision is “a game changer” for children and the parents of Pennsylvania.”
Rozzi Says House Will Vote on Rules, Reforms on Feb. 21 . [https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ntXvGEqwGYyaPe7_zb1dZ0KZCmWhyPAfxpAG5I-GyrRdOu16SRx4KIg4KaWWAcVLh0js9EP4xY2t0a3t0_Y6QHZtjc0Vfzk2vNmnVDj80cxspVmzCn0UfLej8OC6nQLUOvZdkuSYmgb7avlEUeKHk15M7FZV5czvwyI6g38hdsE94TGVsskIoeq81b_pOxeaIDYIIUny1udk-_iRG9kQsGBnfZBf0KZvkTnog_NbdqV1qWLlPxoljxgIj4pZNQZFcJ0rcBNKN2M=&c=hA6TFoLazcJBJFO0ROtYjf-OP8SIyZd-lPvQhBt7GoIqku-7grwVUA==&ch=e2dJM8P2dUyiVsCsomzlM0S8B_bvUEhS6muHVhlgnAzHdv5Bz8Bl5Q==] (City & State)
“State House Speaker Mark Rozzi said Thursday that the chamber will reconvene on Tuesday, Feb. 21 to vote on operating rules and a stalled proposal to give child sex abuse victims a legal window to sue their abusers – a move that could end more than a month of gridlock in the chamber. ”
Picture of NPP Regional Organizing Director, Ben Gillespie in McKeesport, Allegheny County with door hanger while door knocking. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Screen%20Shot%202023-02-10%20at%204.37.45%20PM.png]
#TeamNPP GOTV in Allegheny
#Team NPP got out the vote in Allegheny’s State House District 35 special election We had nine staff members knocking on doors and canvassing neighborhoods over a twelve day period, leading up to the election. Our team on the ground knocked on 7,000 doors. In addition to canvasing, NPP staff on the other side of the state made more than 2,600 phone calls in two days into McKeesport, White Oak and Munhall homes to remind voters to make their voices heard at the polls.
NPP Phone Banking Testimonial
From Katy, Director of Development and Policy:
"On Election Day, I spoke with a voter who was not aware that she currently lived in a district without representation. When I explained to her that her vote would not only decide who represents her but also control of the state house, she was extremely excited to make sure a trip to her polling place was in her plans!"
Picture of Senior Community Engagement Associate, Rick Hicks in on the ground in Allegheny County during Get Out The Vote. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2421.JPG]
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition.
In solidarity, and GO BIRDS!
Team NPP

Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023
Last day to register to vote [https://click.everyaction.com/k/58465033/391164800/747805259?emci=23ef6a6d-af7c-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=2355510&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiMTNmYmM2LTAxYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAia2F0aHJ5bkBuZXdwYXByb2plY3Qub3JnIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g35Q237duvmQQRrlUAvF3JMNt0xdYwcBg3t1dzaU_Y8=] : October 23, 2023

I will keep fighting for veterans reform every single day

| Peter, I’m crushed. I have some breaking news to share with you: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58561921/391484288/299171790?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230210_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2OWQ1OC05MGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yDBoMaY2LI8gRgftv90BziPSjha4yOavYftpMKgWXf8=) | [CHIP IN $3 TO STAND WITH MARK TAKANO & HOUSE DEMOCRATS NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58561922/391484289/299171790?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230210_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2OWQ1OC05MGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yDBoMaY2LI8gRgftv90BziPSjha4yOavYftpMKgWXf8=)
---
Peter, I’m so proud to have served as Chairman of the Veterans Committee. Together we were able to do so much good work for America’s veterans.
* **I was proud to author the PACT Act** which provides critical healthcare benefits to veterans who were exposed to burn pits and other toxins. This bipartisan bill was signed into law by the President recently!
* **I advocated for vulnerable veterans** who are being targeted by far-right extremism online.
* **I fought to end the terrible deportations** of US veterans.

But sadly, since the GOP took over the House majority last month, it’s been chaos. They removed Democrats from committees, passed extremist legislation, and now it’s hitting closer to home.

**I will no longer be the Chairman of the House Veterans committee.** However, as the Ranking Member of the committee _I will keep fighting for veterans reform every single day._

[**Peter, Republicans are desperate to hold on to their razor-thin majority. But we won’t let them win. My campaign has set a goal of raising $10,000 by the end of the month to get it done — can I count on you to chip in $3 now to protect our progressive values now? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58561923/391484290/299171790?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230210_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2OWQ1OC05MGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yDBoMaY2LI8gRgftv90BziPSjha4yOavYftpMKgWXf8=)

clean_body: I will keep fighting for veterans reform every single day | Peter, I’m crushed. I have some breaking news to share with you: = | = Peter, I’m so proud to have served as Chairman of the Veterans Committee. Together we were able to do so much good work for America’s veterans. I was proud to author the PACT Act which provides critical healthcare benefits to veterans who were exposed to burn pits and other toxins. This bipartisan bill was signed into law by the President recently! I advocated for vulnerable veterans who are being targeted by far-right extremism online. I fought to end the terrible deportations of US veterans. But sadly, since the GOP took over the House majority last month, it’s been chaos. They removed Democrats from committees, passed extremist legislation, and now it’s hitting closer to home. I will no longer be the Chairman of the House Veterans committee. However, as the Ranking Member of the committee I will keep fighting for veterans reform every single day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much, Rep. Mark Takano (CA-39) | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. body:
"Go on offense" on abortion for 2024

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58561981/391484361/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230210RNC_N_JW_FULL_9_G_A_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU2OWQ1OC05MGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePSt576dtD9Lx91Zq1Xcsdpvb_xx8IBYp3kUFJFeWec=)
---
Recently, the Republican National Committee passed a resolution that reasserts their extreme anti-choice chance, supports the harshest anti-abortion legislation possible, and calls on their candidates to "go on offense" over the issue. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58561982/391484363/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230210RNC_N_JW_FULL_9_G_A_P1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU2OWQ1OC05MGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePSt576dtD9Lx91Zq1Xcsdpvb_xx8IBYp3kUFJFeWec=) This means that, once again, abortion is going to be on the ballot everywhere in the next election cycle. And it's critically important for the people of VA-10 to have a voice in Congress for reproductive freedom.

[**I've never backed down from supporting the right to choose — and that's sure to make me a target once again of national GOP groups. Will you pitch in to help me hold my seat in what's likely to be another competitive race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58561983/391484364/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230210RNC_N_JW_FULL_9_G_A_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU2OWQ1OC05MGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePSt576dtD9Lx91Zq1Xcsdpvb_xx8IBYp3kUFJFeWec=) [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58561984/391484368/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230210RNC_N_JW_FULL_9_G_A_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU2OWQ1OC05MGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePSt576dtD9Lx91Zq1Xcsdpvb_xx8IBYp3kUFJFeWec=) The American people want to see their leaders in Congress create jobs, lower the cost of living, and improve access to healthcare and public transportation. They don't want national legislation that restricts the right to choose — especially while millions are grappling with the devastating impact of Roe v. Wade being overturned.

**But if incumbents like me lose to an anti-choice opponent, we'll fail to retake the House and be one step closer to a dangerous GOP trifecta that _will pass_ a national abortion ban.**

We need to send a clear message in Northern Virginia: keep the government out of women's personal medical decisions. I will fight tirelessly to send this message every day, and I'll need your help if we want voters to deliver it at the ballot box next November.

**[**So please: donate what you can to help me reach folks across my district and lay the groundwork to hold my seat. Taking back the House and blocking national abortion bans depends on us keeping battleground districts like VA-10 blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58561985/391484370/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230210RNC_N_JW_FULL_9_G_A_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU2OWQ1OC05MGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePSt576dtD9Lx91Zq1Xcsdpvb_xx8IBYp3kUFJFeWec=)** [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58561986/391484372/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230210RNC_N_JW_FULL_9_G_A_B2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU2OWQ1OC05MGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePSt576dtD9Lx91Zq1Xcsdpvb_xx8IBYp3kUFJFeWec=) Thanks so much,

Jennifer ** ** | ****Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.**** ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58561987/391484373/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230210RNC_N_JW_FULL_9_G_A_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU2OWQ1OC05MGE5LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePSt576dtD9Lx91Zq1Xcsdpvb_xx8IBYp3kUFJFeWec=)******

body:

clean_body: His policies are failing at every turn | Peter, Immediately following his weak and inaccurate State of the Union Address, Joe Biden traveled to our great state of Wisconsin to further tout his lie that the state of the union is “strong.” He also used this visit as an opportunity to expand on his attacks on Republicans in his desperate attempt to gain supporters amidst his abysmal approval ratings. But voters see through all his lies as they struggle day to day on account of his failing policies. And that’s why I went onto Fox & Friends to respond to Biden’s lies about the state of our union and his visit to Wisconsin. He chose Wisconsin as his first stop because he knows our state is the top battleground state of 2024 and will decide his future. And he wasted no time in lying to voters about how successful his past two years in office were. But his words fail to match what everyday Americans are truly experiencing. The only thing Biden’s accomplishing is showing how out of touch with reality he is and how little he truly cares about how his failures affect Americans. That’s why we are fighting back, holding him accountable, and calling him out on his lying attacks and failed policies. A better future for America relies on exposing the truth about Biden and ENDING his radical agenda. And with your help, I know we will succeed. Thank you, Rep. Scott Fitzgerald Wisconsin's 5th Congressional District Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress Po Box 5048 Elm Grove, WI 53122

Peter Willis,

As workers unionize to demand fair pay and
better conditions, Starbucks has fought back ferociously with illegal
union busting tactics, including withholding an increase of $200 million
in salary and benefits that nonunion stores received from hundreds of
unionizing stores across America.

If that’s not bad enough, they’ve also closed unionized stores and hired
union busters who previously worked for the infamous Pinkerton Detective
Agency.

That’s why our founder, Bernie Sanders, is demanding that Starbucks CEO
Howard Schultz testify before his committee.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230210_FR_Starbucks_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_union&t=1011&akid=4002%2E5885482%2ElZp5Cx ]Howard Schultz is a billionaire and is already attacking Bernie with
the full power of his resources. Can we count on you to chip in to stand
with workers and help Bernie and Our Revolution hold Starbucks
accountable?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8350?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230210_FR_Starbucks_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_union&t=1012&akid=4002%2E5885482%2ElZp5Cx ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8351?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230210_FR_Starbucks_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_union&t=1013&akid=4002%2E5885482%2ElZp5Cx ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »

body:
We must put people and public health above politics | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg8hwWUyNSEWe9Y3VQL2fOD4812PN35iMtTU5slHaOTX9KZJqlVRl-e_b3z3z0v-qlL0do3yipvdrsBPypvAYJcXDFGISa2k6Ru6PtzGPf95dx_0B3W0k4C1qqC9ZYY1Z-CToRA1qbRMC2CJkvGccYFxdgBJ5gXV3eQghjxLvIvdzlVUeaKWbxuxzKgITEkCc4g/3tl/QvVG9H4iRrK5eR-gp-CIig/h0/aDURE_pMgAGvnYBfGceL6sezb2q4opnwVcgVXVEvnEE) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.

[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqqVDqVg-TTsqTvRLq2bddLHo4FU36h-T8An2E7OVpMHNDd1PmAPCBfj86yCE1mAPM-K9xZCbyfQF0gFqEYi8cDh4o7_4ITqJlP1MyWVdqQJSUtNp2MlA_UkpdTDcsEcSkK5VxWLmaVuV0EUjeRFoaryT_2-mwg1zbNQNW5falP4_FSMbP7fodsH6qV88IKNk3I3x99VIFsVm5SoVxInpivLkm2-eTps7CYGSwLL-Cxy4/3tl/QvVG9H4iRrK5eR-gp-CIig/h1/5FlJz7PU9XW6gdpJgwW6NE_-OS2p8zohplb7UG3eonA)
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad5yVaA_CImPVuTdzGTYQn8f0bEpl1ylhzbQNCFjgZwH4CrlIX72ZNnfzqLypFfKDjZjIN9CCpPMzLBl7Wjt9aGKdAVV3AbRBlFwm3ocu2CH2Bx-6fU674u8eE4Zj_5swaRJ-HakQyVBg3OLv1bb3K-ExLugTNN1AHoPYC38-p03q094WAnt2_3rOM0XsMOLwG_rG9v61dzsT7Xqz65sCvlxm0SDgKz7lEGbLgUR3QQz45MDPejoiwYhMFBfptrsbx1SCaG00MKLLK3-PkYm0K29I7zNfucdrbfgT3JclzUb4CiDc4qsbRnzJis_7KlTx4G3HB6Vxe52n72zMosIqjqaAC8Zx1IPspfxCYP1CL9jMOxVuLsHZP_gRAp-5QLCXRg/3tl/QvVG9H4iRrK5eR-gp-CIig/h2/fmRbkvIYI-3SOQVxEZNU0qcX8M7Szj_rWsx8gNwLxyY) I am honored to have been appointed by Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries to serve as Ranking Member of the Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic.

As a physician and public health expert, I’m eager to take an equity-based and patient-centered approach to identify common-sense solutions that will protect our nation’s health.

Folks, when I became a physician, I took an oath to do no harm. That oath would ring hollow if I didn’t fight to protect the American people from dangerous misinformation that clouds our public discourse and health response.

So I want to be clear. **I’ll have no patience for conspiracy theories, COVID deniers, or “alternative facts” when I serve on this committee.**

And look, team – I won’t win any friends from across the aisle when I call out their nonsense and COVID lies. And with National Republicans already fighting to unseat me, this will only ramp up their attacks.

[**So I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back against dangerous misinformation. Will you chip in $10 today toward our 500 donation goal to put people and public health above politics?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad5yVaA_CImPVuTdzGTYQn8f0bEpl1ylhzbQNCFjgZwH4CrlIX72ZNnfzqLypFfKDjZjIN9CCpPMzLBl7Wjt9aGKaQ5k48UfVnOj-W2n8De5NcFb9WharfTnclUzrl-mOegYVNT8aCKF8D_CH2WD2vgPLcI6CGN9jkG7BuGjR1YUcUhQCECMkoyYSam7yZR3BMyS09ZQSqQSpKHX6GS7aN2drDqJmdflEjEHBRT-rJoH1S1WfQy5GKzrdklH12QGbEIuFVyAH6JX89TTxQuYvBmh0Y_irsktV_0Ss8vJaM3DZkqSs208PuUGCaN6i1r-s-xo-MRsF-W_vKwEj27z22me47TcmGgAyuisGESyTQnei-5KpVFk9N1_GqZ25xTbA_g/3tl/QvVG9H4iRrK5eR-gp-CIig/h3/kvSbkRwbfR3U3IwWuQuflYq-6xZtvkGrorF0I9ehb5E) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad75Kxl3LCUOFxqH2z_lyRgWnoCvjJlrQmPuSeQZfY-u0mj0MUfkto5Zdt9PvWOLymQLbM42gSth8ubeVBCBxtLvq3Nda_PCc5UFzEhv8bw9WihE6UGTDN02e2gGOJczs0C87GnebOC_0WYVCcAzZGHHtRHWrm9uSEatRPxmGcIO7EquO3UMjkjj3W7IVz4Rv9LZDkMYpRMH0xoo616qzY5QhpFNqBJkiLeIdedULZfFjfKvqu4kVjdpE5Dnn42FxKk9svyo4nVqY7lx2Zc5ZjdNbzpnlq2R40B0uyxqq6p8j-bvFDghQfABzn0O2gFvHOj4rAbb39ABBGvmDnsbpaHskih--qSp6M6YHFqATDumNxywPFsn-0nG7lCtFzqoPqr-BgtJehDUiOvIDuTKyEY01gaU-PLWW_HbNd6QCbK6d/3tl/QvVG9H4iRrK5eR-gp-CIig/h4/5RqhELpaeAc6lBXNN1Sco562_GIeOU7wMP0RuFC8GN4)

clean_body: We must put people and public health above politics | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I am honored to have been appointed by Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries to serve as Ranking Member of the Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic. As a physician and public health expert, I’m eager to take an equity-based and patient-centered approach to identify common-sense solutions that will protect our nation’s health. Folks, when I became a physician, I took an oath to do no harm. That oath would ring hollow if I didn’t fight to protect the American people from dangerous misinformation that clouds our public discourse and health response. So I want to be clear. I’ll have no patience for conspiracy theories, COVID deniers, or “alternative facts” when I serve on this committee. And look, team – I won’t win any friends from across the aisle when I call out their nonsense and COVID lies. And with National Republicans already fighting to unseat me, this will only ramp up their attacks. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Hunter Biden Gun Update
body:
U.S./UK ‘Confidentiality Agreement’ on Vaccine Adverse Events

[INSIDE JW]

Secret Service Official on Hunter: ‘Maybe We Were Asked for A
Favor?’

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28868&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vbGl2ZS9pclpoNmJpWVc3WT9mZWF0dXJlPXNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
As you know, we are investigating whether and how the Secret
Service intervened for Hunter Biden in an incident involving a gun he
allegedly owned. Here’s the latest.

We received records from the Secret Service related to the
investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun, reportedly disposed of in a
dumpster
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28851&F=T&]
in Delaware in October 2018.

These new records suggest that one can’t take at face value the
Secret Service’s denial that it wasn’t involved in the Hunter
Biden gun cover-up.

The records show agency officials discussing media reports of its
alleged involvement, with one finding it “odd” that the Secret
Service was involved in the investigation when Joe and Hunter Biden
were not receiving Secret Service protection at the time. Another
official responds: “Maybe we were asked for a favor?”

The records show the agency alerted the Biden White House and crafted
a public statement insisting it had “no involvement in this alleged
incident” and refusing to provide any additional clarification to
media inquiries.

In September 2022, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA)
lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28275&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWludmVzdGlnYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
for records or communications about the reported purchase, possession,
and disposal of a firearm owned by Hunter Biden found in a Delaware
dumpster in October 2018 (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of
Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28122&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1ndW4tY29tcGxhaW50LTAyODQxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
(No. 1:22-cv-02841)).

We reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28524&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWd1bi1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
in December 2022 that the Secret Service repeatedly changed its
position
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28507&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1ndW4tcmVjb3Jkcy0wMjg0MS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
about whether it is in possession of records related to the
investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun.

The newly obtained records show that on October 29, 2020, a person
whose name is redacted emails
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28852&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTMtNy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
a Secret Service official in the “PID” (Protective Intelligence
and Assessment Division) with a link to a _Blaze_ article
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28123&F=T&]
published earlier that day, reporting that Hallie Biden had taken a
handgun owned by Hunter Biden in October 2018 and thrown it into a
supermarket trash bin. The official then forwards the article to
another official in the PID.

An official whose name is redacted later comments in this chain: “Oh
dear...”

After being forwarded the same _Blaze_ article, an unidentified
Protective Intelligence Research Specialist responds to his
colleagues: “It’s kind of odd that we were involved in the missing
gun investigation when neither Hunter or Joe were even receiving USSS
[Secret Service] protection at the time? Hmmm.” Another official
replies: “Maybe we were asked for a favor?”

Senior Secret Service officials, whose names were disclosed in the
records, were also notified
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28853&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTgtMTEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
of _The Blaze_ article on November 2, 2020. They include James Henry,
then-Special Agent in Charge of the Philadelphia Field Office; Michael
D’Ambrosio, Assistant Director of the U.S. Secret Service in charge
of oversight of all Secret Service domestic and foreign Secret Service
offices; Steven Stanford, then-Deputy Assistant Director; Leonza
Newsome III, then-Deputy Director; and Douglas Henderson, Deputy
Assistant Director, Office of Investigations.

After _The_ _Blaze _article was forwarded by James Henry to a
colleague in the Wilmington, DE, office, whose name is redacted, the
colleague responds to Henry: “Digging in now. There is more
information but I don’t have it yet.”

In response to a February 24, 2021, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28854&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTEyLTMwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
inquiry from _Politico _reporter Ben Schreckinger regarding the Secret
Service’s involvement in the investigation of the Hunter Biden gun
incident, the Communications Department asks for “more information
or documentation.” Schreckinger responds: “Sure thing. Agents
visited StarQuest Shooters & Survival Supply and asked to take
possession of the paperwork Hunter had filled out to purchase a gun
there. The FBI also had some involvement in the investigation.”

The Communications Office then drafts and distributes internally a
proposed response labeled “Draft/Predecisional/Draft.”

Under the subheading “Internal Background:”

> The RAIC [Resident Agent in Charge] of the Wilmington Resident
> Office reported that all agents in his office denied any
> involvement. The Politico reporter refused to provide any details on
> the source of the information or that he was in possession of any
> official document, where we were identified. The statement has been
> drafted to address any implication that anyone from the service was
> involved in this incident.
Under the subheading “Draft for Release:”

Statement from the U.S. Secret Service

> US Secret Service records confirm that the agency did not provide
> protection to any member of the Biden family in 2018, and that the
> Secret Service had no involvement in this alleged incident.
Later that day, Secret Service Director of Communications Catherine
Milhoan
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28855&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VjcmV0c2VydmljZS5nb3Yvbm9kZS8zMjE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
forwards
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28856&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTEyLTU3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
the draft response for the _Politico_ reporter to Biden White House
spokeswoman Jen Psaki and White House Communications Director Kate
Bedingfield: “Kate/Jen, Good afternoon. For your awareness. We will
be releasing the statement at 4 p.m. Milhoan then sent the draft to
other USSS [Secret Service] officials, writing, “For your awareness
... as part of our standard ops here at the USSS ... WH Comms also has
awareness of the query and our anticipated response.”

Milhoan then emails several senior Secret Service officials: “Thanks
all. DHS OPA [Department of Homeland Security Office of Public
Affairs] and WH Comms are tracking as well.”

After receiving the statement, the reporter replies
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28856&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTEyLTU3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
to the Communications Office, “Just to clarify. Did Secret Service
agents ever visit StarQuest Shooters & Survival Supply and request
records related to Hunter Biden?” A Secret Service official whose
name is redacted replies, “Ben, To reiterate, the Secret Service had
no involvement in this alleged incident.”

In a separate email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28857&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTU4LTU5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
on February 24, 2021, the Special Agent in Charge of the Presidential
Protection Division, David Cho, emails six officials in the White
House, including “JOD” [likely Jen O’Malley Dillon
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28858&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucG9saXRpY28uY29tL25ld3NsZXR0ZXJzL3dlc3Qtd2luZy1wbGF5Ym9vay8yMDIxLzA3LzI4L3Byb2JsZW1zLWluLWpvZC1sYW5kLTQ5Mzc2OT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]],
“Just wanted to provide for awareness. Jen Psaki and Kate
Bedingfield were notified by our CMR [Communications and Media
Relations] on the below inquiry. Our response is also stated. In
summary – no records of the event ever occurring. Please advise if
you have any questions.”

On March 2, 2021, the _Politico_ reporter follows up
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28859&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTg2LTk3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
with additional questions to the Secret Service media office, which
sets off further internal Secret Service exchanges. Schrecklinger
asks:

> I just wanted to follow up with another couple of questions:
>
> Did Secret Service agents in Delaware do any work related to
> President Biden in the period between when his status as a protectee
> expired after his vice presidency and when it resumed during his
> most recent presidential campaign?
>
> For example, during this period, were Secret Service agents ever in
> touch with the Delaware State Police to arrange police details for
> Biden?
An official in the communications office whose name is redacted then
forwards the follow-up questions to an official in the Wilmington, DE,
office, whose name is also redacted: “Can you give me a call on the
below questions.”

Wilmington official replies, “I’ll give you a call in about an
hour.” The Wilmington official then forwards the email exchange to
James Henry
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28860&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2luL2phbWVzLWhlbnJ5LTQyNTM5MzE0OC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz],
former SAC of the Philadelphia Field Office: “FYSA [For Your
Situational Awareness].”

On March 10, 2021, the reporter follows up again
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28861&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTExMC0xMTQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
with the Secret Service about their failure to respond to his
follow-up questions of March 2, writing, “Circling back on this. I
spoke to someone on your team about this last week and they said they
would get me a statement by the end of the day, but I haven’t seen
anything land. If you all want to weigh in on this, please get back to
me by the end of the day today.” An official in the Secret Service
Communications Office responds, “Ben, we have no additional
information to provide for this request.”

On March 25, 2021 Special Agent in Charge Benjamin Kramer, emails
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28862&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTE3OC0xODIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
then-Secret Service Assistant Director of Intergovernmental and
Legislative Affairs (IGL), Jeremy Sheridan, a copy of the March 25
_Politico_ article about Hunter Biden’s gun and cited the Secret
Service statement in the article
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28863&F=T&

> On Oct. 23, 2018, President Joe Biden’s son Hunter and daughter in
> law Hallie were involved in a bizarre incident in which Hallie took
> Hunter’s gun and threw it in a trash can behind a grocery store,
> only to return later to find it gone.
>
> Delaware police began investigating, concerned that the trash can
> was across from a high school and that the missing gun could be used
> in a crime ...
>
> Arriving on the scene, Delaware State Police retrieved security
> camera footage from the store ...
>
> But a curious thing happened at the time: Secret Service agents
> approached the owner of the store where Hunter bought the gun and
> asked to take the paperwork involving the sale, according to two
> people, one of whom has firsthand knowledge of the episode and the
> other was briefed by a Secret Service agent after the fact.

***

> The Federal Bureau of Investigation also responded to the scene,
> according to people familiar with the situation. At the time, the
> FBI was monitoring Hunter Biden as part of an investigation that
> remains ongoing and that currently focuses on his taxes. The FBI
> declined to comment.

***

> A Secret Service spokesperson said the agency has no record of
> involvement in the incident: “U.S. Secret Service records confirm
> that the agency did not provide protection to any member of the
> Biden family in 2018, and that the Secret Service had no involvement
> in this alleged incident.”
Kramer then asks Sheridan, “Confirming this is comment we can relay
if inquiries are made from Hill counterparts or if anything further
needs to be discussed (?).” Sheridan replied, “Yes, the comment as
provided in the article is our response to any inquiries.”

On March 25, 2021, Milhoan forwards
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28864&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTI1MS0yNTUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
the _Politico_ article to several senior Secret Service officials:
“For your awareness ... the article is total BS as we all know.
Leadership is aware and I will let you know if CMR [Office of
Communications and Media Relations] receives any queries.”

On March 26, 2021, _New York Post_ reporter Lorena Mongelli reaches
out
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28865&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTM3MS0zNzQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
to the Secret Service Communications Office, asking for comment on
text messages on Hunter Biden’s lost laptop:

> It appears the text messages were sent from Hunter Biden in which he
> indicates that the Secret Service did in fact respond to the Oct.
> 23, 2018 [gun] incident. This information contradicts your previous
> statement relating to the incident and we would like to know whether
> the Secret Service would like to respond to these new findings.
A person from the Communications Office, whose name is redacted
replies: “We have received your inquiry, would you be able to
provide copies of these alleged text messages for reference?”
Mongelli responds:
The Daily Mail actually posted copies of the same text messages the NY
Post is referencing.

This is what one text message says:

“She stole the gun out of my trunk lock box and threw it in a
garbage can full to the top at Jansens [sic]. Then told me it was my
problem to deal with," Hunter wrote.

“Then when the police the FBI the secret service came on the scene
she said she took it from me because she was scared I would harm
myself due to o my drug and alcohol problem and our volatile
relationship and that she was afraid for the kids.”

***

> You can view images of the messages here:
>
https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28866&F=T&
In October 2020, _The Blaze_ reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28123&F=T&]
that in October 2018, Hunter Biden’s handgun was taken by Hallie
Biden, the widow of then-presidential nominee Joe Biden’s son Beau.
In 2021,_ Politico _reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28124&F=T&

> Hallie took Hunter’s gun and threw it in a trash can behind a
> grocery store, only to return later to find it gone.
>
> Delaware police began investigating, concerned that the trash can
> was across from a high school and that the missing gun could be used
> in a crime, according to law enforcement officials and a copy of the
> police report obtained by POLITICO.
>
> But a curious thing happened at the time: Secret Service agents
> approached the owner of the store where Hunter bought the gun and
> asked to take the paperwork involving the sale, according to two
> people, one of whom has firsthand knowledge of the episode and the
> other was briefed by a Secret Service agent after the fact.
The Secret Service initially responded
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28524&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWd1bi1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
to our FOIA
request in this case on April 2, 2021, stating that it had located
potentially responsive records and would process them in accordance
with FOIA. Then, on October 13, 2022, the Secret Service said that the
April 2021 response was sent in error and that it did not have any
records responsive to the FOIA request.

Through FOIA, we have uncovered significant information about Hunter
Biden, who served on the board of directors
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=20503&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmF0aW9uYWxyZXZpZXcuY29tLzIwMTkvMDkvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWNvbXByZWhlbnNpdmUtdGltZWxpbmUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
for Ukrainian energy firm Burisma Holdings despite having no previous
experience in the energy industry.

In October 2022, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28275&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWludmVzdGlnYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
against
the Department of Justice for all records in the possession of FBI
Supervisory Intelligence Analyst Brian Auten regarding an August 6,
2020, briefing provided to members of the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson
(R-WI) and Chuck Grassley (R-IA) raised concerns that the briefing was
intended to undermine the senators’ investigation of Hunter Biden.

In December 2020, we received records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=27184&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdWtyYWluZS1oaWxsYXJ5LWNsaW50b24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
from the
State Department tying Hunter Biden’s Burisma Holdings’ lobbying
operation to an influence-peddling operation involving the Clinton
campaign during the 2016 election. Also uncovered were State
Department records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=27185&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYnVyaXNtYS1pbXBlYWNobWVudC15b3Zhbm92aXRjaC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
showing that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha”
Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption
allegations against Burisma Holdings.

In October 2020, State Department records

In June 2020, U.S. Secret Service records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=27700&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWZsaWdodHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]

U.S. AND UK HEALTH ADMINISTRATORS HAD A ‘CONFIDENTIALITY
AGREEMENT’ TIED TO VACCINE ADVERSE EVENTS

We continue to find out more about concerns at the highest levels
regarding the COVID-19 vaccine.

We received records from the U.S. Department of Health and Human
Services (HHS) that show a discussion between U.S. and UK health
regulators that occurred just two days prior to FDA approval of the
Pfizer-BioNTech COVID-19 vaccine regarding “anaphylaxis
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28869&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG9wa2luc21lZGljaW5lLm9yZy9oZWFsdGgvY29uZGl0aW9ucy1hbmQtZGlzZWFzZXMvYW5hcGh5bGF4aXNdLOKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=
with the regulators emphasizing their “mutual confidentiality
agreement.”

We obtained the records a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=27179&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmFjY2luZS1zaWRlLWVmZmVjdHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
against HHS
(_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=26977&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXZhY2NpbmUtYWR2aXNvcnktY29tbWl0dGVlLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMDY2MC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
(No. 1:22-cv-00660)) after the FDA, which is an agency of HHS, failed
to respond to an August 30, 2021, FOIA request for:

> All emails sent to and from members of the Vaccines and Related
> Biological Products Advisory Committee regarding adverse events,
> deaths and/or injuries caused by investigatory vaccines for the
> prevention or treatment of SARS-CoV-2 and/or COVID-19 currently
> produced by Pfizer/BioNTech, Moderna and/or Johnson & Johnson.
The Vaccines and Related Biological Products Advisory Committee
(VRBPAC
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=26978&F=T&])
is the U.S. government’s central advisory body, along with Advisory
Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28291&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2RjLmdvdi92YWNjaW5lcy9hY2lwL2luZGV4Lmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]),
advising whether to
approve COVID vaccines.

A lengthy, heavily redacted December 2020 email exchange
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28846&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLWNvdmlkLXZhY2NpbmVzLWZlYi0yMDIyLTAwNjYwLXBncy0xNC0yNi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
shows U.S. and UK health officials placing a heavy emphasis on their
“mutual confidentiality agreement” in a discussion regarding
“anaphylactoid reactions” to the COVID vaccine.

The exchange is initiated by Jonathan Mogford, policy director of the
UK’s Medicines and Healthcare Products Regulatory Agency and is sent
to Acting FDA Commissioner Janet Woodcock as well as Peter Marks,
director of the Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research (CBER).
The subject line and body of the email are fully redacted under FOIA
Exemption B3 (relating to statutory prohibitions).

As background, Mogford includes information on “two cases of
anaphylactoid reactions in individuals with a strong past history of
allergic reactions....” Marks replies to Mogford: “It would be
very helpful if our Office of Vaccines could receive additional
details [redacted] from MHRA [UK Medicines and Healthcare Products
Regulatory Agency] under the terms of our mutual confidentiality
agreement.” Mogford later replies, “... attached are [redacted]
hope that’s helpful in the meantime. If I can just remind –
information shared under our confidentiality agreement.”

Marion Gruber, then head of the Office of Vaccines Research and Review
(OVRR), replies to Mogford, “Thank you so much for this information.
Our emails crossed. If possible, would be available for a t-con
[teleconference] today?” The exchange concludes with OVRR Deputy
Director Phil Krause advising UK Medicines and Healthcare Products
Regulatory Agency official Jamie Convisser, “Your summary is
correct. I’m cc:ing Amanda Cohn at CDC who can provide the most
up-to-date details about [redacted]. Obviously, [redacted], not all of
this is public so please hold these details confidential.” Cohn then
replies to Mogford, and includes an attachment titled “Anaphylaxis
CLARK Dec 19 2020 Final”. She writes, “I am adding my colleagues
Tom Clark and Stacey Martin, we are happy to share more information
with you. Attached are slides that were presented at a public meeting
on Saturday. [Redacted].”

The FDA issued its Emergency Use Authorization
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28847&F=T&]
for the Pfizer-BioNTech COVID vaccine for individuals 16 years of age
and older on December 11, 2020.

On May 14, 2021, the CDC’s Dr. Amanda Cohn emailed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28848&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLWNvdmlkLXZhY2NpbmVzLWZlYi0yMDIyLTAwNjYwLXBnLTU5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
Office of Vaccines Research and Review Director Marion Gruber and
Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research Director Peter Marks with
the subject line “Coadministration of COVID-19 Vaccines with Other
Vaccines During Pregnancy.”

Gruber writes, “I am fine with this language.” Marks then responds
to Cohn and her CDC colleague, Sarah Mbaeyi, “I can live with this
too. Please let me know if you want to connect about the adverse event
issue later today. Seems like work is still ongoing, but let me know.
Thanks.” Cohn replies, “We have a meeting with Rochelle
[presumably CDC Director Rochelle Walensky] at 3:30 about if we should
say anything or wait until we have more definitive information. I will
let you know where we land. I’m not sure there is a right answer.”

It again took a lawsuit for the Biden administration to hand over,
albeit heavily redacted, information regarding the safety of the COVID
vaccines that the public has every right to know. This disturbing
batch of new documents has uncovered a secret confidentiality
agreement tied to COVID vaccine safety issues and emails that raise
new questions about the vaccines and pregnancy.

We are pursuing challenges against the agency’s redactions under
FOIA.

In a previous production from this FOIA lawsuit, we received 1,081
pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28298&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbXlvY2FyZGl0aXMtY292aWQtdmFjY2luZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
of
records from HHS detailing internal discussions about myocarditis and
the COVID vaccine. Other documents detailed adverse “events for
which a contributory effect of the vaccine could not be excluded.”
Through FOIA, we have uncovered a substantial amount of information
about COVID-19 issues:

* HHS records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28574&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbXJuYS10ZXN0LXJhdHMtYm9ybi13aXRoLXNrZWxldGFsLWRlZm9ybWF0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
regarding data Moderna submitted to the FDA on its mRNA COVID-19
vaccine, indicated a “statistically significant” number of rats
were born with skeletal deformations after their mothers were injected
with the vaccine. The documents also reveal Moderna elected not to
conduct a number of standard pharmacological studies on the laboratory
test animals.
* FDA records detailed pressure
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28333&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY292aWQtYm9vc3Rlci11c2UtYW5kLWFwcHJvdmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
for
COVID-19 vaccine booster approval and use.
* NIH records revealed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=27674&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmloLWZiaS1pbnF1aXJ5LW9mLXd1aGFuLWdyYW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
an FBI
“inquiry” into the NIH’s controversial bat coronavirus grant
tied to the Wuhan Institute of Virology. The records also show
National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID)
officials were concerned about “gain-of-function” research in
China’s Wuhan Institute of Virology in 2016. The Fauci agency was
also concerned about EcoHealth Alliance’s
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=28691&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWNvaGVhbHRoYWxsaWFuY2Uub3JnL11sYWNrP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==
of compliance with reporting
rules and use of gain-of-function research in the NIH-funded research
involving bat coronaviruses in Wuhan, China.
* HHS records revealed that from 2014 to 2019, $826,277
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=27323&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmF1Y2ktd3VoYW4tODI2ay8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
was given to the
Wuhan Institute of Virology for bat coronavirus research by the NIAID.
* NIAID records showed that it gave nine China-related grants to

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=26990&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3VoYW4tbGFiLWZhdWNpLWdyYW50cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
to research

* HHS records included an “urgent for Dr. Fauci
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=26868&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmV3LWZhdWNpLWVtYWlscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

citing ties between the Wuhan lab and the taxpayer-funded EcoHealth
Alliance
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=25283&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWNvaGVhbHRoYWxsaWFuY2Uub3JnLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=].
The government emails
also reported that the foundation of U.S. billionaire Bill Gates
worked closely with the Chinese government to pave the way for
Chinese-produced medications to be sold outside China and help
“raise China’s voice of governance by placing representatives from
China on important international counsels as high-level commitment
from China.”
* HHS records included a grant application for research involving
the coronavirus that appears to describe “gain-of-function
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62180&L=27321&F=T&
research involving RNA extractions from bats, experiments on viruses,
